changes.title: Control 界面/Talk: 添加 a generic 浏览器 realtime transport contract, Google Live 浏览器 Talk sessions 使用 constrained ephemeral tokens, 和 a 网关 relay 为了 backend-only realtime 语音 插件. Thanks @VACInc.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/Talk: add a generic browser realtime transport contract, Google Live browser Talk sessions with constrained ephemeral tokens, and a Gateway relay for backend-only realtime voice plugins. Thanks @VACInc.

changes.title: CLI/模型: route provider-filtered 模型 listing through an explicit source plan so user 配置, installed manifest rows, Provider Index previews, 和 scoped runtime fallbacks keep a stable authority order 不适用 adding another catalog cache. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/models: route provider-filtered model listing through an explicit source plan so user config, installed manifest rows, Provider Index previews, and scoped runtime fallbacks keep a stable authority order without adding another catalog cache. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: Providers: 添加 Cerebras as a bundled 插件 使用 onboarding, static 模型 catalog, docs, 和 manifest-owned endpoint metadata.
changes.rawTitle: Providers: add Cerebras as a bundled plugin with onboarding, static model catalog, docs, and manifest-owned endpoint metadata.

changes.title: 内存/OpenAI-compatible: 添加 optional `memorySearch.inputType`, `queryInputType`, 和 `documentInputType` 配置 为了 asymmetric embedding endpoints, including direct query embeddings 和 provider batch indexing. Carries forward #63313 和 #60727. Thanks @HOYALIM 和 @prospect1314521.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/OpenAI-compatible: add optional `memorySearch.inputType`, `queryInputType`, and `documentInputType` config for asymmetric embedding endpoints, including direct query embeddings and provider batch indexing. Carries forward #63313 and #60727. Thanks @HOYALIM and @prospect1314521.

changes.title: Ollama/内存: 添加 模型-specific retrieval query prefixes 为了 `nomic-embed-text`, `qwen3-embedding`, 和 `mxbai-embed-large` 内存-search queries while leaving document batches unchanged. Carries forward #45013. Thanks @laolin5564.
changes.rawTitle: Ollama/memory: add model-specific retrieval query prefixes for `nomic-embed-text`, `qwen3-embedding`, and `mxbai-embed-large` memory-search queries while leaving document batches unchanged. Carries forward #45013. Thanks @laolin5564.

changes.title: 插件/providers: move pre-runtime 模型-id normalization, provider endpoint host metadata, 和 OpenAI-compatible request-family hints 进入 插件 manifests so core no longer carries bundled-provider routing tables.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/providers: move pre-runtime model-id normalization, provider endpoint host metadata, and OpenAI-compatible request-family hints into plugin manifests so core no longer carries bundled-provider routing tables.

changes.title: 插件/配置: deprecate direct 插件 配置 load/write helpers 在 favor 的 passed runtime snapshots plus transactional mutation helpers 使用 explicit restart follow-up policy, scanner guardrails, runtime warnings, 和 revision-based cache invalidation.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/config: deprecate direct plugin config load/write helpers in favor of passed runtime snapshots plus transactional mutation helpers with explicit restart follow-up policy, scanner guardrails, runtime warnings, and revision-based cache invalidation.

changes.title: 插件/install: 允许 `OPENCLAW_PLUGIN_STAGE_DIR` to contain layered runtime-dependency roots, resolving read-only preinstalled deps 之前 installing missing deps 进入 the final writable root. 修复 #72396. Thanks @liorb-mountapps.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/install: allow `OPENCLAW_PLUGIN_STAGE_DIR` to contain layered runtime-dependency roots, resolving read-only preinstalled deps before installing missing deps into the final writable root. Fixes #72396. Thanks @liorb-mountapps.

changes.title: Control 界面: 添加 a raw 配置 pending-changes diff panel that parses JSON5, redacts sensitive values until reveal, 和 avoids fake raw-edit callbacks 当 opening the panel. Refs #39831; supersedes #48621 和 #46654. Thanks @JiajunBernoulli 和 @BunsDev.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI: add a raw config pending-changes diff panel that parses JSON5, redacts sensitive values until reveal, and avoids fake raw-edit callbacks when opening the panel. Refs #39831; supersedes #48621 and #46654. Thanks @JiajunBernoulli and @BunsDev.

changes.title: Control 界面: polish the quick settings dashboard grid so common cards align across desktop, tablet, 和 mobile layouts 不适用 wasting horizontal space. Thanks @BunsDev.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI: polish the quick settings dashboard grid so common cards align across desktop, tablet, and mobile layouts without wasting horizontal space. Thanks @BunsDev.

changes.title: Matrix/E2EE: 添加 `openclaw matrix encryption setup` to 启用 Matrix encryption, bootstrap recovery, 和 print verification status 从 one setup flow. Thanks @gumadeiras.
changes.rawTitle: Matrix/E2EE: add `openclaw matrix encryption setup` to enable Matrix encryption, bootstrap recovery, and print verification status from one setup flow. Thanks @gumadeiras.

changes.title: Agent/compaction: 添加 an opt-在 `Agent.defaults.compaction.maxActiveTranscriptBytes` preflight trigger that runs normal local compaction 当 the active JSONL grows too large, requiring transcript rotation so successful compaction moves future turns onto a smaller successor file 而不是 raw byte-splitting history. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/compaction: add an opt-in `agents.defaults.compaction.maxActiveTranscriptBytes` preflight trigger that runs normal local compaction when the active JSONL grows too large, requiring transcript rotation so successful compaction moves future turns onto a smaller successor file instead of raw byte-splitting history. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: CLI/migration: 添加 a bundled Claude importer that previews 和 applies Claude Code 和 Claude Desktop instructions, MCP协议 servers, skills, 命令 prompts, 和 safe archive/manual-review state. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/migration: add a bundled Claude importer that previews and applies Claude Code and Claude Desktop instructions, MCP servers, skills, command prompts, and safe archive/manual-review state. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: CLI/migration: 添加 `openclaw migrate` 使用 plan, dry-run, JSON, pre-migration backup, onboarding detection, archive-only report copies, 和 a bundled Hermes importer 为了 configuration, 内存/插件 hints, 模型 providers, MCP协议 servers, skills, 和 supported credentials. Thanks @NousResearch.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/migration: add `openclaw migrate` with plan, dry-run, JSON, pre-migration backup, onboarding detection, archive-only report copies, and a bundled Hermes importer for configuration, memory/plugin hints, model providers, MCP servers, skills, and supported credentials. Thanks @NousResearch.

changes.title: 网关/device tokens: 停止 echoing rotated bearer tokens 从 shared/admin `device.令牌.rotate` responses while preserving the same-device 令牌 handoff needed 通过 令牌-only clients 之前 reconnect. (#66773) Thanks @MoerAI.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/device tokens: stop echoing rotated bearer tokens from shared/admin `device.token.rotate` responses while preserving the same-device token handoff needed by token-only clients before reconnect. (#66773) Thanks @MoerAI.

changes.title: Agent/sessions_spawn: 解决 configured bare 模型 aliases 为了 spawn 模型 overrides using the target Agent runtime default provider, carrying forward the alias-specific #69029 review 修复 从 #59681 不适用 the unrelated active-session pruning 路径. 修复 #59681. Thanks @HowdyDooToYou.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/sessions_spawn: resolve configured bare model aliases for spawn model overrides using the target agent runtime default provider, carrying forward the alias-specific #69029 review fixes from #59681 without the unrelated active-session pruning path. Fixes #59681. Thanks @HowdyDooToYou.

changes.title: Control 界面/Talk: keep Google Live 浏览器 sessions 在 the WebSocket transport 而不是 falling back to WebRTC, validate 浏览器 Google Live WebSocket endpoints, cap 网关 relay sessions per 浏览器 connection, 和 移除 stale 浏览器-native 语音 buttons that did not use the configured Talk/TTS provider. Thanks @BunsDev.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/Talk: keep Google Live browser sessions on the WebSocket transport instead of falling back to WebRTC, validate browser Google Live WebSocket endpoints, cap Gateway relay sessions per browser connection, and remove stale browser-native voice buttons that did not use the configured Talk/TTS provider. Thanks @BunsDev.

changes.title: 网关/startup: 复用 配置 snapshot 插件 manifests 为了 startup auto-启用 之前 插件 bootstrap plans 插件 loading. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/startup: reuse config snapshot plugin manifests for startup auto-enable before plugin bootstrap plans plugin loading. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: Agent/subagents: enforce `subagents.allowAgents` 为了 explicit same-Agent `sessions_spawn(agentId=...)` calls 而不是 auto-allowing requester self-targets. 修复 #72827. Thanks @oiGaDio.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/subagents: enforce `subagents.allowAgents` for explicit same-agent `sessions_spawn(agentId=...)` calls instead of auto-allowing requester self-targets. Fixes #72827. Thanks @oiGaDio.

changes.title: ACP/sessions_spawn: let explicit `sessions_spawn(runtime="acp")` bootstrap turns run while `acp.dispatch.enabled=false` still blocks automatic ACP thread dispatch. 修复 #63591. Thanks @moeedahmed.
changes.rawTitle: ACP/sessions_spawn: let explicit `sessions_spawn(runtime="acp")` bootstrap turns run while `acp.dispatch.enabled=false` still blocks automatic ACP thread dispatch. Fixes #63591. Thanks @moeedahmed.

changes.title: CLI/更新: install npm global updates 进入 a verified temporary prefix 之前 swapping the package tree 进入 place, preventing mixed old/new installs 和 stale packaged files 从 破坏性变更 `openclaw 更新` verification. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/update: install npm global updates into a verified temporary prefix before swapping the package tree into place, preventing mixed old/new installs and stale packaged files from breaking `openclaw update` verification. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: 网关: skip CLI startup self-respawn 为了 foreground 网关 runs so low-内存 Linux/Node 24 hosts start through the same 路径 as direct `dist/index.js` 不适用 hanging 之前 logs. 修复 #72720. Thanks @sign-2025.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway: skip CLI startup self-respawn for foreground gateway runs so low-memory Linux/Node 24 hosts start through the same path as direct `dist/index.js` without hanging before logs. Fixes #72720. Thanks @sign-2025.

changes.title: Google Meet: grant Meet media permissions through 浏览器 control 和 pin local Chrome audio defaults to `BlackHole 2ch`, so joined Agent no longer show `Permission needed` 或 use macOS default audio devices. Thanks @DougButdorf.
changes.rawTitle: Google Meet: grant Meet media permissions through browser control and pin local Chrome audio defaults to `BlackHole 2ch`, so joined agents no longer show `Permission needed` or use macOS default audio devices. Thanks @DougButdorf.

changes.title: 网关: treat uncaught broken-pipe stream errors like `EPIPE` as non-fatal so Discord delivery 或 closed pipes no longer 崩溃 the 网关 之后 a reply is ready.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway: treat uncaught broken-pipe stream errors like `EPIPE` as non-fatal so Discord delivery or closed pipes no longer crash the Gateway after a reply is ready.

changes.title: Google Meet: route local Chrome joins through OpenClaw 浏览器 control 而不是 raw default Chrome, so Agent use the configured OpenClaw 浏览器 profile 当 opening Meet. Thanks @oromeis.
changes.rawTitle: Google Meet: route local Chrome joins through OpenClaw browser control instead of raw default Chrome, so agents use the configured OpenClaw browser profile when opening Meet. Thanks @oromeis.

changes.title: 插件/discovery: follow symlinked 插件 directories 在 global 和 workspace 插件 roots while keeping broken links ignored 和 existing package safety checks 在 place. 修复 #36754; carries forward #72695 和 #63206. Thanks @Quackstro, @ming1523, 和 @xsfX20.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/discovery: follow symlinked plugin directories in global and workspace plugin roots while keeping broken links ignored and existing package safety checks in place. Fixes #36754; carries forward #72695 and #63206. Thanks @Quackstro, @ming1523, and @xsfX20.

changes.title: 插件/install: skip test files 和 directories 期间 install 安全 scans while still force-scanning declared runtime entrypoints, so packaged test mocks no longer block 插件 installs. 修复 #66840; carries forward #67050. Thanks @saurabhjain1592 和 @Magicray1217.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/install: skip test files and directories during install security scans while still force-scanning declared runtime entrypoints, so packaged test mocks no longer block plugin installs. Fixes #66840; carries forward #67050. Thanks @saurabhjain1592 and @Magicray1217.

changes.title: 插件/install: 允许 exact package-manager peer links back to the trusted OpenClaw host package 期间 install 安全 scans while continuing to block spoofed 或 nested escaping `node_modules` symlinks. Carries forward #70819. Thanks @fgabelmannjr.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/install: allow exact package-manager peer links back to the trusted OpenClaw host package during install security scans while continuing to block spoofed or nested escaping `node_modules` symlinks. Carries forward #70819. Thanks @fgabelmannjr.

changes.title: 插件/install: 解决 插件 install destinations 从 the active profile state dir across CLI, ClawHub, marketplace, local 路径, 和 channel setup installs, so `openclaw --profile <name> 插件 install ...` no longer writes 进入 the default profile. 修复 #69960; carries forward #69971. Thanks @FrancisLyman 和 @Sanjays2402.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/install: resolve plugin install destinations from the active profile state dir across CLI, ClawHub, marketplace, local path, and channel setup installs, so `openclaw --profile <name> plugins install ...` no longer writes into the default profile. Fixes #69960; carries forward #69971. Thanks @FrancisLyman and @Sanjays2402.

changes.title: 插件/registry: suppress duplicate-插件 startup warnings 当 a tracked npm-installed 插件 intentionally overrides the bundled 插件 使用 the same id. Carries forward #48673. Thanks @abdushsk.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/registry: suppress duplicate-plugin startup warnings when a tracked npm-installed plugin intentionally overrides the bundled plugin with the same id. Carries forward #48673. Thanks @abdushsk.

changes.title: 插件/startup: 复用 canonical realpath lookups throughout each 插件 discovery pass, including package 和 manifest boundary checks, so Windows npm-global startups no longer repeat expensive 路径 resolution 为了 the same 插件 roots. 修复 #65733. Thanks @welfo-beo.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/startup: reuse canonical realpath lookups throughout each plugin discovery pass, including package and manifest boundary checks, so Windows npm-global startups no longer repeat expensive path resolution for the same plugin roots. Fixes #65733. Thanks @welfo-beo.

changes.title: 网关/代理: pass `ALL_PROXY` / `all_proxy` 进入 the global Undici env-代理 dispatcher 和 provider 代理-fetch helper while keeping SSRF trusted-代理 auto-upgrade 在 `HTTP_PROXY` / `HTTPS_PROXY` only, so 网关/provider calls honor all-代理 setups 不适用 weakening guarded fetches. 修复 #43821; carries forward #43919. Thanks @RickyTong1.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/proxy: pass `ALL_PROXY` / `all_proxy` into the global Undici env-proxy dispatcher and provider proxy-fetch helper while keeping SSRF trusted-proxy auto-upgrade on `HTTP_PROXY` / `HTTPS_PROXY` only, so gateway/provider calls honor all-proxy setups without weakening guarded fetches. Fixes #43821; carries forward #43919. Thanks @RickyTong1.

changes.title: Providers/LiteLLM: honor `--custom-base-url` 期间 non-interactive API-密钥 onboarding 不适用 adding 代理 discovery side effects, so scripted remote LiteLLM setup keeps the requested endpoint 而不是 falling back to localhost. Carries forward #66160. Thanks @dongs0104.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/LiteLLM: honor `--custom-base-url` during non-interactive API-key onboarding without adding proxy discovery side effects, so scripted remote LiteLLM setup keeps the requested endpoint instead of falling back to localhost. Carries forward #66160. Thanks @dongs0104.

changes.title: Reply/link understanding: keep media 和 link preprocessing 在 stable runtime entrypoints 和 continue 使用 raw message content if optional enrichment fails, so URL-bearing messages are no longer dropped 之后 stale runtime chunk upgrades. 修复 #68466. Thanks @songshikang0111.
changes.rawTitle: Reply/link understanding: keep media and link preprocessing on stable runtime entrypoints and continue with raw message content if optional enrichment fails, so URL-bearing messages are no longer dropped after stale runtime chunk upgrades. Fixes #68466. Thanks @songshikang0111.

changes.title: Discord: persist routed 模型-picker overrides 当 the hidden `/模型` dispatch succeeds 但是 the bound thread session store is still stale, including LM Studio suffixed 模型 ids. Carries forward #61473. Thanks @Nanako0129.
changes.rawTitle: Discord: persist routed model-picker overrides when the hidden `/model` dispatch succeeds but the bound thread session store is still stale, including LM Studio suffixed model ids. Carries forward #61473. Thanks @Nanako0129.

changes.title: Nodes/CLI: 添加 `openclaw nodes 移除 --node <id|name|ip>` 和 `node.pair.移除` so stale 网关-owned node pairing records can be cleaned 不适用 hand-editing state files.
changes.rawTitle: Nodes/CLI: add `openclaw nodes remove --node <id|name|ip>` and `node.pair.remove` so stale gateway-owned node pairing records can be cleaned without hand-editing state files.

changes.title: 网关: include the connecting client 和 fresh presence version 在 the initial `hello-ok` snapshot, so clients no longer need a follow-up event 之前 seeing themselves online.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway: include the connecting client and fresh presence version in the initial `hello-ok` snapshot, so clients no longer need a follow-up event before seeing themselves online.

changes.title: Docker: install the CA certificate bundle 在 the slim runtime image so HTTPS calls 从 containerized gateways no longer fail TLS setup 之后 the `bookworm-slim` base switch. 修复 #72787. Thanks @ryuhaneul.
changes.rawTitle: Docker: install the CA certificate bundle in the slim runtime image so HTTPS calls from containerized gateways no longer fail TLS setup after the `bookworm-slim` base switch. Fixes #72787. Thanks @ryuhaneul.

changes.title: Providers/OpenRouter: 移除 retired Hunter Alpha 和 Healer Alpha static catalog rows 和 禁用 代理 reasoning injection 为了 stale Hunter Alpha configs, so replies are not hidden 当 OpenRouter returns answer text 在 reasoning fields. 修复 #43942. Thanks @EvanDataForge.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/OpenRouter: remove retired Hunter Alpha and Healer Alpha static catalog rows and disable proxy reasoning injection for stale Hunter Alpha configs, so replies are not hidden when OpenRouter returns answer text in reasoning fields. Fixes #43942. Thanks @EvanDataForge.

changes.title: Providers/reasoning: let Groq 和 LM Studio declare provider-native reasoning effort values, so Qwen thinking 模型 receive `none`/`default` 或 `off`/`在` 而不是 OpenAI-only `low`/`medium` values. 修复 #32638. Thanks @Aqu1bp, @mgoulart, @Norpps, 和 @BSTail.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/reasoning: let Groq and LM Studio declare provider-native reasoning effort values, so Qwen thinking models receive `none`/`default` or `off`/`on` instead of OpenAI-only `low`/`medium` values. Fixes #32638. Thanks @Aqu1bp, @mgoulart, @Norpps, and @BSTail.

changes.title: Local 模型: default custom providers 使用 only `baseUrl` to the Chat Completions adapter 和 trust loopback 模型 requests automatically, so local OpenAI-compatible proxies receive `/v1/chat/completions` 不适用 timing out. 修复 #40024. Thanks @parachuteshe.
changes.rawTitle: Local models: default custom providers with only `baseUrl` to the Chat Completions adapter and trust loopback model requests automatically, so local OpenAI-compatible proxies receive `/v1/chat/completions` without timing out. Fixes #40024. Thanks @parachuteshe.

changes.title: Channels/message 工具: surface Discord, Slack, 和 Mattermost `user:`/`channel:` target syntax 在 the shared message target schema 和 Discord ambiguity errors, so DM sends 通过 numeric id 停止 burning retries 之前 finding `user:<id>`. 修复 #72401. Thanks @garyd9, @hclsys, 和 @praveen9354.
changes.rawTitle: Channels/message tool: surface Discord, Slack, and Mattermost `user:`/`channel:` target syntax in the shared message target schema and Discord ambiguity errors, so DM sends by numeric id stop burning retries before finding `user:<id>`. Fixes #72401. Thanks @garyd9, @hclsys, and @praveen9354.

changes.title: Agent/tools: scope 工具-loop detection history to the active run 当 available, so scheduled heartbeat cycles no longer inherit stale repeated-call counts 从 previous runs. 修复 #40144. Thanks @mattbrown319.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/tools: scope tool-loop detection history to the active run when available, so scheduled heartbeat cycles no longer inherit stale repeated-call counts from previous runs. Fixes #40144. Thanks @mattbrown319.

changes.title: Agent/subagents: 保留 requester delivery 为了 completion announces 当 a child Agent is bound to a different channel account while keeping same-channel thread completions routed to the child thread. Thanks @sfuminya.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/subagents: preserve requester delivery for completion announces when a child agent is bound to a different channel account while keeping same-channel thread completions routed to the child thread. Thanks @sfuminya.

changes.title: Agent/subagents: fail closed 而不是 selecting a single child thread binding 当 completion delivery lacks requester conversation Signal. Thanks @suyua9.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/subagents: fail closed instead of selecting a single child thread binding when completion delivery lacks requester conversation signal. Thanks @suyua9.

changes.title: Agent/status: persist the post-compaction 令牌 estimate 从 auto-compaction 当 providers omit usage metadata, so `/status` 和 session lists keep showing fresh context usage 之后 compaction. 修复 #67667; carries forward #72822. Thanks @Jimmy-xuzimo 和 @skylight-9.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/status: persist the post-compaction token estimate from auto-compaction when providers omit usage metadata, so `/status` and session lists keep showing fresh context usage after compaction. Fixes #67667; carries forward #72822. Thanks @Jimmy-xuzimo and @skylight-9.

changes.title: Control 界面: show loading, reload, 和 重试 states 当 a lazy dashboard panel cannot load 之后 an upgrade, so the Logs tab no longer appears blank 在 stale 浏览器 bundles. 修复 #72450. Thanks @sobergou.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI: show loading, reload, and retry states when a lazy dashboard panel cannot load after an upgrade, so the Logs tab no longer appears blank on stale browser bundles. Fixes #72450. Thanks @sobergou.

changes.title: 网关/插件: start the 网关 在 degraded mode 当 a single 插件 entry has invalid schema 配置, 和 let `openclaw 诊断工具 --修复` quarantine that 插件 配置 而不是 崩溃-looping every channel. 修复 #62976 和 #70371. Thanks @Doraemon-Claw 和 @pksidekyk.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/plugins: start the Gateway in degraded mode when a single plugin entry has invalid schema config, and let `openclaw doctor --fix` quarantine that plugin config instead of crash-looping every channel. Fixes #62976 and #70371. Thanks @Doraemon-Claw and @pksidekyk.

changes.title: Agent/插件: skip malformed 插件 tools 使用 missing schema objects 和 report 插件 diagnostics, so one broken 工具 no longer crashes Anthropic Agent runs. 修复 #69423. Thanks @jmnickels.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/plugins: skip malformed plugin tools with missing schema objects and report plugin diagnostics, so one broken tool no longer crashes Anthropic agent runs. Fixes #69423. Thanks @jmnickels.

changes.title: Agent/reasoning: recover fully wrapped unclosed `<think>` replies that would otherwise sanitize to empty text while keeping strict stripping 为了 closed reasoning blocks 和 unclosed tails 之后 visible text. 修复 #37696; supersedes #51915. Thanks @druide67 和 @okuyam2y.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/reasoning: recover fully wrapped unclosed `<think>` replies that would otherwise sanitize to empty text while keeping strict stripping for closed reasoning blocks and unclosed tails after visible text. Fixes #37696; supersedes #51915. Thanks @druide67 and @okuyam2y.

changes.title: Control 界面/网关: bind WebChat handshakes to their active socket 和 reject post-close server registrations, so aborted connects no longer leave zombie clients 或 misleading duplicate WebSocket connection logs. 修复 #72753. Thanks @LumenFromTheFuture.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/Gateway: bind WebChat handshakes to their active socket and reject post-close server registrations, so aborted connects no longer leave zombie clients or misleading duplicate WebSocket connection logs. Fixes #72753. Thanks @LumenFromTheFuture.

changes.title: Agent/fallback: split ambiguous provider failures 进入 `empty_response`, `no_error_details`, 和 `unclassified`, 和 添加 flat fallback-step fields to structured fallback logs so primary-模型 failures stay visible 当 later fallbacks also fail. 修复 #71922; refs #71744. Thanks @andyk-ms 和 @nikolaykazakovvs-ux.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/fallback: split ambiguous provider failures into `empty_response`, `no_error_details`, and `unclassified`, and add flat fallback-step fields to structured fallback logs so primary-model failures stay visible when later fallbacks also fail. Fixes #71922; refs #71744. Thanks @andyk-ms and @nikolaykazakovvs-ux.

changes.title: 网关/startup: 复用 the 插件 manifest registry inside 配置 validation so restrictive 插件 allowlists 避免 a duplicate manifest pass 期间 startup. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/startup: reuse the plugin manifest registry inside config validation so restrictive plugin allowlists avoid a duplicate manifest pass during startup. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: 网关/startup: run 插件 auto-启用 从 authored source 配置 和 skip disabled setup probes, avoiding runtime-default 插件 allowlist writes 和 a second 配置 snapshot read 期间 startup. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/startup: run plugin auto-enable from authored source config and skip disabled setup probes, avoiding runtime-default plugin allowlist writes and a second config snapshot read during startup. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: 插件/Windows: normalize Windows absolute paths 之前 handing bundled 插件 modules to Jiti, so 飞书/Lark message sending no longer fails 使用 unsupported `c:` ESM loader URLs. 修复 #72783. Thanks @jackychen-png.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/Windows: normalize Windows absolute paths before handing bundled plugin modules to Jiti, so Feishu/Lark message sending no longer fails with unsupported `c:` ESM loader URLs. Fixes #72783. Thanks @jackychen-png.

changes.title: CLI/诊断工具: run bundled 插件 runtime-dependency repairs through the async npm installer 使用 spinner/line progress 和 heartbeat updates, so long `openclaw 诊断工具 --修复` installs no longer look hung 在 TTY 或 piped output. 修复 #72775. Thanks @dfpalhano.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/doctor: run bundled plugin runtime-dependency repairs through the async npm installer with spinner/line progress and heartbeat updates, so long `openclaw doctor --fix` installs no longer look hung in TTY or piped output. Fixes #72775. Thanks @dfpalhano.

changes.title: 飞书/Windows: normalize bundled channel sidecar loads 之前 Jiti evaluates them, so 飞书 outbound sends no longer fail 使用 raw `C:` ESM loader errors 在 Windows. 修复 #72783. Thanks @jackychen-png.
changes.rawTitle: Feishu/Windows: normalize bundled channel sidecar loads before Jiti evaluates them, so Feishu outbound sends no longer fail with raw `C:` ESM loader errors on Windows. Fixes #72783. Thanks @jackychen-png.

changes.title: Agent/tools: ignore volatile `exec` runtime metadata 当 comparing 工具-loop outcomes, so enabled loop detection can 停止 repeated identical shell-命令 results 而不是 resetting 在 duration, PID, session, 或 cwd changes. 修复 #34574; supersedes #41502. Thanks @gucasbrg 和 @Zcg2021.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/tools: ignore volatile `exec` runtime metadata when comparing tool-loop outcomes, so enabled loop detection can stop repeated identical shell-command results instead of resetting on duration, PID, session, or cwd changes. Fixes #34574; supersedes #41502. Thanks @gucasbrg and @Zcg2021.

changes.title: Agent/fallback: classify internal live-session 模型 switch conflicts as unknown fallback failures 而不是 provider overloads, preventing local vLLM endpoints 从 receiving misleading overloaded cooldowns. Refs #63229. Thanks @clawdia-lobster.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/fallback: classify internal live-session model switch conflicts as unknown fallback failures instead of provider overloads, preventing local vLLM endpoints from receiving misleading overloaded cooldowns. Refs #63229. Thanks @clawdia-lobster.

changes.title: Discord: let thread sessions inherit the parent channel's session-level `/模型` override as a 模型-only fallback 不适用 enabling parent transcript inheritance. 修复 #72755. Thanks @solavrc.
changes.rawTitle: Discord: let thread sessions inherit the parent channel's session-level `/model` override as a model-only fallback without enabling parent transcript inheritance. Fixes #72755. Thanks @solavrc.

changes.title: 网关/插件: skip stale configured channels whose matching 插件 is no longer discoverable, point cleanup at `openclaw 诊断工具 --修复`, 和 keep unrelated channel typos fatal so one missing channel 插件 no longer 崩溃-loops the 网关. 修复 #53311. Thanks @futhgar.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/plugins: skip stale configured channels whose matching plugin is no longer discoverable, point cleanup at `openclaw doctor --fix`, and keep unrelated channel typos fatal so one missing channel plugin no longer crash-loops the Gateway. Fixes #53311. Thanks @futhgar.

changes.title: Control 界面: keep session-specific assistant identity loads authoritative 之后 WebSocket connect, so non-main Agent chat sessions do not show the main Agent name 在 the header 之后 bootstrap refreshes. 修复 #72776. Thanks @rockytian-top.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI: keep session-specific assistant identity loads authoritative after WebSocket connect, so non-main agent chat sessions do not show the main agent name in the header after bootstrap refreshes. Fixes #72776. Thanks @rockytian-top.

changes.title: Agent/Qwen: 保留 exact custom `modelstudio` provider configs 使用 foreign `API` owners so explicit OpenAI-compatible 模型 Studio endpoints no longer get normalized 进入 the bundled Qwen 插件 路径. 修复 #64483. Thanks @FiredMosquito831.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/Qwen: preserve exact custom `modelstudio` provider configs with foreign `api` owners so explicit OpenAI-compatible Model Studio endpoints no longer get normalized into the bundled Qwen plugin path. Fixes #64483. Thanks @FiredMosquito831.

changes.title: MCP协议/bundle-MCP协议: normalize CLI-native `type: "http"` MCP协议 server entries to OpenClaw `transport: "streamable-http"` 在 save, repair existing configs 使用 诊断工具, 和 keep embedded Pi 从 falling back to legacy SSE GET-first startup 为了 those servers. 修复 #72757. Thanks @Studioscale.
changes.rawTitle: MCP/bundle-mcp: normalize CLI-native `type: "http"` MCP server entries to OpenClaw `transport: "streamable-http"` on save, repair existing configs with doctor, and keep embedded Pi from falling back to legacy SSE GET-first startup for those servers. Fixes #72757. Thanks @Studioscale.

changes.title: OpenCode: expose Anthropic Opus/Sonnet 4.x thinking levels 为了 proxied Claude 模型, so `/think xhigh`, `/think adaptive`, 和 `/think max` validate consistently 使用 the direct Anthropic provider. 修复 #72729. Thanks @haishmg 和 @aaajiao.
changes.rawTitle: OpenCode: expose Anthropic Opus/Sonnet 4.x thinking levels for proxied Claude models, so `/think xhigh`, `/think adaptive`, and `/think max` validate consistently with the direct Anthropic provider. Fixes #72729. Thanks @haishmg and @aaajiao.

changes.title: Media-understanding/audio: migrate deprecated `{input}` placeholders 在 legacy `audio.transcription.命令` configs to `{{MediaPath}}`, so custom audio transcribers no longer receive the literal placeholder 之后 诊断工具 repair. 修复 #72760. Thanks @krisfanue3-hash.
changes.rawTitle: Media-understanding/audio: migrate deprecated `{input}` placeholders in legacy `audio.transcription.command` configs to `{{MediaPath}}`, so custom audio transcribers no longer receive the literal placeholder after doctor repair. Fixes #72760. Thanks @krisfanue3-hash.

changes.title: Ollama/WSL2: warn 当 GPU-backed WSL2 installs combine CUDA visibility 使用 an autostarting `ollama.service` using `Restart=always`, 和 document the systemd, `.wslconfig`, 和 keep-alive mitigation 为了 崩溃 loops. Carries forward #61022; 修复 #61185. Thanks @yhyatt.
changes.rawTitle: Ollama/WSL2: warn when GPU-backed WSL2 installs combine CUDA visibility with an autostarting `ollama.service` using `Restart=always`, and document the systemd, `.wslconfig`, and keep-alive mitigation for crash loops. Carries forward #61022; fixes #61185. Thanks @yhyatt.

changes.title: Ollama/onboarding: de-dupe suggested bare local 模型 against installed `:latest` tags 和 skip redundant pulls, so setup shows the installed 模型 once 和 no longer says it is downloading an already available 模型. 修复 #68952. Thanks @tleyden.
changes.rawTitle: Ollama/onboarding: de-dupe suggested bare local models against installed `:latest` tags and skip redundant pulls, so setup shows the installed model once and no longer says it is downloading an already available model. Fixes #68952. Thanks @tleyden.

changes.title: 内存-core/诊断工具: keep `诊断工具.内存.status` 在 the cached 路径 通过 default 和 only run live embedding pings 为了 explicit deep probes, preventing slow local embedding backends 从 blocking 网关 status checks. 修复 #71568. Thanks @apex-system.
changes.rawTitle: Memory-core/doctor: keep `doctor.memory.status` on the cached path by default and only run live embedding pings for explicit deep probes, preventing slow local embedding backends from blocking Gateway status checks. Fixes #71568. Thanks @apex-system.

changes.title: 内存/QMD: group same-source collections 进入 one QMD search invocation 当 the installed QMD supports multiple `-c` filters, while keeping older QMD builds 在 the per-collection fallback. 修复 #72484; supersedes #72485 和 #69583. Thanks @BsnizND 和 @zeroaltitude.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/QMD: group same-source collections into one QMD search invocation when the installed QMD supports multiple `-c` filters, while keeping older QMD builds on the per-collection fallback. Fixes #72484; supersedes #72485 and #69583. Thanks @BsnizND and @zeroaltitude.

changes.title: 内存/QMD: accept QMD status vector-count variants such as `Vectors = 42`, `Vectors:42`, 和 `Vectors: 42 embedded`, so `内存 status --deep` no longer reports embeddings unavailable 为了 healthy QMD wrappers. 修复 #63652; carries forward #63678. Thanks @apoapostolov 和 @WarrenJones.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/QMD: accept QMD status vector-count variants such as `Vectors = 42`, `Vectors:42`, and `Vectors: 42 embedded`, so `memory status --deep` no longer reports embeddings unavailable for healthy QMD wrappers. Fixes #63652; carries forward #63678. Thanks @apoapostolov and @WarrenJones.

changes.title: 内存/QMD: skip QMD vector status probes 和 embedding maintenance 在 lexical `searchMode: "search"`, so BM25-only QMD setups 在 ARM do not trigger llama.cpp/Vulkan builds 期间 status checks 或 embed cycles. 修复 #59234 和 #67113. Thanks @PrinceOfEgypt, @Vksh07, @Snipe76, @NomLom, @t4r3e2q1-commits, 和 @dmak.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/QMD: skip QMD vector status probes and embedding maintenance in lexical `searchMode: "search"`, so BM25-only QMD setups on ARM do not trigger llama.cpp/Vulkan builds during status checks or embed cycles. Fixes #59234 and #67113. Thanks @PrinceOfEgypt, @Vksh07, @Snipe76, @NomLom, @t4r3e2q1-commits, and @dmak.

changes.title: 内存/QMD: report the live watcher dirty state 在 内存 status, so changed QMD-backed 内存 files show as dirty until the queued sync finishes. 修复 #60244. Thanks @xinzf.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/QMD: report the live watcher dirty state in memory status, so changed QMD-backed memory files show as dirty until the queued sync finishes. Fixes #60244. Thanks @xinzf.

changes.title: Compaction: skip oversized pre-compaction checkpoint snapshots 和 prune duplicate long user turns 从 compaction input 和 rotated successor transcripts, preventing 重试 storms 从 being preserved across checkpoint cycles. 修复 #72780. Thanks @SweetSophia.
changes.rawTitle: Compaction: skip oversized pre-compaction checkpoint snapshots and prune duplicate long user turns from compaction input and rotated successor transcripts, preventing retry storms from being preserved across checkpoint cycles. Fixes #72780. Thanks @SweetSophia.

changes.title: Control 界面/Cron: render cron job prompts 和 run summaries as sanitized markdown 在 the dashboard, 使用 full-width block content, safer link clicks, 和 no duplicate 错误 text 当 a failed run has no summary. Supersedes #48504. Thanks @garethdaine.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/Cron: render cron job prompts and run summaries as sanitized markdown in the dashboard, with full-width block content, safer link clicks, and no duplicate error text when a failed run has no summary. Supersedes #48504. Thanks @garethdaine.

changes.title: Control 界面/网关: 保留 WebChat client version labels across localhost, 127.0.0.1, 和 IPv6 loopback aliases 在 the same port, avoiding misleading `vcontrol-界面` connection logs while investigating duplicate-message reports. Refs #72753 和 #72742. Thanks @LumenFromTheFuture 和 @allesgutefy.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/Gateway: preserve WebChat client version labels across localhost, 127.0.0.1, and IPv6 loopback aliases on the same port, avoiding misleading `vcontrol-ui` connection logs while investigating duplicate-message reports. Refs #72753 and #72742. Thanks @LumenFromTheFuture and @allesgutefy.

changes.title: Agent/reasoning: treat orphan closing reasoning tags 使用 following answer text as a privacy boundary across delivery, history, streaming, 和 Control 界面 sanitizers so malformed local-模型 output cannot leak chain-的-thought text. 修复 #67092. Thanks @AnildoSilva.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/reasoning: treat orphan closing reasoning tags with following answer text as a privacy boundary across delivery, history, streaming, and Control UI sanitizers so malformed local-model output cannot leak chain-of-thought text. Fixes #67092. Thanks @AnildoSilva.

changes.title: 内存-core: run one-shot 内存 CLI commands through transient builtin 和 QMD managers so `内存 index`, `内存 status --index`, 和 `内存 search` no longer start long-lived file watchers that can hit macOS `EMFILE` limits. 修复 #59101; carries forward #49851. Thanks @mbear469210-coder 和 @maoyuanxue.
changes.rawTitle: Memory-core: run one-shot memory CLI commands through transient builtin and QMD managers so `memory index`, `memory status --index`, and `memory search` no longer start long-lived file watchers that can hit macOS `EMFILE` limits. Fixes #59101; carries forward #49851. Thanks @mbear469210-coder and @maoyuanxue.

changes.title: Agent/ACP: ship the Claude ACP adapter 使用 OpenClaw 和 require Claude result messages 之前 idle can complete a prompt, preventing parent Agent 从 waking early 在 long-running `sessions_spawn(runtime: "acp", agentId: "claude")` children. 修复 #72080. Thanks @siavash-saki 和 @iannwu.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/ACP: ship the Claude ACP adapter with OpenClaw and require Claude result messages before idle can complete a prompt, preventing parent agents from waking early on long-running `sessions_spawn(runtime: "acp", agentId: "claude")` children. Fixes #72080. Thanks @siavash-saki and @iannwu.

changes.title: CLI/tasks: route `tasks --json`, `tasks list --json`, 和 `tasks audit --json` through a lean JSON 路径 so read-only task inspection no longer loads unrelated 插件/runtime 命令 graphs. 修复 #66238. Thanks @ChuckChambers.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/tasks: route `tasks --json`, `tasks list --json`, and `tasks audit --json` through a lean JSON path so read-only task inspection no longer loads unrelated plugin/runtime command graphs. Fixes #66238. Thanks @ChuckChambers.

changes.title: 内存-core: re-解决 the active runtime 配置 whenever `memory_search` 或 `memory_get` executes, so provider changes made 通过 `配置.patch` 停止 leaving stale embedding backends behind 在 existing 工具 instances. 修复 #61098. Thanks @BradGroux 和 @Linux2010.
changes.rawTitle: Memory-core: re-resolve the active runtime config whenever `memory_search` or `memory_get` executes, so provider changes made by `config.patch` stop leaving stale embedding backends behind in existing tool instances. Fixes #61098. Thanks @BradGroux and @Linux2010.

changes.title: WebChat: keep bare `/new` 和 `/reset` startup instructions out 的 visible chat history while preserving `/reset <note>` as user-visible transcript text. 修复 #72369. Thanks @collynes 和 @haishmg.
changes.rawTitle: WebChat: keep bare `/new` and `/reset` startup instructions out of visible chat history while preserving `/reset <note>` as user-visible transcript text. Fixes #72369. Thanks @collynes and @haishmg.

changes.title: Tasks/内存: checkpoint 和 truncate SQLite WAL sidecars 在 a timer 和 之前 close 为了 task, Task Flow, 代理 capture, 和 builtin 内存 databases, bounding long-running 网关 `*.sqlite-wal` growth. 修复 #72774. Thanks @dfpalhano.
changes.rawTitle: Tasks/memory: checkpoint and truncate SQLite WAL sidecars on a timer and before close for task, Task Flow, proxy capture, and builtin memory databases, bounding long-running gateway `*.sqlite-wal` growth. Fixes #72774. Thanks @dfpalhano.

changes.title: CLI/诊断工具: 移除 dangling channel 配置, heartbeat targets, 和 channel 模型 overrides 当 stale 插件 repair removes a missing channel 插件, preventing 网关 boot loops 之后 failed 插件 reinstalls. 修复 #65293. Thanks @yidecode.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/doctor: remove dangling channel config, heartbeat targets, and channel model overrides when stale plugin repair removes a missing channel plugin, preventing Gateway boot loops after failed plugin reinstalls. Fixes #65293. Thanks @yidecode.

changes.title: Control 界面/网关: cache, coalesce, stale-refresh, 和 invalidate effective 工具 inventory 在 channel registry changes while reusing the 网关-bound 插件 registry 和 avoiding 模型/认证 discovery, so chat runs no longer stall Control 界面 requests 在 repeated 插件/模型 setup. 修复 #72365; supersedes #72558. Thanks @Gabiii2398 和 @1yihui.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/Gateway: cache, coalesce, stale-refresh, and invalidate effective tool inventory on channel registry changes while reusing the gateway-bound plugin registry and avoiding model/auth discovery, so chat runs no longer stall Control UI requests on repeated plugin/model setup. Fixes #72365; supersedes #72558. Thanks @Gabiii2398 and @1yihui.

changes.title: Channels/setup: treat bundled channel 插件 as already bundled 期间 `channels 添加` 和 onboarding, enabling them 不适用 writing redundant `插件.load.paths` entries 或 路径 install records. 修复 #72740. Thanks @iCodePoet.
changes.rawTitle: Channels/setup: treat bundled channel plugins as already bundled during `channels add` and onboarding, enabling them without writing redundant `plugins.load.paths` entries or path install records. Fixes #72740. Thanks @iCodePoet.

changes.title: WhatsApp: honor 网关 `HTTPS_PROXY` / `HTTP_PROXY` env vars 为了 QR-login WebSocket connections, while respecting `NO_PROXY`, so proxied networks no longer fall back to direct `mmg.WhatsApp.net` connections that time out 使用 408. 修复 #72547; supersedes #72692. Thanks @mebusw 和 @SymbolStar.
changes.rawTitle: WhatsApp: honor gateway `HTTPS_PROXY` / `HTTP_PROXY` env vars for QR-login WebSocket connections, while respecting `NO_PROXY`, so proxied networks no longer fall back to direct `mmg.whatsapp.net` connections that time out with 408. Fixes #72547; supersedes #72692. Thanks @mebusw and @SymbolStar.

changes.title: Bonjour: default mDNS advertisements to the system hostname 当 it is DNS-safe, avoiding `openclaw.local` probing conflicts 和 网关 restart loops 在 hosts such as `Lobster` 或 `ubuntu`. 修复 #72355 和 #72689; supersedes #72694. Thanks @mscheuerlein-bot, @gcusms, @moyuwuhen601, @pavan987, @zml-0912, @hhq365, 和 @SymbolStar.
changes.rawTitle: Bonjour: default mDNS advertisements to the system hostname when it is DNS-safe, avoiding `openclaw.local` probing conflicts and Gateway restart loops on hosts such as `Lobster` or `ubuntu`. Fixes #72355 and #72689; supersedes #72694. Thanks @mscheuerlein-bot, @gcusms, @moyuwuhen601, @pavan987, @zml-0912, @hhq365, and @SymbolStar.

changes.title: Agent/OpenAI-compatible: 重试 replay-safe empty `停止` turns once 为了 `OpenAI-completions` endpoints, so transient empty local backend responses no longer surface as “Agent couldn't generate a response” 当 a continuation succeeds, 和 restore `openclaw Agent --模型` 为了 one-shot CLI runs. 修复 #72751. Thanks @moooV252.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/OpenAI-compatible: retry replay-safe empty `stop` turns once for `openai-completions` endpoints, so transient empty local backend responses no longer surface as “Agent couldn't generate a response” when a continuation succeeds, and restore `openclaw agent --model` for one-shot CLI runs. Fixes #72751. Thanks @moooV252.

changes.title: Git hooks: skip ignored staged paths 当 formatting 和 restaging pre-commit files, so merge commits no longer abort 当 `.gitignore` newly ignores staged merged content. 修复 #72744. Thanks @100yenadmin.
changes.rawTitle: Git hooks: skip ignored staged paths when formatting and restaging pre-commit files, so merge commits no longer abort when `.gitignore` newly ignores staged merged content. Fixes #72744. Thanks @100yenadmin.

changes.title: 内存-core/dreaming: 添加 a supported `dreaming.模型` knob 为了 Dream Diary narrative subagents, wired through phase 配置 和 the existing 插件 subagent 模型-override trust gate. Refs #65963. Thanks @esqandil 和 @mjamiv.
changes.rawTitle: Memory-core/dreaming: add a supported `dreaming.model` knob for Dream Diary narrative subagents, wired through phase config and the existing plugin subagent model-override trust gate. Refs #65963. Thanks @esqandil and @mjamiv.

changes.title: Agent/Anthropic: 移除 trailing assistant prefill payloads 当 extended thinking is enabled, so Opus 4.7/Sonnet 4.6 requests do not fail Anthropic's user-final-turn validation. 修复 #72739. Thanks @superandylin.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/Anthropic: remove trailing assistant prefill payloads when extended thinking is enabled, so Opus 4.7/Sonnet 4.6 requests do not fail Anthropic's user-final-turn validation. Fixes #72739. Thanks @superandylin.

changes.title: Agent/vLLM/Qwen: 添加 插件-owned Qwen thinking controls 为了 vLLM chat-template kwargs 和 DashScope-style top-level `enable_thinking` flags, including preserved thinking 为了 Agent loops. 修复 #72329. Thanks @stavrostzagadouris.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/vLLM/Qwen: add plugin-owned Qwen thinking controls for vLLM chat-template kwargs and DashScope-style top-level `enable_thinking` flags, including preserved thinking for agent loops. Fixes #72329. Thanks @stavrostzagadouris.

changes.title: 内存-core/dreaming: treat request-scoped narrative fallback as expected, skip session cleanup 当 no subagent run was created, 和 移除 duplicate phase-level cleanup so fallback no longer emits warning noise. 修复 #67152. Thanks @jsompis.
changes.rawTitle: Memory-core/dreaming: treat request-scoped narrative fallback as expected, skip session cleanup when no subagent run was created, and remove duplicate phase-level cleanup so fallback no longer emits warning noise. Fixes #67152. Thanks @jsompis.

changes.title: Agent/exec: apply configured `tools.exec.timeoutSec` to background, `yieldMs`, 和 node `system.run` commands 当 no per-call 超时 is set, preventing auto-backgrounded 和 remote node commands 从 running indefinitely. 修复 #67600; supersedes #67603. Thanks @dlmpx 和 @kagura-Agent.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/exec: apply configured `tools.exec.timeoutSec` to background, `yieldMs`, and node `system.run` commands when no per-call timeout is set, preventing auto-backgrounded and remote node commands from running indefinitely. Fixes #67600; supersedes #67603. Thanks @dlmpx and @kagura-agent.

changes.title: 配置/诊断工具: 停止 masking unknown-密钥 validation diagnostics such as `Agent.defaults.llm`, 和 have `openclaw 诊断工具 --修复` 移除 the retired `Agent.defaults.llm` 超时 block. Thanks @aidiffuser.
changes.rawTitle: Config/doctor: stop masking unknown-key validation diagnostics such as `agents.defaults.llm`, and have `openclaw doctor --fix` remove the retired `agents.defaults.llm` timeout block. Thanks @aidiffuser.

changes.title: CLI/startup: keep the built pre-dispatch CLI graph free 的 package-level imports 和 extend packaged CLI smoke coverage to onboard 和 诊断工具 help paths, preventing missing runtime dependencies such as tslog 从 killing onboarding 之前 repair code can run. 修复 #63024. Thanks @hu19940121.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/startup: keep the built pre-dispatch CLI graph free of package-level imports and extend packaged CLI smoke coverage to onboard and doctor help paths, preventing missing runtime dependencies such as tslog from killing onboarding before repair code can run. Fixes #63024. Thanks @hu19940121.

changes.title: CLI/插件: 保留 unversioned ClawHub install specs so `插件 更新` can follow newer ClawHub releases 而不是 pinning to the initially resolved version. 修复 #63010; supersedes #58426. Thanks @kangsen1234 和 @robinspt.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/plugins: preserve unversioned ClawHub install specs so `plugins update` can follow newer ClawHub releases instead of pinning to the initially resolved version. Fixes #63010; supersedes #58426. Thanks @kangsen1234 and @robinspt.

changes.title: 内存-core/subagents: tag 插件-created subagent sessions 使用 their 插件 owner so dreaming narrative cleanup can delete its own ephemeral sessions 不适用 granting broad admin session deletion. 修复 #72712. Thanks @BSG2000.
changes.rawTitle: Memory-core/subagents: tag plugin-created subagent sessions with their plugin owner so dreaming narrative cleanup can delete its own ephemeral sessions without granting broad admin session deletion. Fixes #72712. Thanks @BSG2000.

changes.rawTitle: Gateway/models: move local-provider pricing opt-outs, OpenRouter/LiteLLM aliases, and proxy passthrough pricing lookup into plugin manifest metadata so core no longer carries extension-specific pricing tables.

changes.title: CLI/更新: honor `OPENCLAW_NO_AUTO_UPDATE=1` as a 网关 startup kill-switch 为了 configured background package auto-updates, so operators can hold a deliberate downgrade 期间 incident recovery 不适用 editing 配置 first. 修复 #72715. Thanks @Xivi08.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/update: honor `OPENCLAW_NO_AUTO_UPDATE=1` as a gateway startup kill-switch for configured background package auto-updates, so operators can hold a deliberate downgrade during incident recovery without editing config first. Fixes #72715. Thanks @Xivi08.

changes.title: Agent/Claude CLI: force live-session launches to include `--output-format stream-json` whenever OpenClaw adds `--input-format stream-json`, so new Claude CLI sessions no longer fail immediately while reusable sessions keep working. 修复 #72206. Thanks @kwangwonkoh 和 @Xivi08.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/Claude CLI: force live-session launches to include `--output-format stream-json` whenever OpenClaw adds `--input-format stream-json`, so new Claude CLI sessions no longer fail immediately while reusable sessions keep working. Fixes #72206. Thanks @kwangwonkoh and @Xivi08.

changes.title: CLI/插件: accept ClawHub 插件 API wildcard ranges such as `*` 不适用 rejecting compatible 插件 installs, while still requiring a valid runtime API version. 修复 #56446; supersedes #56466. Thanks @darconada 和 @claygeo.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/plugins: accept ClawHub plugin API wildcard ranges such as `*` without rejecting compatible plugin installs, while still requiring a valid runtime API version. Fixes #56446; supersedes #56466. Thanks @darconada and @claygeo.

changes.title: CLI/插件: 添加 an explicit `npm:<package>` install prefix that skips ClawHub lookup 为了 known npm packages while keeping bare package specs ClawHub-first. 修复 #55805; supersedes #54377. Thanks @Zeoy2020 和 @vagusX.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/plugins: add an explicit `npm:<package>` install prefix that skips ClawHub lookup for known npm packages while keeping bare package specs ClawHub-first. Fixes #55805; supersedes #54377. Thanks @Zeoy2020 and @vagusX.

changes.title: CLI/插件: let 配置-gated bundled 插件 install 不适用 persisting invalid placeholder 配置 entries, so install/uninstall sweeps can cover 插件 such as 内存-lancedb 之前 the user configures credentials. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/plugins: let config-gated bundled plugins install without persisting invalid placeholder config entries, so install/uninstall sweeps can cover plugins such as memory-lancedb before the user configures credentials. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: CLI/插件: reject malformed ClawHub 插件 specs 使用 trailing `@` 之前 registry lookup, so empty-version typos report as invalid specs 而不是 package-not-found errors. 修复 #56579; supersedes #56582. Thanks @Kansodata.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/plugins: reject malformed ClawHub plugin specs with trailing `@` before registry lookup, so empty-version typos report as invalid specs instead of package-not-found errors. Fixes #56579; supersedes #56582. Thanks @Kansodata.

changes.title: Agent/sessions: acquire the session write lock only 之后 cold bootstrap, 插件, 和 工具 setup so fallback runs are not blocked 通过 stalled pre-模型 startup work.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/sessions: acquire the session write lock only after cold bootstrap, plugin, and tool setup so fallback runs are not blocked by stalled pre-model startup work.

changes.title: 浏览器/插件: auto-start the bundled 浏览器 插件 当 root `浏览器` 配置 is present, including restrictive 插件 allowlists, 和 ignore stale persisted 插件 registries whose package paths no longer exist.
changes.rawTitle: Browser/plugins: auto-start the bundled browser plugin when root `browser` config is present, including restrictive plugin allowlists, and ignore stale persisted plugin registries whose package paths no longer exist.

changes.title: 浏览器: circuit-break repeated managed Chrome launch failures per profile so 浏览器 requests 停止 spawning Chromium indefinitely 当 CDP cannot start. 修复 #64271. Thanks @TheophilusChinomona.
changes.rawTitle: Browser: circuit-break repeated managed Chrome launch failures per profile so browser requests stop spawning Chromium indefinitely when CDP cannot start. Fixes #64271. Thanks @TheophilusChinomona.

changes.title: 网关/模型: skip external OpenRouter 和 LiteLLM pricing refreshes 为了 local/self-hosted 模型 endpoints so startup does not wait 在 remote pricing catalogs 为了 local-only Ollama, vLLM, 和 compatible providers.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/models: skip external OpenRouter and LiteLLM pricing refreshes for local/self-hosted model endpoints so startup does not wait on remote pricing catalogs for local-only Ollama, vLLM, and compatible providers.

changes.title: CLI/插件: 停止 安全-blocked 插件 installs 从 retrying as hook packs, so normal 插件 packages report the scanner failure 不适用 a misleading "not a valid hook pack" follow-up. 修复 #61175; supersedes #64102. Thanks @KonsultDigital 和 @ziyincody.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/plugins: stop security-blocked plugin installs from retrying as hook packs, so normal plugin packages report the scanner failure without a misleading "not a valid hook pack" follow-up. Fixes #61175; supersedes #64102. Thanks @KonsultDigital and @ziyincody.

changes.title: Agent/Anthropic: strip stale trailing assistant prefill turns 从 outbound replay so context-engine short circuits cannot send unsupported assistant-prefill payloads to provider APIs. 修复 #72556. Thanks @Veda-openclaw.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/Anthropic: strip stale trailing assistant prefill turns from outbound replay so context-engine short circuits cannot send unsupported assistant-prefill payloads to provider APIs. Fixes #72556. Thanks @Veda-openclaw.

changes.title: Agent/Google: strip stale trailing assistant/模型 prefill turns 从 Gemini outbound replay so Google Generative AI requests end 使用 a user turn 或 function response. Follow-up to #72556. Thanks @Veda-openclaw.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/Google: strip stale trailing assistant/model prefill turns from Gemini outbound replay so Google Generative AI requests end with a user turn or function response. Follow-up to #72556. Thanks @Veda-openclaw.

changes.title: Control 界面/Dreaming: require explicit confirmation 之前 applying restart-impacting Dreaming mode changes, 使用 restart warning copy 和 loading feedback. 修复 #63804. (#63807) Thanks @bbddbb1.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/Dreaming: require explicit confirmation before applying restart-impacting Dreaming mode changes, with restart warning copy and loading feedback. Fixes #63804. (#63807) Thanks @bbddbb1.

changes.title: CLI/Agent: mark 网关-to-embedded fallback runs 使用 `meta.transport: "embedded"` 和 `meta.fallbackFrom: "网关"` 在 JSON output, 和 make the terminal diagnostic explicit so scripts 和 operators can distinguish fallback runs 从 网关 runs. 修复 #71416. Thanks @amknight.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/agent: mark Gateway-to-embedded fallback runs with `meta.transport: "embedded"` and `meta.fallbackFrom: "gateway"` in JSON output, and make the terminal diagnostic explicit so scripts and operators can distinguish fallback runs from Gateway runs. Fixes #71416. Thanks @amknight.

changes.title: Agent/tools: normalize `null` 或 missing 工具-call arguments to `{}` 为了 parameterless object schemas 之前 Pi validation, so empty-argument tools run 而不是 failing argument validation. 修复 #72587. Thanks @amknight.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/tools: normalize `null` or missing tool-call arguments to `{}` for parameterless object schemas before Pi validation, so empty-argument tools run instead of failing argument validation. Fixes #72587. Thanks @amknight.

changes.title: Agent/subagents: clear active embedded-run state 之前 terminal lifecycle events so post-completion cleanup no longer treats finished child runs as still active 和 skips archive 或 announcement bookkeeping. (#70187) Thanks @amknight.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/subagents: clear active embedded-run state before terminal lifecycle events so post-completion cleanup no longer treats finished child runs as still active and skips archive or announcement bookkeeping. (#70187) Thanks @amknight.

changes.title: CLI/更新: keep the automatic post-更新 completion refresh 在 the core-命令 tree so it no longer stages bundled 插件 runtime deps 之前 the 网关 restart 路径, avoiding `.24` 更新 hangs 和 1006 disconnect cascades. 修复 #72665. Thanks @sakalaboator 和 @He-Pin.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/update: keep the automatic post-update completion refresh on the core-command tree so it no longer stages bundled plugin runtime deps before the Gateway restart path, avoiding `.24` update hangs and 1006 disconnect cascades. Fixes #72665. Thanks @sakalaboator and @He-Pin.

changes.title: Control 界面: make explicit Reload 配置 actions discard stale local 配置 edits while passive refreshes 和 failed-save recovery keep pending drafts intact. 修复 #40352; carries forward #40443. Thanks @realmikechong-dotcom.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI: make explicit Reload Config actions discard stale local config edits while passive refreshes and failed-save recovery keep pending drafts intact. Fixes #40352; carries forward #40443. Thanks @realmikechong-dotcom.

changes.title: Agent/Bedrock: 停止 heartbeat runs 从 persisting blank user transcript turns 和 repair existing blank user text messages 之前 replay, preventing AWS Bedrock `ContentBlock` blank-text validation failures. 修复 #72640 和 #72622. Thanks @goldzulu.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/Bedrock: stop heartbeat runs from persisting blank user transcript turns and repair existing blank user text messages before replay, preventing AWS Bedrock `ContentBlock` blank-text validation failures. Fixes #72640 and #72622. Thanks @goldzulu.

changes.title: Agent/LM Studio: promote standalone bracketed local-模型 工具 requests 进入 registered 工具 calls 和 hide unsupported bracket blocks 从 visible replies, so MemPalace MCP协议 lookups do not print raw `[工具]` JSON scaffolding 在 chat. 修复 #66178. Thanks @detroit357.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/LM Studio: promote standalone bracketed local-model tool requests into registered tool calls and hide unsupported bracket blocks from visible replies, so MemPalace MCP lookups do not print raw `[tool]` JSON scaffolding in chat. Fixes #66178. Thanks @detroit357.

changes.title: Local 模型: warn 当 an assistant reply looks like a 工具 call 但是 the provider emitted plain text 而不是 a structured 工具 invocation, making fake/non-executed 工具 calls visible 在 logs. 修复 #51332. Thanks @emilclaw.
changes.rawTitle: Local models: warn when an assistant reply looks like a tool call but the provider emitted plain text instead of a structured tool invocation, making fake/non-executed tool calls visible in logs. Fixes #51332. Thanks @emilclaw.

changes.title: Local 模型: accept persisted non-secret local 认证 markers 为了 private-LAN custom OpenAI-compatible providers, so LAN Ollama configs no longer fail 使用 missing 认证 当 `ollama-local` is saved as the 密钥. 修复 #49736. Thanks @charles-zh.
changes.rawTitle: Local models: accept persisted non-secret local auth markers for private-LAN custom OpenAI-compatible providers, so LAN Ollama configs no longer fail with missing auth when `ollama-local` is saved as the key. Fixes #49736. Thanks @charles-zh.

changes.title: TUI/local 模型: treat visible 网关 client labels such as `openclaw-tui` as the current requester session 为了 session-aware tools, so Ollama 工具 calls no longer fail 通过 resolving the 界面 label as a session id. 修复 #66391. Thanks @kickingzebra.
changes.rawTitle: TUI/local models: treat visible gateway client labels such as `openclaw-tui` as the current requester session for session-aware tools, so Ollama tool calls no longer fail by resolving the UI label as a session id. Fixes #66391. Thanks @kickingzebra.

changes.title: Local 模型: route self-hosted OpenAI-compatible 模型 discovery through the guarded fetch 路径 pinned to the configured host, covering vLLM 和 SGLang setup 不适用 reopening local/LAN SSRF probes. Supersedes #46359. Thanks @cdxiaodong.
changes.rawTitle: Local models: route self-hosted OpenAI-compatible model discovery through the guarded fetch path pinned to the configured host, covering vLLM and SGLang setup without reopening local/LAN SSRF probes. Supersedes #46359. Thanks @cdxiaodong.

changes.title: Local 模型: classify terminated, reset, closed, 超时, 和 aborted 模型-call failures 和 attach a process 内存 snapshot to the diagnostic event, making LM Studio/Ollama RAM-pressure failures easier to prove 从 stability bundles. Refs #65551. Thanks @BigWiLLi111.
changes.rawTitle: Local models: classify terminated, reset, closed, timeout, and aborted model-call failures and attach a process memory snapshot to the diagnostic event, making LM Studio/Ollama RAM-pressure failures easier to prove from stability bundles. Refs #65551. Thanks @BigWiLLi111.

changes.title: Local 模型: pass configured provider request timeouts through OpenAI SDK transports 和 the 模型 idle watchdog so long-running local 或 custom OpenAI-compatible streams use one 超时 knob 而不是 hitting the SDK's 10-minute default 或 the 120s idle default. 修复 #63663. Thanks @aidiffuser.
changes.rawTitle: Local models: pass configured provider request timeouts through OpenAI SDK transports and the model idle watchdog so long-running local or custom OpenAI-compatible streams use one timeout knob instead of hitting the SDK's 10-minute default or the 120s idle default. Fixes #63663. Thanks @aidiffuser.

changes.title: LM Studio: trust configured LM Studio loopback, LAN, 和 tailnet endpoints 为了 guarded 模型 requests 通过 default, preserving explicit private-network opt-outs. Refs #60994. Thanks @tnowakow.
changes.rawTitle: LM Studio: trust configured LM Studio loopback, LAN, and tailnet endpoints for guarded model requests by default, preserving explicit private-network opt-outs. Refs #60994. Thanks @tnowakow.

changes.title: Docker/setup: route Docker onboarding defaults 为了 host-side LM Studio 和 Ollama through `host.docker.internal` 和 添加 the Linux host-网关 mapping to the bundled Compose file, so containerized gateways can reach local providers 不适用 using container loopback. 修复 #68684; supersedes #68702. Thanks @safrano9999 和 @skolez.
changes.rawTitle: Docker/setup: route Docker onboarding defaults for host-side LM Studio and Ollama through `host.docker.internal` and add the Linux host-gateway mapping to the bundled Compose file, so containerized gateways can reach local providers without using container loopback. Fixes #68684; supersedes #68702. Thanks @safrano9999 and @skolez.

changes.title: Agent/LM Studio: strip prior-turn Gemma 4 reasoning 从 OpenAI-compatible replay while preserving active 工具-call continuation reasoning. 修复 #68704. Thanks @chip-snomo 和 @Kailigithub.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/LM Studio: strip prior-turn Gemma 4 reasoning from OpenAI-compatible replay while preserving active tool-call continuation reasoning. Fixes #68704. Thanks @chip-snomo and @Kailigithub.

changes.title: LM Studio: 允许 interactive onboarding to leave the API 密钥 blank 为了 unauthenticated local servers, using local synthetic 认证 while clearing stale LM Studio 认证 profiles. 修复 #66937. Thanks @olamedia.
changes.rawTitle: LM Studio: allow interactive onboarding to leave the API key blank for unauthenticated local servers, using local synthetic auth while clearing stale LM Studio auth profiles. Fixes #66937. Thanks @olamedia.

changes.title: 插件/startup: use a `PluginLookUpTable` 期间 网关 startup so channel ownership, deferred channel loading, 和 startup 插件 IDs 复用 the same installed manifest registry 而不是 rebuilding manifest metadata 在 the boot 路径. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/startup: use a `PluginLookUpTable` during Gateway startup so channel ownership, deferred channel loading, and startup plugin IDs reuse the same installed manifest registry instead of rebuilding manifest metadata on the boot path. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: 插件/startup: pass the 网关 `PluginLookUpTable` through 插件 loading so auto-启用 checks 和 startup-scope fallback 复用 the same manifest registry 而不是 doing another manifest pass. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/startup: pass the Gateway `PluginLookUpTable` through plugin loading so auto-enable checks and startup-scope fallback reuse the same manifest registry instead of doing another manifest pass. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: 插件/startup: carry the 网关 `PluginLookUpTable` 进入 deferred channel full-runtime reloads so post-listen startup does not rebuild manifest metadata 之后 the provisional setup-runtime load. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/startup: carry the Gateway `PluginLookUpTable` into deferred channel full-runtime reloads so post-listen startup does not rebuild manifest metadata after the provisional setup-runtime load. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: 网关/模型: 复用 网关 插件 manifest metadata 期间 the initial 模型-pricing refresh so pricing policies 和 configured 插件 web-search 模型 do not rebuild 插件 lookups 期间 startup. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/models: reuse Gateway plugin manifest metadata during the initial model-pricing refresh so pricing policies and configured plugin web-search models do not rebuild plugin lookups during startup. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: 网关/startup: extend `OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_STARTUP_TRACE=1` 使用 per-phase event-loop delay plus 插件 lookup-table timing 和 count metrics 为了 installed-index, manifest, startup-plan, 和 owner-map work, 和 include the new timing fields 在 startup benchmark summaries. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/startup: extend `OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_STARTUP_TRACE=1` with per-phase event-loop delay plus plugin lookup-table timing and count metrics for installed-index, manifest, startup-plan, and owner-map work, and include the new timing fields in startup benchmark summaries. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: 插件/channels: 解决 read-only channel 命令 defaults 从 one 插件 index plus manifest pass 而不是 reloading 插件 metadata while checking candidate 插件 enablement. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/channels: resolve read-only channel command defaults from one plugin index plus manifest pass instead of reloading plugin metadata while checking candidate plugin enablement. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: 插件/capabilities: cache manifest-derived capability provider 插件 IDs per 配置 snapshot so repeated TTS, media, realtime, 内存, image, video, 和 music provider resolution avoids redundant manifest scans. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/capabilities: cache manifest-derived capability provider plugin IDs per config snapshot so repeated TTS, media, realtime, memory, image, video, and music provider resolution avoids redundant manifest scans. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: 插件/contracts: 解决 runtime manifest-contract 插件 owners 从 one 插件 index plus manifest pass 而不是 rebuilding manifest metadata separately 为了 all owners 和 enabled owners. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/contracts: resolve runtime manifest-contract plugin owners from one plugin index plus manifest pass instead of rebuilding manifest metadata separately for all owners and enabled owners. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: 插件/extractors: 复用 one manifest registry pass while resolving bundled document 和 web-content extractor 插件 而不是 rereading manifests 为了 compatibility 和 enablement filtering. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/extractors: reuse one manifest registry pass while resolving bundled document and web-content extractor plugins instead of rereading manifests for compatibility and enablement filtering. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: 插件/providers: 复用 one 插件 registry snapshot 和 manifest registry while resolving provider discovery entries 而不是 rebuilding manifest metadata 之后 provider owner discovery. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/providers: reuse one plugin registry snapshot and manifest registry while resolving provider discovery entries instead of rebuilding manifest metadata after provider owner discovery. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: 插件/registry: 解决 lookup-table owner maps 为了 providers, CLI backends, setup providers, 命令 aliases, 模型 catalogs, channel configs, 和 manifest contracts while preserving setup-only CLI backend ownership. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/registry: resolve lookup-table owner maps for providers, CLI backends, setup providers, command aliases, model catalogs, channel configs, and manifest contracts while preserving setup-only CLI backend ownership. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: 插件/registry: cache repeated installed-index manifest registry fallback rebuilds behind a bounded invalidating cache so cold provider-discovery paths 避免 rereading unchanged manifests. Thanks @mcaxtr.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/registry: cache repeated installed-index manifest registry fallback rebuilds behind a bounded invalidating cache so cold provider-discovery paths avoid rereading unchanged manifests. Thanks @mcaxtr.

changes.rawTitle: Plugins/web: reuse manifest records already loaded for bundled web provider candidate discovery when falling back to public artifact provider loading. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: Mattermost: keep direct-message replies top-level 通过 suppressing reply roots 为了 DM delivery while preserving channel 和 group thread roots, 和 derive inbound chat kind 从 the trusted channel lookup 而不是 the websocket event channel type. Carries forward #60115, #55186, #72305, 和 #72659; refs #59758, #59981, #59791, 和 #57565. Thanks @vincentkoc, @jwchmodx, 和 @hnykda.
changes.rawTitle: Mattermost: keep direct-message replies top-level by suppressing reply roots for DM delivery while preserving channel and group thread roots, and derive inbound chat kind from the trusted channel lookup instead of the websocket event channel type. Carries forward #60115, #55186, #72305, and #72659; refs #59758, #59981, #59791, and #57565. Thanks @vincentkoc, @jwchmodx, and @hnykda.

changes.title: Docker: pre-create `/home/node/.openclaw` 使用 node ownership 和 private permissions so first-run Docker Compose named volumes no longer fail startup 使用 EACCES. (#48072, #63959; 修复 #61279) Thanks @timoxue 和 @jeanibarz.
changes.rawTitle: Docker: pre-create `/home/node/.openclaw` with node ownership and private permissions so first-run Docker Compose named volumes no longer fail startup with EACCES. (#48072, #63959; fixes #61279) Thanks @timoxue and @jeanibarz.

changes.title: CLI/网关: treat local restart probe policy closes 为了 connect, exact `device required`, pairing, 和 认证 failures as 网关 reachability proof 不适用 accepting empty, broad standalone 令牌/password/scope/role, 或 pair-substring 1008 close reasons. 修复 #48771; carries forward #48801; related #63491. Thanks @MarsDoge 和 @genoooool.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/Gateway: treat local restart probe policy closes for connect, exact `device required`, pairing, and auth failures as Gateway reachability proof without accepting empty, broad standalone token/password/scope/role, or pair-substring 1008 close reasons. Fixes #48771; carries forward #48801; related #63491. Thanks @MarsDoge and @genoooool.

changes.title: 飞书: send outgoing interactive reply payloads as native cards 使用 clickable buttons while preserving text, media, 和 document-comment fallbacks. 修复 #13175 和 #58298; carries forward #47891. Thanks @Horacehxw.
changes.rawTitle: Feishu: send outgoing interactive reply payloads as native cards with clickable buttons while preserving text, media, and document-comment fallbacks. Fixes #13175 and #58298; carries forward #47891. Thanks @Horacehxw.

changes.title: Control 界面/WebChat: skip redundant final-event history reloads 当 the assistant payload already rendered, 和 keep deferred `session.message` reloads attached to the active run so final reconciliation no longer splits, duplicates, 或 drops assistant bubbles. 修复 #66875 和 #66274; follows #66997 和 #67037. Thanks @BiznessFish, @scotthuang, 和 @hansolo949.

changes.title: Process/Windows: decode 命令 stdout 和 stderr 从 raw bytes 使用 console-codepage awareness, while preserving valid UTF-8 output 和 multibyte characters split across chunks. 修复 #50519. Thanks @iready, @kevinten10, @zhangyongjie1997, @knightplat-blip, @heiqishi666, 和 @slepybear.
changes.rawTitle: Process/Windows: decode command stdout and stderr from raw bytes with console-codepage awareness, while preserving valid UTF-8 output and multibyte characters split across chunks. changes.rawTitle: Bonjour/Windows: hide the bundled mDNS advertiser's Windows ARP shell probe so Gateway startup no longer flashes command-prompt windows. Fixes #70238. Thanks @alexandre-leng, @PratikRai0101, @infinitypacific, and @tomerpeled.

changes.title: Agent/bootstrap: dedupe hook-injected bootstrap context files 通过 workspace-relative 路径 和 store normalized resolved paths so duplicate relative 和 absolute hook paths no longer depend 在 the process cwd. (#59344; 修复 #59319; related #56721, #56725, 和 #57587) Thanks @koen666.

changes.title: macOS 网关: detect installed-但是-unloaded LaunchAgent split-brain states 期间 status, 诊断工具, 和 restart, 和 re-bootstrap launchd supervision 之前 falling back to unmanaged listener restarts. 修复 #67335, #53475, 和 #71060; refs #58890, #60885, 和 #70801. changes.title: 网关/install: surface systemd user-bus recovery hints 期间 Linux service activation 和 重试 via the target user scope 当 `systemctl --user` reports no-medium bus failures, 不适用 letting stale `SUDO_USER` override `sudo -u` installs. 修复 #39673; refs #44417 和 #63561. Thanks @Arbor4, @myrsu, @mssteuer, 和 @boyuaner.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/install: surface systemd user-bus recovery hints during Linux service activation and retry via the target user scope when `systemctl --user` reports no-medium bus failures, without letting stale `SUDO_USER` override `sudo -u` installs. changes.title: CLI/nodes: make unfiltered `openclaw nodes list` prefer the effective paired-node view used 通过 `nodes status` while preserving pending rows, pairing-scope fallback, terminal-safe table rendering, 和 paired JSON metadata. 修复 #46871; carries forward #65772 through the ProjectClownfish #72619 repair. changes.title: CLI/startup: read generated startup metadata 从 the bundled `dist` layout 之前 falling back to live help rendering, so root/浏览器 help 和 channel-选项 bootstrap stay 在 the fast 路径. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Google Meet: clean stale Chrome-node realtime audio bridges 通过 URL 之前 rejoining, expose active node bridge inspection, 和 tolerate transient node input pull failures 而不是 dropping the Meet session. 修复 #72371. (#72372) Thanks @BsnizND.
changes.rawTitle: Google Meet: clean stale chrome-node realtime audio bridges by URL before rejoining, expose active node bridge inspection, and tolerate transient node input pull failures instead of dropping the Meet session. Fixes #72371. (#72372) Thanks @BsnizND.

changes.title: Google Meet: use 24 kHz PCM16 为了 Chrome 命令-pair realtime audio 通过 default, 保留 legacy 8 kHz G.711 mu-law custom 命令 pairs, 和 let realtime providers negotiate the selected bridge audio format. 修复 #72525. Thanks @BsnizND.

changes.title: Google Meet: clear queued Gemini Live playback 当 realtime interruptions arrive, restart Chrome 命令-pair audio output 之后 clears, 和 expose Google Live interruption/VAD 配置 knobs 为了 Meet 和 语音 Call realtime bridges. 修复 #72523. (#72524) Thanks @BsnizND.

changes.title: Google Meet: 添加 `realtime.agentId` so live meeting consults can target a named OpenClaw Agent 而不是 always using `main`. (#72381) Thanks @BsnizND.
changes.rawTitle: Google Meet: add `realtime.agentId` so live meeting consults can target a named OpenClaw agent instead of always using `main`. (#72381) Thanks @BsnizND.

changes.title: Google Meet: route stateful `google_meet` 工具 actions through the 网关-owned runtime so created 或 joined realtime sessions remain visible to status, speak, 和 leave 之后 the Agent turn ends. 修复 #72440. (#72441) Thanks @BsnizND.
changes.rawTitle: Google Meet: route stateful `google_meet` tool actions through the gateway-owned runtime so created or joined realtime sessions remain visible to status, speak, and leave after the agent turn ends. Fixes #72440. (#72441) Thanks @BsnizND.

changes.title: Google Meet/语音 Call: send Gemini Live a non-blocking consult continuation 之前 long OpenClaw Agent consults finish, then deliver the final result 当 idle so calls 和 meetings do not sit silent 期间 工具-backed answers. (#72189) Thanks @VACInc.
changes.rawTitle: Google Meet/Voice Call: send Gemini Live a non-blocking consult continuation before long OpenClaw agent consults finish, then deliver the final result when idle so calls and meetings do not sit silent during tool-backed answers. (#72189) Thanks @VACInc.

changes.rawTitle: Google Meet: preserve Gemini Live function names when replying to realtime tool calls so Google SDK validation accepts the `FunctionResponse` payload. Fixes #72425. (#72426) Thanks @BsnizND.

changes.title: Discord/media: keep incidental Markdown image badges 在 final replies as text unless a channel opts 进入 Markdown-image media extraction, while preserving Telegram Markdown-image media replies 和 explicit `MEDIA:` attachments. 修复 #72642. Thanks @solavrc 和 @Bartok9.
