changes.title: Matrix/E2EE: stabilize recovery 和 broken-device QA flows while avoiding Matrix device-cleanup sync races that could leave shutdown-time crypto work running. Thanks @gumadeiras.
changes.rawTitle: Matrix/E2EE: stabilize recovery and broken-device QA flows while avoiding Matrix device-cleanup sync races that could leave shutdown-time crypto work running. Thanks @gumadeiras.

changes.title: Cron: apply `cron.maxConcurrentRuns` to a dedicated `cron-nested` isolated Agent-turn lane as well as cron dispatch, so parallel cron jobs no longer serialize 在 inner LLM execution while non-cron nested flows keep their existing lane behavior. 修复 #72707. Thanks @kagura-Agent.
changes.rawTitle: Cron: apply `cron.maxConcurrentRuns` to a dedicated `cron-nested` isolated agent-turn lane as well as cron dispatch, so parallel cron jobs no longer serialize on inner LLM execution while non-cron nested flows keep their existing lane behavior. Fixes #72707. Thanks @kagura-agent.

changes.title: Cron: report isolated runs as successful 当 verified cron delivery already delivered the reply, while keeping unresolved Message/Canvas 工具 failures fatal. 修复 #72732 和 #50170; follow-up to #54188. Thanks @zNatix, @pixeldyn, 和 @ChickenEggRoll.

changes.title: Cron: treat isolated run-level Agent failures as job errors even 当 no reply payload is produced, synthesizing a safe 错误 payload so 模型/provider failures increment 错误 counters 和 trigger failure notifications 而不是 clearing as successful. 修复 #43604; carries forward #43631. Thanks @SPFAdvisors.
changes.rawTitle: Cron: treat isolated run-level agent failures as job errors even when no reply payload is produced, synthesizing a safe error payload so model/provider failures increment error counters and trigger failure notifications instead of clearing as successful. Fixes #43604; carries forward #43631. Thanks @SPFAdvisors.

changes.title: Cron: 保留 exact `NO_REPLY` 工具 results 从 isolated jobs 使用 empty final assistant turns as quiet successes 而不是 surfacing incomplete-turn errors. 修复 #68452; carries forward #68453. Thanks @anyech.
changes.rawTitle: Cron: preserve exact `NO_REPLY` tool results from isolated jobs with empty final assistant turns as quiet successes instead of surfacing incomplete-turn errors. Fixes #68452; carries forward #68453. Thanks @anyech.

changes.title: Cron: 解决 failure alerts 和 failure-destination announcements against `session:<id>` targets 之前 falling back to the creator session, so jobs created 从 group chats can notify the targeted direct session 不适用 cross-account routing errors. Refs #62777; carries forward #68535. Thanks @slideshow-dingo 和 @likewen-tech.
changes.rawTitle: Cron: resolve failure alerts and failure-destination announcements against `session:<id>` targets before falling back to the creator session, so jobs created from group chats can notify the targeted direct session without cross-account routing errors. changes.rawTitle: Discord: preserve explicit `user:` and `channel:` delivery targets through plugin routing so cron announcements and failure alerts keep their intended recipient kind. Refs #62777; carries forward #62798. Thanks @neeravmakwana.

changes.title: Cron: 添加 `failureAlert.includeSkipped` 和 `openclaw cron edit --failure-alert-include-skipped` so persistently skipped jobs can alert 不适用 counting skips as execution errors 或 affecting 重试 backoff. 修复 #60846. Thanks @slideshow-dingo.

changes.title: Cron: invalidate stale pending runtime slots 之后 live 或 offline `jobs.json` schedule edits, while preserving due slots 为了 formatting-only rewrites. 修复 #27996 和 #71607; carries forward #71651. Thanks @xialonglee 和 @fagnersouza666.

changes.rawTitle: Cron: keep legacy flat `jobs.json` rows loadable while comparing split-state schedule identities, so old cron stores do not crash before in-memory hydration can normalize them.

changes.title: Cron: start isolated Agent-turn execution timeouts 之后 the runner enters its effective execution lane, so queued cron/manual runs no longer spend their whole 超时 budget 之前 useful work begins. 修复 #41783. Thanks @ayanesakura 和 @Hurray0.
changes.rawTitle: Cron: start isolated agent-turn execution timeouts after the runner enters its effective execution lane, so queued cron/manual runs no longer spend their whole timeout budget before useful work begins. Fixes #41783. Thanks @ayanesakura and @Hurray0.

changes.title: Cron: omit synthetic `delivery.resolved` errors 从 `--no-deliver` run records while preserving explicit no-deliver target traces 为了 Agent-initiated messages. 修复 #72210; carries forward #72219. Thanks @hatemclawbot-collab 和 @xydigit-sj.
changes.rawTitle: Cron: omit synthetic `delivery.resolved` errors from `--no-deliver` run records while preserving explicit no-deliver target traces for agent-initiated messages. Fixes #72210; carries forward #72219. Thanks @hatemclawbot-collab and @xydigit-sj.

changes.title: Cron: classify isolated runs as errors 从 structured embedded-run execution-denial metadata, 使用 final-output marker fallback 为了 `SYSTEM_RUN_DENIED`, `INVALID_REQUEST`, 和 approval-binding refusals, so blocked commands no longer appear green 在 cron history. 修复 #67172; carries forward #67186. changes.title: Subagents: keep the delegated task only 在 the subagent system prompt 和 send a short initial kickoff message, avoiding duplicate task tokens while preserving multiline task formatting. 修复 #72019; carries forward #72053. Thanks @Wizongod 和 @ly85206559.
changes.rawTitle: Subagents: keep the delegated task only in the subagent system prompt and send a short initial kickoff message, avoiding duplicate task tokens while preserving multiline task formatting. Fixes #72019; carries forward #72053. Thanks @Wizongod and @ly85206559.

changes.title: 网关/install: 添加 a validated `--wrapper`/`OPENCLAW_WRAPPER` service install 路径 that persists executable LaunchAgent/systemd wrappers across forced reinstalls, updates, 和 诊断工具 repairs 而不是 falling back to raw node/bun `ProgramArguments`. 修复 #69400. (#72445) Thanks @willtmc.

Fixes #69400. (#72445) Thanks @willtmc.

changes.title: 插件: fail 插件 registration 当 loader-owned acceptance gates reject missing hook names 或 内存-only capability registration 从 non-内存 插件, surfacing the issue through 插件 status 和 诊断工具 而不是 静默地 dropping the registration. 修复 #72459. Thanks @amknight.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins: fail plugin registration when loader-owned acceptance gates reject missing hook names or memory-only capability registration from non-memory plugins, surfacing the issue through plugin status and doctor instead of silently dropping the registration. Fixes #72459. Thanks @amknight.

changes.title: macOS 网关: write launchd services 使用 a state-dir `WorkingDirectory`, use a durable state-dir temp 路径 而不是 freezing macOS session `TMPDIR`, create that temp directory 之前 bootstrap, 和 label abort-shaped launchd exits as `SIGABRT/abort` 在 status output. 修复 #53679 和 #70223; refs #71848. Thanks @dlturock, @stammi922, 和 @palladius.
changes.rawTitle: macOS Gateway: write launchd services with a state-dir `WorkingDirectory`, use a durable state-dir temp path instead of freezing macOS session `TMPDIR`, create that temp directory before bootstrap, and label abort-shaped launchd exits as `SIGABRT/abort` in status output. Fixes #53679 and #70223; refs #71848. Thanks @dlturock, @stammi922, and @palladius.

changes.title: Control 界面/更新: make `更新 现在` require a real 网关 process replacement, report skipped/错误 更新 outcomes 使用 stable reasons, 和 verify the running 网关 version 之后 restart so global installs cannot 静默地 keep old code 在 内存. 修复 #62492; addresses #64892 和 #63562. Thanks @IAMSamuelRodda.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/update: make `Update now` require a real gateway process replacement, report skipped/error update outcomes with stable reasons, and verify the running gateway version after restart so global installs cannot silently keep old code in memory. Fixes #62492; addresses #64892 and #63562. Thanks @IAMSamuelRodda.

changes.title: Exec approvals: accept runtime-owned `source: "允许-always"` 和 `commandText` allowlist metadata 在 网关 和 node approval-set payloads so Control 界面 round-trips no longer fail 使用 `unexpected property 'source'`. 修复 #60000; carries forward #60064. Thanks @sd1471123, @sharkqwy, 和 @luoyanglang.
changes.rawTitle: Exec approvals: accept runtime-owned `source: "allow-always"` and `commandText` allowlist metadata in gateway and node approval-set payloads so Control UI round-trips no longer fail with `unexpected property 'source'`. Fixes #60000; carries forward #60064. Thanks @sd1471123, @sharkqwy, and @luoyanglang.

changes.title: Exec/node: skip approval-plan preparation 为了 full-trust `host=node` runs so interpreter 和 script commands no longer fail 使用 `SYSTEM_RUN_DENIED: approval cannot safely bind` 当 effective policy is `安全=full` 和 `ask=off`. 修复 #48457 和 duplicate #69251. Thanks @ajtran303, @jaserNo1, @Blakeshannon, @lesliefag, 和 @AvIsBeastMC.
changes.rawTitle: Exec/node: skip approval-plan preparation for full-trust `host=node` runs so interpreter and script commands no longer fail with `SYSTEM_RUN_DENIED: approval cannot safely bind` when effective policy is `security=full` and `ask=off`. Fixes #48457 and duplicate #69251. Thanks @ajtran303, @jaserNo1, @Blakeshannon, @lesliefag, and @AvIsBeastMC.

changes.title: Exec/node: synthesize a local approval plan 当 a paired node advertises `system.run` 不适用 `system.run.prepare`, unblocking approval-required `host=node` exec 在 current macOS companion nodes while preserving remote prepare 为了 node hosts that 支持 it. 修复 #37591 和 duplicate #66839; carries forward #69725. Thanks @soloclz.
changes.rawTitle: Exec/node: synthesize a local approval plan when a paired node advertises `system.run` without `system.run.prepare`, unblocking approval-required `host=node` exec on current macOS companion nodes while preserving remote prepare for node hosts that support it. Fixes #37591 and duplicate #66839; carries forward #69725. Thanks @soloclz.

changes.title: 内存/QMD: prefer QMD's `--mask` collection pattern flag so root 内存 indexing stays scoped to `内存.md` 而不是 widening to every markdown file 在 the workspace. 修复 #65480; supersedes #65481 和 #66259. Thanks @ccage-simp, @Bortlesboat, @seank-com, 和 @crazyscience.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/QMD: prefer QMD's `--mask` collection pattern flag so root memory indexing stays scoped to `MEMORY.md` instead of widening to every markdown file in the workspace. Fixes #65480; supersedes #65481 and #66259. Thanks @ccage-simp, @Bortlesboat, @seank-com, and @crazyscience.

changes.title: 内存/诊断工具: treat the specific `网关 超时 之后 ...` 网关 内存 probe result as inconclusive 而不是 reporting embeddings not ready, while preserving warnings 为了 explicit failures. 修复 #44426; carries forward #46576 使用 the Greptile review feedback applied. Thanks Cengiz (@ghost).
changes.rawTitle: Memory/doctor: treat the specific `gateway timeout after ...` gateway memory probe result as inconclusive instead of reporting embeddings not ready, while preserving warnings for explicit failures. changes.title: 网关/内存: defer QMD startup 为了 implicit non-default Agent 和 scope 内存 runtime loading to the selected 内存 slot so 网关 boot 和 first 内存 recall 避免 broad 插件 runtime fanout. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/memory: defer QMD startup for implicit non-default agents and scope memory runtime loading to the selected memory slot so Gateway boot and first memory recall avoid broad plugin runtime fanout. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 网关/startup: keep core request handlers, setup wizard, 和 channel runtime helpers off the boot 路径 until the first matching request, wizard run, 或 channel start, reducing no-插件 网关 ready RSS 和 avoidable startup imports. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/startup: keep core request handlers, setup wizard, and channel runtime helpers off the boot path until the first matching request, wizard run, or channel start, reducing no-plugin Gateway ready RSS and avoidable startup imports. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 网关/startup: keep CLI outbound channel send dependencies as lazy request-time senders so 网关 boot no longer imports channel 插件 registration just to construct default deps. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/startup: keep CLI outbound channel send dependencies as lazy request-time senders so Gateway boot no longer imports channel plugin registration just to construct default deps. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 网关/startup: split lightweight HTTP 认证 helpers away 从 模型-override helpers so 网关 bind no longer imports 模型 catalog selection while wiring base HTTP routes. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/startup: split lightweight HTTP auth helpers away from model-override helpers so Gateway bind no longer imports model catalog selection while wiring base HTTP routes. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 网关/startup: lazy-load 插件 HTTP route dispatch 当 active 插件 routes exist so no-插件 网关 boot skips 插件 route runtime scope setup. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/startup: lazy-load plugin HTTP route dispatch when active plugin routes exist so no-plugin Gateway boot skips plugin route runtime scope setup. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 网关/startup: move chat run/subscriber registries onto a lightweight state module 和 defer chat/session event projection until the first event so 网关 boot skips session IO imports. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/startup: move chat run/subscriber registries onto a lightweight state module and defer chat/session event projection until the first event so Gateway boot skips session IO imports. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 网关/startup: keep node session runtime 在 a lightweight JSON parser 而不是 importing 网关 method validation helpers 期间 boot. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/startup: keep node session runtime on a lightweight JSON parser instead of importing gateway method validation helpers during boot. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 网关/startup: read embedded-run activity 从 a lightweight shared state module so restart deferral no longer imports the embedded runner 期间 网关 boot. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/startup: read embedded-run activity from a lightweight shared state module so restart deferral no longer imports the embedded runner during Gateway boot. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.rawTitle: Gateway/startup: defer MCP loopback server imports until Gateway shutdown so normal boot no longer loads the loopback HTTP/tool schema stack just to register close handlers. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.rawTitle: Gateway/startup: resolve channel runtime helpers asynchronously only when an enabled/configured channel starts, so no-channel Gateway boot skips auto-reply, media, pairing, and outbound channel helper imports. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.rawTitle: Gateway/startup: lazy-load HTTP auth, canvas auth, and plugin route scope helpers from their request paths so Gateway bind no longer pays those utility graphs during boot. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.rawTitle: Gateway/startup: split hook request parsing into a request-path module and load the Gateway hook dispatcher only when a request matches the hooks base path, keeping hook mapping and throttle helpers off plain HTTP bind. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Codex harness: normalize cached input tokens 之前 session/context accounting so prompt cache reads are not double-counted 在 `/status`, `session_status`, 或 persisted `sessionEntry.totalTokens`. 修复 #69298. Thanks @richardmqq.
changes.rawTitle: Codex harness: normalize cached input tokens before session/context accounting so prompt cache reads are not double-counted in `/status`, `session_status`, or persisted `sessionEntry.totalTokens`. Fixes #69298. Thanks @richardmqq.

changes.title: Hooks/session-内存: use the host local timezone 为了 内存 filenames, fallback timestamp slugs, 和 markdown headers 而不是 UTC dates. 修复 #46703. (#46721) Thanks @Astro-Han.
changes.rawTitle: Hooks/session-memory: use the host local timezone for memory filenames, fallback timestamp slugs, and markdown headers instead of UTC dates. Fixes #46703. (#46721) Thanks @Astro-Han.

changes.title: 网关 health: 保留 live runtime-backed channel/account state 在 `网关.health` snapshots 和 cached refreshes while keeping raw probe payloads 在 sensitive/admin paths only. (#39921, #42586, #46527, #52770, #42543) Thanks @FAL1989, @rstar327, @0xble, 和 @ajayr.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway health: preserve live runtime-backed channel/account state in `gateway.health` snapshots and cached refreshes while keeping raw probe payloads on sensitive/admin paths only. (#39921, #42586, #46527, #52770, #42543) Thanks @FAL1989, @rstar327, @0xble, and @ajayr.

changes.title: 飞书: extract quoted/replied interactive-card text across schema 1.0, schema 2.0, i18n, template-variable, 和 post-format fallback shapes 不适用 carrying broad generated/配置 churn 从 related parser experiments. (#38776, #60383, #42218, #45936) Thanks @lishuaigit, @lskun, @just2gooo, 和 @Br1an67.
changes.rawTitle: Feishu: extract quoted/replied interactive-card text across schema 1.0, schema 2.0, i18n, template-variable, and post-format fallback shapes without carrying broad generated/config churn from related parser experiments. (#38776, #60383, #42218, #45936) Thanks @lishuaigit, @lskun, @just2gooo, and @Br1an67.

changes.title: Telegram/Agent: hide raw failed write/edit warning messages 在 Telegram 当 the assistant already explicitly acknowledges the failed action, while keeping warnings 当 the reply claims success 或 omits the failure; #39406 remains the broader configurable delivery-policy follow-up. 修复 #51065; covers #39631. Thanks @Bartok9 和 @Bortlesboat.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram/agents: hide raw failed write/edit warning messages in Telegram when the assistant already explicitly acknowledges the failed action, while keeping warnings when the reply claims success or omits the failure; #39406 remains the broader configurable delivery-policy follow-up. Fixes #51065; covers #39631. Thanks @Bartok9 and @Bortlesboat.

changes.title: Exec approvals: accept a symlinked `OPENCLAW_HOME` as the trusted approvals root while still rejecting symlinked `.openclaw` 路径 components below it. (#64663) Thanks @FunJim.
changes.rawTitle: Exec approvals: accept a symlinked `OPENCLAW_HOME` as the trusted approvals root while still rejecting symlinked `.openclaw` path components below it. (#64663) Thanks @FunJim.

changes.title: Logging: 添加 top-level `hostname`, flattened `message`, 和 available `agent_id`, `session_id`, 和 `channel` fields to file-log JSONL records 为了 multi-Agent filtering 不适用 removing existing structured log arguments. 修复 #51075. Thanks @stevengonsalvez.
changes.rawTitle: Logging: add top-level `hostname`, flattened `message`, and available `agent_id`, `session_id`, and `channel` fields to file-log JSONL records for multi-agent filtering without removing existing structured log arguments. Fixes #51075. Thanks @stevengonsalvez.

changes.title: ACP: route server logs to stderr 之前 网关 配置/bootstrap work so ACP stdout remains JSON-RPC only 为了 IDE integrations. 修复 #49060. Thanks @Hollychou924.
changes.rawTitle: ACP: route server logs to stderr before Gateway config/bootstrap work so ACP stdout remains JSON-RPC only for IDE integrations. Fixes #49060. Thanks @Hollychou924.

changes.title: Logging: propagate internal request trace scopes through 网关 HTTP requests 和 WebSocket frames so file logs, diagnostic events, Agent run traces, 模型-call traces, OTEL spans, 和 trusted provider `traceparent` headers share a correlatable `traceId` 不适用 logging raw request 或 模型 content. 修复 #40353. Thanks @liangruochong44-界面.
changes.rawTitle: Logging: propagate internal request trace scopes through Gateway HTTP requests and WebSocket frames so file logs, diagnostic events, agent run traces, model-call traces, OTEL spans, and trusted provider `traceparent` headers share a correlatable `traceId` without logging raw request or model content. Fixes #40353. Thanks @liangruochong44-ui.

changes.title: Diagnostics/OTEL: capture privacy-safe 模型-call request payload bytes, streamed response bytes, first-response latency, 和 total duration 在 diagnostic events, 插件 hooks, stability snapshots, 和 OTEL 模型-call spans/metrics 不适用 logging raw 模型 content. 修复 #33832. Thanks @wwh830.
changes.rawTitle: Diagnostics/OTEL: capture privacy-safe model-call request payload bytes, streamed response bytes, first-response latency, and total duration in diagnostic events, plugin hooks, stability snapshots, and OTEL model-call spans/metrics without logging raw model content. Fixes #33832. Thanks @wwh830.

changes.title: Logging: write validated diagnostic trace context as top-level `traceId`, `spanId`, `parentSpanId`, 和 `traceFlags` fields 在 file-log JSONL records so traced requests 和 模型 calls are easier to correlate 在 log processors. Refs #40353. Thanks @liangruochong44-界面.
changes.rawTitle: Logging: write validated diagnostic trace context as top-level `traceId`, `spanId`, `parentSpanId`, and `traceFlags` fields in file-log JSONL records so traced requests and model calls are easier to correlate in log processors. Refs #40353. Thanks @liangruochong44-ui.

changes.title: Logging/sessions: apply configured redaction patterns to persisted session transcript text 和 accept escaped character classes 在 safe custom redaction regexes, so transcript JSONL no longer keeps matching sensitive text 在 the clear. 修复 #42982. Thanks @panpan0000.
changes.rawTitle: Logging/sessions: apply configured redaction patterns to persisted session transcript text and accept escaped character classes in safe custom redaction regexes, so transcript JSONL no longer keeps matching sensitive text in the clear. Fixes #42982. Thanks @panpan0000.

changes.title: Agent/sessions: let `sessions_spawn runtime="subagent"` ignore ACP-only `streamTo` 和 `resumeSessionId` fields while keeping ACP passthrough 和 documenting `streamTo` as ACP-only. 修复 #43556 和 #63120; covers #56326, #61724, #64714, 和 #67248; carries forward #68397, #65282, #58686, #56342, 和 #40102. Thanks @skernelx, @damselem, @Br1an67, @Mintalix, @IsaacAPerez, @vvitovec, @Sanjays2402, @shenkq97, 和 @1034378361.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/sessions: let `sessions_spawn runtime="subagent"` ignore ACP-only `streamTo` and `resumeSessionId` fields while keeping ACP passthrough and documenting `streamTo` as ACP-only. Fixes #43556 and #63120; covers #56326, #61724, #64714, and #67248; carries forward #68397, #65282, #58686, #56342, and #40102. Thanks @skernelx, @damselem, @Br1an67, @Mintalix, @IsaacAPerez, @vvitovec, @Sanjays2402, @shenkq97, and @1034378361.

changes.title: Providers/Ollama: honor `/API/show` capabilities 当 registering local 模型 so non-工具 Ollama 模型 no longer receive the Agent 工具 surface, 和 keep native Ollama thinking opt-在 而不是 enabling it 通过 default. 修复 #64710 和 duplicate #65343. Thanks @yuan-b, @netherby, @xilopaint, 和 @Diyforfun2026.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/Ollama: honor `/api/show` capabilities when registering local models so non-tool Ollama models no longer receive the agent tool surface, and keep native Ollama thinking opt-in instead of enabling it by default. Fixes #64710 and duplicate #65343. Thanks @yuan-b, @netherby, @xilopaint, and @Diyforfun2026.

changes.title: Image 工具/media: honor `tools.media.image.timeoutSeconds` 和 matching per-模型 image timeouts 在 explicit image analysis, including the MiniMax VLM fallback 路径, so slow local vision 模型 are not capped 通过 hardcoded 30s/60s aborts. 修复 #67889; supersedes #67929. Thanks @AllenT22 和 @alchip.
changes.rawTitle: Image tool/media: honor `tools.media.image.timeoutSeconds` and matching per-model image timeouts in explicit image analysis, including the MiniMax VLM fallback path, so slow local vision models are not capped by hardcoded 30s/60s aborts. Fixes #67889; supersedes #67929. Thanks @AllenT22 and @alchip.

changes.title: Providers/Ollama: read larger custom Modelfile `PARAMETER num_ctx` values 从 `/API/show` so auto-discovered Ollama 模型 使用 expanded context no longer stay pinned to the base 模型 context. 修复 #68344. Thanks @neeravmakwana.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/Ollama: read larger custom Modelfile `PARAMETER num_ctx` values from `/api/show` so auto-discovered Ollama models with expanded context no longer stay pinned to the base model context. Fixes #68344. Thanks @neeravmakwana.

changes.title: Providers/Ollama: honor configured 模型 `params.num_ctx` 在 native 和 OpenAI-compatible Ollama requests so local 模型 can cap runtime context 不适用 rebuilding Modelfiles. 修复 #44550 和 #52206; supersedes #69464. Thanks @taitruong, @armi0024, 和 @LokiCode404.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/Ollama: honor configured model `params.num_ctx` in native and OpenAI-compatible Ollama requests so local models can cap runtime context without rebuilding Modelfiles. Fixes #44550 and #52206; supersedes #69464. Thanks @taitruong, @armi0024, and @LokiCode404.

changes.title: Providers/Ollama: 停止 forcing native Ollama requests to use the full configured `contextWindow` as `options.num_ctx` unless `params.num_ctx` is explicit, so local 模型 can keep Ollama's VRAM/env default 而不是 looking hung 在 first turns. 修复 #49684 和 #68662. Thanks @zhouZcong 和 @dshenster-byte.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/Ollama: stop forcing native Ollama requests to use the full configured `contextWindow` as `options.num_ctx` unless `params.num_ctx` is explicit, so local models can keep Ollama's VRAM/env default instead of looking hung on first turns. Fixes #49684 and #68662. Thanks @zhouZcong and @dshenster-byte.

changes.title: Providers/Ollama: forward whitelisted native Ollama 模型 params such as `temperature`, `top_p`, 和 top-level `think` so users can 禁用 API-level thinking 或 tune local 模型 从 配置 不适用 代理 shims. 修复 #48010. Thanks @tangzhi, @pandego, @maweibin, @Adam-Researchh, 和 @EmpireCreator.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/Ollama: forward whitelisted native Ollama model params such as `temperature`, `top_p`, and top-level `think` so users can disable API-level thinking or tune local models from config without proxy shims. Fixes #48010. Thanks @tangzhi, @pandego, @maweibin, @Adam-Researchh, and @EmpireCreator.

changes.title: Providers/Ollama: expose native Ollama thinking effort levels so `/think max` is accepted 为了 reasoning-capable Ollama 模型 和 maps to Ollama's highest supported `think` effort. 修复 #71584. Thanks @g0st1n.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/Ollama: expose native Ollama thinking effort levels so `/think max` is accepted for reasoning-capable Ollama models and maps to Ollama's highest supported `think` effort. Fixes #71584. Thanks @g0st1n.

changes.title: Providers/Ollama: strip the active custom Ollama provider prefix 之前 native chat 和 embedding requests, so custom provider ids like `ollama-spark/qwen3:32b` reach Ollama as the real 模型 name. 修复 #72353. Thanks @maximus-dss 和 @hclsys.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/Ollama: strip the active custom Ollama provider prefix before native chat and embedding requests, so custom provider ids like `ollama-spark/qwen3:32b` reach Ollama as the real model name. Fixes #72353. Thanks @maximus-dss and @hclsys.

changes.title: Providers/Ollama: parse stringified native 工具-call arguments 之前 dispatch, preserving unsafe integer values so Ollama 工具 use receives structured parameters. 修复 #69735; supersedes #69910. Thanks @rongshuzhao 和 @yfge.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/Ollama: parse stringified native tool-call arguments before dispatch, preserving unsafe integer values so Ollama tool use receives structured parameters. Fixes #69735; supersedes #69910. Thanks @rongshuzhao and @yfge.

changes.title: Providers/Ollama: skip ambient localhost discovery unless Ollama 认证 或 meaningful 配置 opts 在, preventing unexpected probes to `127.0.0.1:11434` 为了 users who are not using Ollama. 修复 #56939; supersedes #57116. Thanks @IanxDev 和 @tsukhani.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/Ollama: skip ambient localhost discovery unless Ollama auth or meaningful config opts in, preventing unexpected probes to `127.0.0.1:11434` for users who are not using Ollama. Fixes #56939; supersedes #57116. Thanks @IanxDev and @tsukhani.

changes.title: Providers/Ollama: skip implicit localhost discovery 当 a custom remote `API: "ollama"` provider is configured, while still treating `127/8` loopback hosts as local. Carries forward #43224. Thanks @issacthekaylon.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/Ollama: skip implicit localhost discovery when a custom remote `api: "ollama"` provider is configured, while still treating `127/8` loopback hosts as local. Carries forward #43224. Thanks @issacthekaylon.

changes.title: Providers/模型: honor provider-level `contextWindow`, `contextTokens`, 和 `maxTokens` as defaults 当 resolving discovered 模型, so local Ollama 和 other self-hosted providers can cap all 模型 不适用 repeating per-模型 entries. 修复 #44786; carries forward #44955. Thanks @voltwake 和 @maweibin.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/models: honor provider-level `contextWindow`, `contextTokens`, and `maxTokens` as defaults when resolving discovered models, so local Ollama and other self-hosted providers can cap all models without repeating per-model entries. Fixes #44786; carries forward #44955. Thanks @voltwake and @maweibin.

changes.title: Providers/Ollama: move 内存 embeddings to Ollama's current `/API/embed` endpoint 使用 batched `input` requests while preserving vector normalization 和 custom provider 认证/header overrides. 修复 #39983. Thanks @sskkcc 和 @LiudengZhang.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/Ollama: move memory embeddings to Ollama's current `/api/embed` endpoint with batched `input` requests while preserving vector normalization and custom provider auth/header overrides. Fixes #39983. Thanks @sskkcc and @LiudengZhang.

changes.title: Providers/Ollama: route local web search through Ollama's signed `/API/experimental/web_search` daemon 代理, use hosted `/API/web_search` directly 为了 `ollama.com`, 和 keep `OLLAMA_API_KEY` scoped to cloud fallback 认证. 修复 #69132. Thanks @yoon1012 和 @hyspacex.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/Ollama: route local web search through Ollama's signed `/api/experimental/web_search` daemon proxy, use hosted `/api/web_search` directly for `ollama.com`, and keep `OLLAMA_API_KEY` scoped to cloud fallback auth. Fixes #69132. Thanks @yoon1012 and @hyspacex.

changes.title: Providers/Ollama: accept OpenAI SDK-style `baseURL` as an alias 为了 `baseUrl` across discovery, streaming, setup pulls, embeddings, 和 web search so remote Ollama hosts are not 静默地 ignored. 修复 #62533; supersedes #62549. Thanks @Julien-BKK 和 @Linux2010.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/Ollama: accept OpenAI SDK-style `baseURL` as an alias for `baseUrl` across discovery, streaming, setup pulls, embeddings, and web search so remote Ollama hosts are not silently ignored. Fixes #62533; supersedes #62549. Thanks @Julien-BKK and @Linux2010.

changes.title: Providers/Ollama: scope synthetic local 认证 和 embedding bearer headers to declared Ollama host boundaries so cloud keys are not sent to local/self-hosted embedding endpoints 和 remote/cloud Ollama endpoints no longer receive the `ollama-local` marker as if it were a real 令牌. Supersedes #69261 和 #69857; refs #43945. Thanks @hyspacex, @maxramsay, 和 @Meli73.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/Ollama: scope synthetic local auth and embedding bearer headers to declared Ollama host boundaries so cloud keys are not sent to local/self-hosted embedding endpoints and remote/cloud Ollama endpoints no longer receive the `ollama-local` marker as if it were a real token. Supersedes #69261 and #69857; refs #43945. Thanks @hyspacex, @maxramsay, and @Meli73.

changes.title: Providers/Ollama: 解决 custom-named local Ollama providers such as `ollama-remote` through the Ollama synthetic-认证 hook so subagents no longer miss `ollama-local` 认证 和 静默地 fall back to cloud 模型. 修复 #43945. Thanks @Meli73 和 @maxramsay.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/Ollama: resolve custom-named local Ollama providers such as `ollama-remote` through the Ollama synthetic-auth hook so subagents no longer miss `ollama-local` auth and silently fall back to cloud models. Fixes #43945. Thanks @Meli73 and @maxramsay.

changes.title: Providers/Ollama: 添加 provider-scoped 模型 request timeouts, thread them through guarded fetch connect/header/body/abort handling, 和 document `params.keep_alive` 为了 cold local 模型 so first-turn Ollama loads no longer require global Agent 超时 changes. 修复 #64541 和 #68796; supersedes #65143 和 #66511. Thanks @LittleJakub, @Juankcba, @uninhibite-scholar, 和 @yfge.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/Ollama: add provider-scoped model request timeouts, thread them through guarded fetch connect/header/body/abort handling, and document `params.keep_alive` for cold local models so first-turn Ollama loads no longer require global agent timeout changes. Fixes #64541 and #68796; supersedes #65143 and #66511. Thanks @LittleJakub, @Juankcba, @uninhibite-scholar, and @yfge.

changes.title: Providers/Ollama: 保留 explicit configured 模型 input modalities 当 merging discovered provider metadata so custom vision 模型 keep image 支持 而不是 静默地 dropping attachments. 修复 #39690; carries forward #39785. Thanks @Skrblik 和 @Mriris.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/Ollama: preserve explicit configured model input modalities when merging discovered provider metadata so custom vision models keep image support instead of silently dropping attachments. Fixes #39690; carries forward #39785. Thanks @Skrblik and @Mriris.

changes.title: Providers/Ollama: estimate native Ollama transcript usage 当 `/API/chat` omits prompt/eval counters while preserving exact zero counters, keeping local 模型 runs visible 在 usage surfaces. Carries forward #39112. Thanks @TylonHH.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/Ollama: estimate native Ollama transcript usage when `/api/chat` omits prompt/eval counters while preserving exact zero counters, keeping local model runs visible in usage surfaces. Carries forward #39112. Thanks @TylonHH.

changes.title: Agent/Ollama: 重试 native Ollama turns that finish 不适用 user-visible text, including unsigned thinking-only responses, so constrained reasoning turns can continue 而不是 surfacing an empty reply. Carries forward #66552 和 #61223. Thanks @yfge 和 @L3G.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/Ollama: retry native Ollama turns that finish without user-visible text, including unsigned thinking-only responses, so constrained reasoning turns can continue instead of surfacing an empty reply. Carries forward #66552 and #61223. Thanks @yfge and @L3G.

changes.title: Docs/Ollama: expand setup recipes 为了 local, LAN, cloud, multi-host, web search, embeddings, thinking control, 和 large-context troubleshooting.
changes.rawTitle: Docs/Ollama: expand setup recipes for local, LAN, cloud, multi-host, web search, embeddings, thinking control, and large-context troubleshooting.

changes.title: Providers/PDF/Ollama: 添加 bounded network timeouts 为了 Ollama 模型 pulls 和 native Anthropic/Gemini PDF analysis requests so unresponsive provider endpoints no longer hang sessions indefinitely. 修复 #54142; supersedes #54144 和 #54145. Thanks @jinduwang1001-max 和 @arkyu2077.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/PDF/Ollama: add bounded network timeouts for Ollama model pulls and native Anthropic/Gemini PDF analysis requests so unresponsive provider endpoints no longer hang sessions indefinitely. Fixes #54142; supersedes #54144 and #54145. Thanks @jinduwang1001-max and @arkyu2077.

changes.title: LLM Task/Ollama: accept 模型 overrides that already include the selected provider prefix, avoiding doubled ids such as `ollama/ollama/llama3.2:latest`, 和 live-verify local Ollama JSON tasks return parsed output. 修复 #50052. Thanks @ralphy-maplebots 和 @Hollychou924.
changes.rawTitle: LLM Task/Ollama: accept model overrides that already include the selected provider prefix, avoiding doubled ids such as `ollama/ollama/llama3.2:latest`, and live-verify local Ollama JSON tasks return parsed output. Fixes #50052. Thanks @ralphy-maplebots and @Hollychou924.

changes.title: 内存/诊断工具: treat Ollama 内存 embeddings as 密钥-optional so `openclaw 诊断工具` no longer warns about a missing API 密钥 当 the 网关 reports embeddings are ready. 修复 #46584. Thanks @fengly78.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/doctor: treat Ollama memory embeddings as key-optional so `openclaw doctor` no longer warns about a missing API key when the gateway reports embeddings are ready. Fixes #46584. Thanks @fengly78.

changes.title: Agent/Ollama: apply provider-owned replay turn normalization to native Ollama chat so Cloud 模型 no longer reject non-alternating replay history 在 Agent/网关 runs. 修复 #71697. Thanks @ismael-81.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/Ollama: apply provider-owned replay turn normalization to native Ollama chat so Cloud models no longer reject non-alternating replay history in agent/Gateway runs. Fixes #71697. Thanks @ismael-81.

changes.title: Control 界面/Ollama: show the resolved configured thinking default 在 chat 和 session thinking dropdowns so inherited `adaptive`/per-模型 thinking 配置 no longer appears as `Default (off)` 或 a generic inherit value. 修复 #72407. Thanks @NotecAG.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/Ollama: show the resolved configured thinking default in chat and session thinking dropdowns so inherited `adaptive`/per-model thinking config no longer appears as `Default (off)` or a generic inherit value. Fixes #72407. Thanks @NotecAG.

changes.title: Agent/Ollama: validate explicit `--thinking max` against catalog-discovered Ollama reasoning metadata so local Agent runs accept the same native thinking levels shown 在 the 模型 catalog. 修复 #71584. Thanks @g0st1n.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/Ollama: validate explicit `--thinking max` against catalog-discovered Ollama reasoning metadata so local agent runs accept the same native thinking levels shown in the model catalog. Fixes #71584. Thanks @g0st1n.

changes.title: CLI/模型: include explicitly configured provider 模型 在 `openclaw 模型 list --provider <id>` 不适用 requiring the full catalog 路径, so configured Ollama 模型 are visible. 修复 #65207. Thanks @drzeast-png.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/models: include explicitly configured provider models in `openclaw models list --provider <id>` without requiring the full catalog path, so configured Ollama models are visible. Fixes #65207. Thanks @drzeast-png.

changes.title: Docker/QA: 添加 observability coverage to the normal Docker aggregate so QA-lab OTEL 和 Prometheus diagnostics run inside Docker. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Docker/QA: add observability coverage to the normal Docker aggregate so QA-lab OTEL and Prometheus diagnostics run inside Docker. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Auto-reply: poison inbound message dedupe 之后 replay-unsafe provider/runtime failures so retries stay safe 之前 visible progress 但是 cannot duplicate messages 之后 block output, 工具 side effects, 或 session progress. 修复 #69303; keeps #58549 和 #64606 as duplicate validation. Thanks @martingarramon, @NikolaFC, 和 @zeroth-blip.
changes.rawTitle: Auto-reply: poison inbound message dedupe after replay-unsafe provider/runtime failures so retries stay safe before visible progress but cannot duplicate messages after block output, tool side effects, or session progress. Fixes #69303; keeps #58549 and #64606 as duplicate validation. Thanks @martingarramon, @NikolaFC, and @zeroth-blip.

changes.title: Agent/模型 fallback: keep auto-persisted fallback 模型 overrides selected across turns until `/new` 或 reset clears them, avoiding repeated probes 的 a known-bad primary while `/status` shows the selected 和 active 模型. Thanks @kibedu.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/model fallback: keep auto-persisted fallback model overrides selected across turns until `/new` or reset clears them, avoiding repeated probes of a known-bad primary while `/status` shows the selected and active models. Thanks @kibedu.

changes.title: Agent/模型 fallback: jump directly to a known later live-session 模型 redirect 而不是 walking unrelated fallback candidates, while preserving the already-landed live-session/fallback loop guard. 修复 #57471; related loop family already closed via #58496. Thanks @yuxiaoyang2007-prog.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/model fallback: jump directly to a known later live-session model redirect instead of walking unrelated fallback candidates, while preserving the already-landed live-session/fallback loop guard. Fixes #57471; related loop family already closed via #58496. Thanks @yuxiaoyang2007-prog.

changes.title: 网关/Bonjour: keep @homebridge/ciao cancellation handlers registered across advertiser restarts so late probing cancellations cannot 崩溃 Linux 和 other mDNS-churned gateways.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/Bonjour: keep @homebridge/ciao cancellation handlers registered across advertiser restarts so late probing cancellations cannot crash Linux and other mDNS-churned gateways.

changes.title: 插件/startup: load the default `内存-core` slot 期间 网关 startup 当 permitted so active-内存 recall can call `memory_search` 和 `memory_get` 不适用 requiring an explicit `插件.slots.内存` entry, while preserving `插件.slots.内存: "none"`.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/startup: load the default `memory-core` slot during Gateway startup when permitted so active-memory recall can call `memory_search` and `memory_get` without requiring an explicit `plugins.slots.memory` entry, while preserving `plugins.slots.memory: "none"`.

changes.title: 插件/CLI: prefer native require 为了 compiled bundled 插件 JavaScript 之前 jiti so read-only 配置, status, device, 和 node commands 避免 unnecessary transform overhead 在 slow hosts. 修复 #62842. Thanks @Effet.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/CLI: prefer native require for compiled bundled plugin JavaScript before jiti so read-only config, status, device, and node commands avoid unnecessary transform overhead on slow hosts. Fixes #62842. Thanks @Effet.

changes.title: 插件/compat: inventory 诊断工具-side deprecation migrations separately 从 runtime 插件 compatibility so release sweeps 保留 needed repairs while enforcing dated removal Windows. Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.rawTitle: Local models: classify terminated, reset, closed, timeout, and aborted model-call failures and attach a process memory snapshot to the diagnostic event, making LM Studio/Ollama RAM-pressure failures easier to prove from stability bundles. Refs #65551. Thanks @BigWiLLi111.

items.title: Local 模型: pass configured provider request timeouts through OpenAI SDK transports 和 the 模型 idle watchdog so long-running local 或 custom OpenAI-compatible streams use one 超时 knob 而不是 hitting the SDK's 10-minute default 或 the 120s idle default. 修复 #63663. Thanks @aidiffuser.
items.rawTitle: Local models: pass configured provider request timeouts through OpenAI SDK transports and the model idle watchdog so long-running local or custom OpenAI-compatible streams use one timeout knob instead of hitting the SDK's 10-minute default or the 120s idle default. Fixes #63663. Thanks @aidiffuser.

items.title: CLI/网关: treat local restart probe policy closes 为了 connect, exact `device required`, pairing, 和 认证 failures as 网关 reachability proof 不适用 accepting empty, broad standalone 令牌/password/scope/role, 或 pair-substring 1008 close reasons. 修复 #48771; carries forward #48801; related #63491. Thanks @MarsDoge 和 @genoooool.
items.rawTitle: CLI/Gateway: treat local restart probe policy closes for connect, exact `device required`, pairing, and auth failures as Gateway reachability proof without accepting empty, broad standalone token/password/scope/role, or pair-substring 1008 close reasons. Fixes #48771; carries forward #48801; related #63491. Thanks @MarsDoge and @genoooool.

items.title: Cron: treat isolated run-level Agent failures as job errors even 当 no reply payload is produced, synthesizing a safe 错误 payload so 模型/provider failures increment 错误 counters 和 trigger failure notifications 而不是 clearing as successful. 修复 #43604; carries forward #43631. Thanks @SPFAdvisors.
items.rawTitle: Cron: treat isolated run-level agent failures as job errors even when no reply payload is produced, synthesizing a safe error payload so model/provider failures increment error counters and trigger failure notifications instead of clearing as successful. Fixes #43604; carries forward #43631. Thanks @SPFAdvisors.

items.title: 网关/startup: split lightweight HTTP 认证 helpers away 从 模型-override helpers so 网关 bind no longer imports 模型 catalog selection while wiring base HTTP routes. Thanks @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/startup: split lightweight HTTP auth helpers away from model-override helpers so Gateway bind no longer imports model catalog selection while wiring base HTTP routes. Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.title: Codex harness: normalize cached input tokens 之前 session/context accounting so prompt cache reads are not double-counted 在 `/status`, `session_status`, 或 persisted `sessionEntry.totalTokens`. 修复 #69298. Thanks @richardmqq.
items.rawTitle: Codex harness: normalize cached input tokens before session/context accounting so prompt cache reads are not double-counted in `/status`, `session_status`, or persisted `sessionEntry.totalTokens`. Fixes #69298. Thanks @richardmqq.

items.title: Logging: propagate internal request trace scopes through 网关 HTTP requests 和 WebSocket frames so file logs, diagnostic events, Agent run traces, 模型-call traces, OTEL spans, 和 trusted provider `traceparent` headers share a correlatable `traceId` 不适用 logging raw request 或 模型 content. 修复 #40353. Thanks @liangruochong44-界面.
items.rawTitle: Logging: propagate internal request trace scopes through Gateway HTTP requests and WebSocket frames so file logs, diagnostic events, agent run traces, model-call traces, OTEL spans, and trusted provider `traceparent` headers share a correlatable `traceId` without logging raw request or model content. Fixes #40353. Thanks @liangruochong44-ui.

items.title: Logging: write validated diagnostic trace context as top-level `traceId`, `spanId`, `parentSpanId`, 和 `traceFlags` fields 在 file-log JSONL records so traced requests 和 模型 calls are easier to correlate 在 log processors. Refs #40353. Thanks @liangruochong44-界面.
items.rawTitle: Logging: write validated diagnostic trace context as top-level `traceId`, `spanId`, `parentSpanId`, and `traceFlags` fields in file-log JSONL records so traced requests and model calls are easier to correlate in log processors. Refs #40353. Thanks @liangruochong44-ui.

items.rawTitle: Providers/Ollama: forward whitelisted native Ollama model params such as `temperature`, `top_p`, and top-level `think` so users can disable API-level thinking or tune local models from config without proxy shims. items.title: Providers/Ollama: expose native Ollama thinking effort levels so `/think max` is accepted 为了 reasoning-capable Ollama 模型 和 maps to Ollama's highest supported `think` effort. 修复 #71584. Thanks @g0st1n.
items.rawTitle: Providers/Ollama: expose native Ollama thinking effort levels so `/think max` is accepted for reasoning-capable Ollama models and maps to Ollama's highest supported `think` effort. Fixes #71584. Thanks @g0st1n.

items.title: Providers/模型: honor provider-level `contextWindow`, `contextTokens`, 和 `maxTokens` as defaults 当 resolving discovered 模型, so local Ollama 和 other self-hosted providers can cap all 模型 不适用 repeating per-模型 entries. 修复 #44786; carries forward #44955. Thanks @voltwake 和 @maweibin.
items.rawTitle: Providers/models: honor provider-level `contextWindow`, `contextTokens`, and `maxTokens` as defaults when resolving discovered models, so local Ollama and other self-hosted providers can cap all models without repeating per-model entries. items.title: Providers/Ollama: accept OpenAI SDK-style `baseURL` as an alias 为了 `baseUrl` across discovery, streaming, setup pulls, embeddings, 和 web search so remote Ollama hosts are not 静默地 ignored. 修复 #62533; supersedes #62549. Thanks @Julien-BKK 和 @Linux2010.
items.rawTitle: Providers/Ollama: accept OpenAI SDK-style `baseURL` as an alias for `baseUrl` across discovery, streaming, setup pulls, embeddings, and web search so remote Ollama hosts are not silently ignored. Fixes #62533; supersedes #62549. Thanks @Julien-BKK and @Linux2010.

items.title: Providers/Ollama: scope synthetic local 认证 和 embedding bearer headers to declared Ollama host boundaries so cloud keys are not sent to local/self-hosted embedding endpoints 和 remote/cloud Ollama endpoints no longer receive the `ollama-local` marker as if it were a real 令牌. changes.title: TTS/WhatsApp: 添加 `/tts latest` read-aloud 支持 使用 duplicate suppression 和 `/tts chat 在|off|default` session-scoped auto-TTS overrides, completing the 在-demand 语音-note UX 为了 current-chat replies. 修复 #66032.

changes.title: TTS/channels: 解决 channel 和 account TTS overrides generically, enabling 飞书 和 QQBot accounts to deep-merge `channels.<channel>.accounts.<id>.tts` over global 和 per-Agent TTS 配置. Thanks @sahilsatralkar.

changes.title: TTS/Agent: 允许 `Agent.list[].tts` to override global `messages.tts` 为了 per-Agent voices, 和 make `/tts audio`, `/tts status`, 和 the `tts` Agent 工具 honor the active 语音/provider override while keeping shared provider credentials 和 preferences 在 the existing TTS 配置 surface.

changes.title: Auto-reply: poison inbound message dedupe 之后 replay-unsafe provider/runtime failures so retries stay safe 之前 visible progress 但是 cannot duplicate messages 之后 block output, 工具 side effects, 或 session progress. 修复 #69303; keeps #58549 和 #64606 as duplicate validation. changes.title: Logging/sessions: apply configured redaction patterns to persisted session transcript text 和 accept escaped character classes 在 safe custom redaction regexes, so transcript JSONL no longer keeps matching sensitive text 在 the clear. 修复 #42982. Thanks @panpan0000.

changes.title: 插件/CLI: let flag-driven `openclaw channels 添加` install the selected channel 插件 从 its default source 不适用 opening an interactive prompt, fixing published npm Telegram setup 在 stdin-closed automation.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/CLI: let flag-driven `openclaw channels add` install the selected channel plugin from its default source without opening an interactive prompt, fixing published npm Telegram setup in stdin-closed automation.

changes.title: 插件/install: materialize 插件-owned root chunks 在 external bundled-runtime mirrors so staged 插件 dependencies 解决 under native ESM 在 packaged installs. 修复 #72058; supersedes #72084. Thanks @amnesia106 和 @drvoss.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/install: materialize plugin-owned root chunks in external bundled-runtime mirrors so staged plugin dependencies resolve under native ESM in packaged installs. Fixes #72058; supersedes #72084. Thanks @amnesia106 and @drvoss.

changes.rawTitle: Plugins/CLI: prefer native require for compiled bundled plugin JavaScript before jiti so read-only config, status, device, and node commands avoid unnecessary transform overhead on slow hosts. Fixes #62842. Thanks @Effet.

changes.rawTitle: Plugins/compat: inventory doctor-side deprecation migrations separately from runtime plugin compatibility so release sweeps preserve needed repairs while enforcing dated removal windows. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Codex/Agent: translate `--thinking minimal` to `low` 为了 modern Codex 模型 (gpt-5.5, gpt-5.4, gpt-5.4-mini, gpt-5.2) at request build time so the first turn is accepted 而不是 paying a wasted call + 重试-使用-low fallback. Older Codex 模型 still receive `minimal` directly. 修复 #71946. Thanks @hclsys.
changes.rawTitle: Codex/agent: translate `--thinking minimal` to `low` for modern Codex models (gpt-5.5, gpt-5.4, gpt-5.4-mini, gpt-5.2) at request build time so the first turn is accepted instead of paying a wasted call + retry-with-low fallback. Older Codex models still receive `minimal` directly. Fixes #71946. Thanks @hclsys.

changes.title: 插件/uninstall: 移除 tracked 插件 files 从 their recorded managed extensions root even 当 the current state directory points somewhere else, so `openclaw 插件 uninstall --force` does not leave the 插件 discoverable. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: 网关/install: refresh loaded 网关 service installs 当 the current service embeds stale 网关 认证 而不是 returning already-installed, avoiding LaunchAgent 令牌-mismatch loops 之后 令牌 rotation. 修复 #70752. Thanks @hyspacex.

changes.title: Logging: rotate file logs at `logging.maxFileBytes`, keep bounded numbered archives, 和 make long-lived rolling loggers follow the current-day file 而不是 suppressing diagnostics 或 writing stale dated files. 修复 #58583 和 #62381. Thanks @jpeghead 和 @zhaoleink.

changes.title: 网关/更新: fail package updates 当 the restarted managed 网关 reports the wrong version, including fallback restarts 和 JSON mode, avoiding false-success mixed-version restarts 之后 macOS LaunchAgent updates. 修复 #71835. Thanks @abhinas90 和 @jsompis.

changes.rawTitle: Subagents/memory: keep inter-session completion wakes out of memory and dreaming session exports, and strip internal runtime-context blocks from realtime Control UI chat events.

changes.title: Agent/Claude: treat zero-令牌 empty `停止` turns as failed provider output, 重试 once, repair replay, 和 允许 configured 模型 fallback 而不是 preserving them as successful silent replies. 修复 #71880. Thanks @MagnaAI.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/Claude: treat zero-token empty `stop` turns as failed provider output, retry once, repair replay, and allow configured model fallback instead of preserving them as successful silent replies. Fixes #71880. Thanks @MagnaAI.

changes.title: Tasks: normalize task lifecycle timestamps at create, 更新, 和 restore time, 和 report retained lost tasks as audit warnings until their cleanup window expires. (#71871) Thanks @likewen-tech.
changes.rawTitle: Tasks: normalize task lifecycle timestamps at create, update, and restore time, and report retained lost tasks as audit warnings until their cleanup window expires. (#71871) Thanks @likewen-tech.

changes.title: Diagnostics/OTEL: treat normal early 模型 stream cleanup as a completed 模型 call 而不是 exporting a misleading `StreamAbandoned` 错误 span. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Diagnostics/OTEL: treat normal early model stream cleanup as a completed model call instead of exporting a misleading `StreamAbandoned` error span. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 网关/pairing: 停止 corrupt 或 unreadable device/node pairing stores 从 being treated as empty state, preserving `paired.json` 为了 repair 而不是 overwriting approved pairings. 修复 #71873. Thanks @iret77.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/pairing: stop corrupt or unreadable device/node pairing stores from being treated as empty state, preserving `paired.json` for repair instead of overwriting approved pairings. Fixes #71873. Thanks @iret77.

changes.title: ACP: keep `/acp` management commands, plus local `/status` 和 `/unfocus`, 在 the 网关 路径 inside ACP-bound threads so they are not consumed as ACP prompt text. 修复 #66298. Thanks @kindomLee.
changes.rawTitle: ACP: keep `/acp` management commands, plus local `/status` and `/unfocus`, on the Gateway path inside ACP-bound threads so they are not consumed as ACP prompt text. Fixes #66298. Thanks @kindomLee.

changes.title: ACPX: 停止 probing ACP Agent 期间 normal 网关 startup; the embedded backend 现在 registers 不适用 spawning Codex/ACP child processes unless `OPENCLAW_ACPX_RUNTIME_STARTUP_PROBE=1` is explicitly set.
changes.rawTitle: ACPX: stop probing ACP agents during normal Gateway startup; the embedded backend now registers without spawning Codex/ACP child processes unless `OPENCLAW_ACPX_RUNTIME_STARTUP_PROBE=1` is explicitly set.

changes.title: CLI/image edit: accept `--size`, `--aspect-ratio`, 和 `--resolution` 在 `openclaw infer image edit` 和 report all supported edit flags 从 `capability inspect image.edit`. Thanks @Pinghuachiu.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/image edit: accept `--size`, `--aspect-ratio`, and `--resolution` on `openclaw infer image edit` and report all supported edit flags from `capability inspect image.edit`. Thanks @Pinghuachiu.

changes.title: ACP: wait 为了 the configured runtime backend to become healthy 之前 startup identity reconciliation, avoiding transient acpx warnings 期间 网关 boot. 修复 #40566.
changes.rawTitle: ACP: wait for the configured runtime backend to become healthy before startup identity reconciliation, avoiding transient acpx warnings during Gateway boot. Fixes #40566.

changes.title: Channels/ACP bindings: time out configured binding readiness checks 而不是 letting Discord preflight hang forever 当 an ACP target never settles. 修复 #68776.
changes.rawTitle: Channels/ACP bindings: time out configured binding readiness checks instead of letting Discord preflight hang forever when an ACP target never settles. Fixes #68776.

changes.title: Control 界面: hide the chat loading skeleton 期间 background history reloads 当 existing messages 或 active stream content are already visible, avoiding reload flashes 在 high-latency local gateways. 修复 #71844. Thanks @WolvenRA.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI: hide the chat loading skeleton during background history reloads when existing messages or active stream content are already visible, avoiding reload flashes on high-latency local gateways. Fixes #71844. Thanks @WolvenRA.

changes.title: Control 界面: keep locally optimistic chat messages visible 当 a history reload temporarily returns empty, avoiding lost first-turn messages 在 high-latency gateways. 修复 #71878. Thanks @WolvenRA.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI: keep locally optimistic chat messages visible when a history reload temporarily returns empty, avoiding lost first-turn messages on high-latency gateways. Fixes #71878. Thanks @WolvenRA.

changes.title: Control 界面: keep chat history limits 基于 visible messages 之后 filtering heartbeat 和 control-only transcript rows, so recent hidden entries no longer make older visible replies disappear. Thanks @WolvenRA.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI: keep chat history limits based on visible messages after filtering heartbeat and control-only transcript rows, so recent hidden entries no longer make older visible replies disappear. Thanks @WolvenRA.

changes.title: Agent/images: scrub old `[media attached: ...]`, `[Image: source: ...]`, 和 `media://inbound/...` markers 从 pruned 模型 replay context so stale media refs are not rehydrated as fresh prompt images. 修复 #71868. Thanks @jmeadlock.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/images: scrub old `[media attached: ...]`, `[Image: source: ...]`, and `media://inbound/...` markers from pruned model replay context so stale media refs are not rehydrated as fresh prompt images. Fixes #71868. Thanks @jmeadlock.

changes.title: Docker/Bonjour: 禁用 Bonjour/mDNS advertising 通过 default 为了 bundled Compose gateways 在 bridge networking, while keeping host/macvlan opt-在 使用 `OPENCLAW_DISABLE_BONJOUR=0`. 修复 #71879. Thanks @gbballpack.
changes.rawTitle: Docker/Bonjour: disable Bonjour/mDNS advertising by default for bundled Compose gateways on bridge networking, while keeping host/macvlan opt-in with `OPENCLAW_DISABLE_BONJOUR=0`. Fixes #71879. Thanks @gbballpack.

changes.title: CLI/status: label the OpenClaw Serve/Funnel 设置 as `Tailscale exposure` 和 show daemon state separately 当 available, so `网关.tailscale.mode: "off"` no longer reads like the Tailscale daemon is stopped. 修复 #71790. Thanks @pesvobodak.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/status: label the OpenClaw Serve/Funnel setting as `Tailscale exposure` and show daemon state separately when available, so `gateway.tailscale.mode: "off"` no longer reads like the Tailscale daemon is stopped. Fixes #71790. Thanks @pesvobodak.

changes.title: 插件/Bonjour: 停止 ciao mDNS watchdog failures 从 looping forever 当 the advertiser stays stuck 在 `probing` 或 `announcing`; Bonjour 现在 disables itself 为了 the current 网关 process 之后 repeated failed restarts while the 网关 keeps running. 修复 #69011. Thanks @siddharthaagarwalofficial-ux, @FiredMosquito831, 和 @spikefcz.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/Bonjour: stop ciao mDNS watchdog failures from looping forever when the advertiser stays stuck in `probing` or `announcing`; Bonjour now disables itself for the current Gateway process after repeated failed restarts while the Gateway keeps running. Fixes #69011. Thanks @siddharthaagarwalofficial-ux, @FiredMosquito831, and @spikefcz.

changes.title: 网关/Fly.io: seed Control 界面 allowed origins 从 the actual runtime bind 和 port so CLI-driven non-loopback starts do not 崩溃 之前 配置 exists. 修复 #71823.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/Fly.io: seed Control UI allowed origins from the actual runtime bind and port so CLI-driven non-loopback starts do not crash before config exists. Fixes #71823.

changes.title: macOS/remote SSH: keep discovered 网关 hosts 在 `网关.remote.sshTarget` while pinning SSH transport URLs to the local loopback tunnel, so 浏览器 automation does not regress 进入 blocked non-loopback `ws://` endpoints. 修复 #67336.
changes.rawTitle: macOS/remote SSH: keep discovered gateway hosts in `gateway.remote.sshTarget` while pinning SSH transport URLs to the local loopback tunnel, so browser automation does not regress into blocked non-loopback `ws://` endpoints. Fixes #67336.

changes.title: 网关/代理: bootstrap env 代理 dispatching 从 direct 网关 startup so provider 和 插件 network requests honor `HTTPS_PROXY`/`HTTP_PROXY` 之前 the first embedded Agent attempt runs. (#71833) Thanks @mjamiv.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/proxy: bootstrap env proxy dispatching from direct Gateway startup so provider and plugin network requests honor `HTTPS_PROXY`/`HTTP_PROXY` before the first embedded agent attempt runs. (#71833) Thanks @mjamiv.

changes.title: 插件/runtime deps: verify clean npm installs actually place requested bundled runtime packages 在 the managed install root, reporting exact missing specs 而不是 a false successful repair. (#71883) Thanks @Solvely-Colin.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/runtime deps: verify clean npm installs actually place requested bundled runtime packages in the managed install root, reporting exact missing specs instead of a false successful repair. (#71883) Thanks @Solvely-Colin.

changes.title: 插件/discovery: ignore stale `插件.load.paths` aliases that point back at packaged bundled 插件 directories 和 have 诊断工具 移除 them, keeping bundled 插件 在 the runtime-deps staging 路径.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/discovery: ignore stale `plugins.load.paths` aliases that point back at packaged bundled plugin directories and have doctor remove them, keeping bundled plugins on the runtime-deps staging path.

changes.title: 模型/LM Studio: 保留 `@iq*` quant suffixes 在 模型 refs 和 provider matching so `/模型 lmstudio/...@iq3_xxs` keeps the exact LM Studio variant. 修复 #71474. (#71486) Thanks @Bartok9, @XinwuC, 和 @Sanjays2402.
changes.rawTitle: Models/LM Studio: preserve `@iq*` quant suffixes in model refs and provider matching so `/model lmstudio/...@iq3_xxs` keeps the exact LM Studio variant. Fixes #71474. (#71486) Thanks @Bartok9, @XinwuC, and @Sanjays2402.

changes.title: Matrix/cron: 保留 the live Matrix delivery target 当 creating implicit announce reminder jobs so mixed-case room IDs are not reconstructed 从 lowercased session keys. 修复 #71798.
changes.rawTitle: Matrix/cron: preserve the live Matrix delivery target when creating implicit announce reminder jobs so mixed-case room IDs are not reconstructed from lowercased session keys. Fixes #71798.

changes.title: 飞书: accept Schema 2.0 card action callbacks that report `context.open_chat_id` 而不是 legacy `context.chat_id`, so button callbacks no longer drop as malformed. 修复 #71670. Thanks @eddy1068.
changes.rawTitle: Feishu: accept Schema 2.0 card action callbacks that report `context.open_chat_id` instead of legacy `context.chat_id`, so button callbacks no longer drop as malformed. Fixes #71670. Thanks @eddy1068.

changes.title: 飞书: keep synthetic card-action 和 bot-menu ids out 的 platform reply targets, using the real card callback message id 当 飞书 provides one 和 plain-sending otherwise. 修复 #71673. Thanks @eddy1068.
changes.rawTitle: Feishu: keep synthetic card-action and bot-menu ids out of platform reply targets, using the real card callback message id when Feishu provides one and plain-sending otherwise. Fixes #71673. Thanks @eddy1068.

changes.rawTitle: Plugins/QQ Bot: prefer an installed QQ Bot plugin that declares it replaces the bundled `qqbot` channel, preventing duplicate `qqbot_channel_api` and `qqbot_remind` tool registration noise. Fixes #63102.

changes.title: 浏览器 automation: keep stable tab ids 和 labels attached 当 Chromium replaces the raw target 之后 form submissions 或 other action-triggered navigations, 和 return the replacement `targetId` 从 `/act` 当 the match is provable. 修复 #46137.
changes.rawTitle: Browser automation: keep stable tab ids and labels attached when Chromium replaces the raw target after form submissions or other action-triggered navigations, and return the replacement `targetId` from `/act` when the match is provable. Fixes #46137.

changes.title: QQ Bot: make `qqbot_remind` schedule, list, 和 移除 网关 cron jobs directly 为了 owner-authorized senders 而不是 returning `cronParams` 和 relying 在 a follow-up generic `cron` 工具 call. 修复 #70865. (#70937) Thanks @GaosCode.
changes.rawTitle: QQ Bot: make `qqbot_remind` schedule, list, and remove Gateway cron jobs directly for owner-authorized senders instead of returning `cronParams` and relying on a follow-up generic `cron` tool call. Fixes #70865. (#70937) Thanks @GaosCode.

changes.title: Agent/ACP: hide `sessions_spawn` ACP runtime options unless an ACP backend is loaded, 和 make `/acp 诊断工具` call out `插件.允许` blocking bundled `acpx`. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/ACP: hide `sessions_spawn` ACP runtime options unless an ACP backend is loaded, and make `/acp doctor` call out `plugins.allow` blocking bundled `acpx`. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.rawTitle: Agents/Codex: keep ACP prompt/skill routing hidden unless an ACP runtime backend is available, and warn in doctor when enabled Codex plugin configs still route `openai-codex/*` models through PI. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.rawTitle: Media delivery: avoid sending generated image attachments twice when the assistant reply already includes explicit `MEDIA:` lines for the same turn, and reject unsafe remote `MEDIA:` URLs before delivery. Thanks @pashpashpash.

changes.title: Codex harness: ignore retryable app-server 错误 notifications 之后 Codex recovers, 和 保留 the real nested 错误 message 为了 terminal app-server failures 而不是 replacing it 使用 a generic failure. Thanks @pashpashpash.
changes.rawTitle: Codex harness: ignore retryable app-server error notifications after Codex recovers, and preserve the real nested error message for terminal app-server failures instead of replacing it with a generic failure. Thanks @pashpashpash.

changes.title: Agent/Codex: prepare native Codex sub-Agent session metadata 不适用 a nested 网关 session patch 和 添加 a focused Docker smoke 为了 the app-server sub-Agent 路径. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/Codex: prepare native Codex sub-agent session metadata without a nested Gateway session patch and add a focused Docker smoke for the app-server sub-agent path. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Agent/subagents: keep queued subagent announces session-only 当 the requester has no external channel target, avoiding ambiguous multi-channel delivery failures. 修复 #59201. Thanks @larrylhollan.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/subagents: keep queued subagent announces session-only when the requester has no external channel target, avoiding ambiguous multi-channel delivery failures. Fixes #59201. Thanks @larrylhollan.

changes.rawTitle: Image understanding: preserve configured provider-prefixed vision model metadata when callers request the model without the provider prefix, so custom image models keep their `input: ["text", "image"]` capability. Fixes #33185. Thanks @Kobe9312 and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/install: restore the previous 插件 index records if a concurrent 配置 write conflict interrupts install, 更新, 或 uninstall metadata commits. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/install: restore the previous plugin index records if a concurrent config write conflict interrupts install, update, or uninstall metadata commits. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: 插件/install: reject native 插件 archives that do not include a valid `openclaw.插件.json`, preventing manifestless archives 从 writing install records that later show missing-manifest diagnostics. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/install: reject native plugin archives that do not include a valid `openclaw.plugin.json`, preventing manifestless archives from writing install records that later show missing-manifest diagnostics. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: 插件/uninstall: 移除 tracked managed 插件 install directories even 当 the persisted install 路径 differs 从 the default id-derived target, while still refusing deletes outside the managed extensions root. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/uninstall: remove tracked managed plugin install directories even when the persisted install path differs from the default id-derived target, while still refusing deletes outside the managed extensions root. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: 插件/更新: restore previous 插件 index records if core 更新 或 channel setup hits a concurrent 配置 write conflict 之后 插件 metadata changes. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/update: restore previous plugin index records if core update or channel setup hits a concurrent config write conflict after plugin metadata changes. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: 插件/onboarding: defer channel/provider 插件 install records until the owning 配置 write commits, keeping setup failures 从 advancing the 插件 index ahead 的 `openclaw.json`. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/onboarding: defer channel/provider plugin install records until the owning config write commits, keeping setup failures from advancing the plugin index ahead of `openclaw.json`. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: 插件/配置: route configure 和 Agent setup writes 使用 pending 插件 install records through the 插件 index commit helper so provider onboarding metadata is not stripped 通过 plain 配置 writes. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/config: route configure and agent setup writes with pending plugin install records through the plugin index commit helper so provider onboarding metadata is not stripped by plain config writes. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: 插件/channels: merge pending channel 插件 install records 使用 the existing 插件 index 之前 配置 writes, preserving unrelated tracked installs 期间 channel setup, 解决, 移除, 和 capability repair flows. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/channels: merge pending channel plugin install records with the existing plugin index before config writes, preserving unrelated tracked installs during channel setup, resolve, remove, and capability repair flows. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: 插件/配置: defer shipped `插件.installs` index migration 期间 配置 writes until the guarded 配置 commit window 和 roll it back if the 配置 write fails 之前 commit. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/config: defer shipped `plugins.installs` index migration during config writes until the guarded config commit window and roll it back if the config write fails before commit. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: Sessions: keep embedded runtime context out 的 the visible user prompt 通过 sending it as a hidden next-turn custom message, 和 teach 诊断工具 to repair affected 2026.4.24 transcripts 使用 duplicated prompt-rewrite branches. 修复 #71761.
changes.rawTitle: Sessions: keep embedded runtime context out of the visible user prompt by sending it as a hidden next-turn custom message, and teach doctor to repair affected 2026.4.24 transcripts with duplicated prompt-rewrite branches. Fixes #71761.

changes.title: 网关/subagents: keep direct-loopback backend RPCs authenticated 使用 the shared 网关 令牌/password off stale CLI paired-device scope baselines, so internal calls no longer hit `scope-upgrade` pairing prompts while remote, 浏览器, node, device-令牌, 和 explicit-device paths still require normal pairing approval. 修复 #63548.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/subagents: keep direct-loopback backend RPCs authenticated with the shared gateway token/password off stale CLI paired-device scope baselines, so internal calls no longer hit `scope-upgrade` pairing prompts while remote, browser, node, device-token, and explicit-device paths still require normal pairing approval. Fixes #63548.

changes.title: Providers/Azure OpenAI: give deployment-scoped image generation requests a longer 600s default 超时 so slow `gpt-image-2` generations can complete 不适用 a per-call `timeoutMs`. 修复 #71705. Thanks @voytas75.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/Azure OpenAI: give deployment-scoped image generation requests a longer 600s default timeout so slow `gpt-image-2` generations can complete without a per-call `timeoutMs`. Fixes #71705. Thanks @voytas75.

changes.title: 网关/插件: link source-checkout bundled runtime dependency caches 而不是 recursively copying `node_modules` 在 the 网关 main thread, preventing local status, node, 和 skill probes 从 timing out 期间 startup cache restores.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/plugins: link source-checkout bundled runtime dependency caches instead of recursively copying `node_modules` on the gateway main thread, preventing local status, node, and skill probes from timing out during startup cache restores.

changes.title: Skills/remote nodes: only expose remote macOS skill bins 为了 connected nodes, clear stale bin matches 当 node probes fail, 和 include probe 命令, 超时, bin count, 和 connection state 在 超时 logs.
changes.rawTitle: Skills/remote nodes: only expose remote macOS skill bins for connected nodes, clear stale bin matches when node probes fail, and include probe command, timeout, bin count, and connection state in timeout logs.

changes.title: Skills/remote nodes: recognize `system.which` object-map responses 当 probing connected macOS nodes, so Linux gateways can expose macOS-only skills such as Apple Notes 当 the required binaries are installed remotely. 修复 #71877. Thanks @miguelarios.
changes.rawTitle: Skills/remote nodes: recognize `system.which` object-map responses when probing connected macOS nodes, so Linux gateways can expose macOS-only skills such as Apple Notes when the required binaries are installed remotely. Fixes #71877. Thanks @miguelarios.

changes.title: CLI/网关: keep diagnostic probes 从 creating first-time read-only device pairings, while still reusing cached device tokens 为了 detailed read probes. 修复 #71766. Thanks @SunboZ.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/gateway: keep diagnostic probes from creating first-time read-only device pairings, while still reusing cached device tokens for detailed read probes. Fixes #71766. Thanks @SunboZ.

changes.rawTitle: CLI/plugins: keep `message` startup, `channels logs`, `agents delete`, and `agents set-identity` off broad plugin preloading; message delivery still loads plugins when the action actually runs.

changes.title: Image understanding: 解决 configured image 模型 such as local LM Studio vision entries 之前 reporting `Unknown 模型` 当 the discovery registry has not registered that provider. 修复 #66486. Thanks @zhanggpcsu.

changes.title: QQ Bot: ignore self-echoed bot messages using the outbound ref-index marker, preventing mirrored replies 从 re-entering the Agent loop while still allowing users to quote bot replies. 修复 #71912. Thanks @wangyc6003.
changes.rawTitle: QQ Bot: ignore self-echoed bot messages using the outbound ref-index marker, preventing mirrored replies from re-entering the agent loop while still allowing users to quote bot replies. Fixes #71912. Thanks @wangyc6003.

changes.title: Sessions: separate reset freshness 从 session-store `updatedAt`, so heartbeat, cron, exec, 和 网关 bookkeeping no longer 防止 configured daily/idle resets 从 rolling long-running channel sessions. 修复 #68315, #63732, #63820, 和 #69083. Thanks @maxatv, @longhairedsi, @bradfreels, 和 @akessel56.
changes.rawTitle: Sessions: separate reset freshness from session-store `updatedAt`, so heartbeat, cron, exec, and gateway bookkeeping no longer prevent configured daily/idle resets from rolling long-running channel sessions. changes.title: Sessions: clear queued system-event notices 期间 `/new`, `/reset`, 网关 `sessions.reset`, 和 daily/idle rollover so stale background updates cannot leak 进入 the first prompt 的 the fresh session. 修复 #66864. Thanks @opeyio, @Magicray1217, 和 @cedillarack.
changes.rawTitle: Sessions: clear queued system-event notices during `/new`, `/reset`, gateway `sessions.reset`, and daily/idle rollover so stale background updates cannot leak into the first prompt of the fresh session. Fixes #66864. Thanks @opeyio, @Magicray1217, and @cedillarack.

changes.rawTitle: CLI/agents: keep `agents bind`, `agents unbind`, and `agents bindings` on setup-safe channel metadata paths so they do not preload bundled plugin runtimes or stage runtime dependencies. Fixes #71743.

changes.rawTitle: Windows/native: keep CLI startup and bundled provider plugin loading off Windows ESM raw-path failure paths, fixing native onboarding/install smoke on Node 24.

changes.rawTitle: Plugins/install: force plugin dependency installs to stay project-local even when inherited npm config requests global installs, so successful installs still materialize the plugin's staged `node_modules`.

changes.title: 插件/runtime deps: 复用 existing external bundled-插件 stage roots 当 mirrored 插件 roots are inspected 重新, avoiding second-generation `openclaw-unknown-*` stages 和 repeated first-turn restaging. 修复 #71599.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/runtime deps: reuse existing external bundled-plugin stage roots when mirrored plugin roots are inspected again, avoiding second-generation `openclaw-unknown-*` stages and repeated first-turn restaging. Fixes #71599.

changes.title: 插件/诊断工具: keep bundled 插件 runtime-dependency repairs inside the managed OpenClaw stage even 当 user npm prefix/global 配置 points npm at `$HOME/node_modules`. 修复 #71730.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/doctor: keep bundled plugin runtime-dependency repairs inside the managed OpenClaw stage even when user npm prefix/global config points npm at `$HOME/node_modules`. Fixes #71730.

changes.title: ACP/sessions_spawn: reject normal OpenClaw 配置 Agent ids 当 callers explicitly request `runtime="acp"`, while allowing Agent configured 使用 `runtime.type="acp"` to 解决 to their ACP harness id. 修复 #63914.
changes.rawTitle: ACP/sessions_spawn: reject normal OpenClaw config agent ids when callers explicitly request `runtime="acp"`, while allowing agents configured with `runtime.type="acp"` to resolve to their ACP harness id. Fixes #63914.

changes.title: ACP/sessions_spawn: apply `runTimeoutSeconds` to ACP child turns 和 dispatch those turns 在 the background subagent lane, so quota-stalled ACP harnesses do not occupy the main Agent lane indefinitely. 修复 #68823.
changes.rawTitle: ACP/sessions_spawn: apply `runTimeoutSeconds` to ACP child turns and dispatch those turns on the background subagent lane, so quota-stalled ACP harnesses do not occupy the main agent lane indefinitely. Fixes #68823.

changes.rawTitle: ACP/oneshot: reconcile runtime session identity before closing completed oneshot ACP runs, so finished `sessions.json` entries do not stay stuck with `acp.identity.state="pending"`.

changes.title: ACP/模型: document that non-Codex ACP 模型 overrides require adapter 支持 为了 ACP `模型` plus `session/set_model`, so unsupported harnesses fail clearly 而不是 静默地 falling back to their defaults.
