changes.title: 插件/Bonjour: 停止 the 网关 从 崩溃-looping 在 `CIAO PROBING CANCELLED` 当 the mDNS watchdog cancels a stuck probe. Restores the rejection-handler wiring dropped 期间 the bonjour 插件 migration 和 shares unhandled-rejection state across module instances so 插件-staged copies 的 `openclaw/插件-sdk/runtime` register 进入 the same handler set the host consults. Especially affects Docker 在 macOS, where mDNS probing reliably hits the watchdog. Thanks @troyhitch.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/Bonjour: stop the gateway from crash-looping on `CIAO PROBING CANCELLED` when the mDNS watchdog cancels a stuck probe. Restores the rejection-handler wiring dropped during the bonjour plugin migration and shares unhandled-rejection state across module instances so plugin-staged copies of `openclaw/plugin-sdk/runtime` register into the same handler set the host consults. Especially affects Docker on macOS, where mDNS probing reliably hits the watchdog. Thanks @troyhitch.

changes.title: Google Meet: report pinned Chrome nodes as offline 或 missing capabilities 在 setup/join diagnostics, keep inaccessible nodes out 的 auto-selection, 和 preflight local BlackHole/SoX requirements 之前 Agent try local Chrome.
changes.rawTitle: Google Meet: report pinned Chrome nodes as offline or missing capabilities in setup/join diagnostics, keep inaccessible nodes out of auto-selection, and preflight local BlackHole/SoX requirements before agents try local Chrome.

changes.title: MiniMax music generation: switch the bundled default 模型 从 the unsupported `music-2.5+` id to the current `music-2.6` API 模型. 修复 #64870 和 addresses the music default 从 #62315. Thanks @noahclanman 和 @edwardzheng1.

changes.title: Cron: record jobs interrupted 通过 a 网关 restart as failed at their original `runningAtMs`, skip unsafe startup replay, 和 禁用 interrupted one-shot jobs so they show a visible failure 而不是 静默地 disappearing 或 duplicating work. 修复 #59056, #61343, #63657, 和 #59301. Thanks @ponchoooPenguin, @daemic24, @myradon, 和 @hikiwibot.
changes.rawTitle: Cron: record jobs interrupted by a gateway restart as failed at their original `runningAtMs`, skip unsafe startup replay, and disable interrupted one-shot jobs so they show a visible failure instead of silently disappearing or duplicating work. Fixes #59056, #61343, #63657, and #59301. Thanks @ponchoooPenguin, @daemic24, @myradon, and @hikiwibot.

changes.title: Cron 工具: recover flat top-level schedule shorthand such as `cron`, `tz`, 和 `staggerMs` 之前 网关 validation, so 模型-generated cron 添加/更新 calls 保留 cron jitter settings. Thanks @tyxben.

changes.rawTitle: Cron: hydrate flat legacy job rows with top-level `cron`, `tz`, `session`, and `message` fields into canonical schedule, target, and payload objects before startup recomputes run times. Fixes #43351.

changes.title: 浏览器/Linux: fall back to headless mode 为了 local managed profiles 在 hosts 不适用 a display server, while preserving explicit per-profile headed overrides 和 reporting the headless source. (#60953) Thanks @rrpsantos.

changes.rawTitle: Telegram: remove the startup persisted-offset `getUpdates` preflight so polling restarts do not self-conflict before the runner starts. Fixes #69304. (#69779) Thanks @chinar-amrutkar.

changes.title: Telegram: keep the polling stall watchdog active even 当 grammY reports the runner as not running while its task is still pending, so a rebuilt transport cannot leave `getUpdates` silent until a manual 网关 restart. 修复 #69064. Thanks @LDLoeb.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram: keep the polling stall watchdog active even when grammY reports the runner as not running while its task is still pending, so a rebuilt transport cannot leave `getUpdates` silent until a manual gateway restart. Fixes #69064. Thanks @LDLoeb.

changes.rawTitle: Subagents: fall back to direct completion delivery when the parent announce turn finishes without a visible payload, so child results still reach channel-backed requester sessions.

changes.rawTitle: Subagents: tell parent agents to use `sessions_yield` while waiting for child completion events, preventing GPT-5 fast runs from ending silently after spawning workers.

changes.title: GitHub Copilot: never rewrite connection-bound reasoning item IDs regardless 的 whether `encrypted_content` is present, fixing a 400 "Encrypted content item_id did not match" 错误 使用 `gpt-5.3-Codex` 和 future Codex 模型 that fall through to the forward-compat catch-all 使用 `reasoning: false`. items.title: 网关/install: refresh loaded 网关 service installs 当 the current service embeds stale 网关 认证 而不是 returning already-installed, avoiding LaunchAgent 令牌-mismatch loops 之后 令牌 rotation. 修复 #70752. Thanks @hyspacex.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/install: refresh loaded gateway service installs when the current service embeds stale gateway auth instead of returning already-installed, avoiding LaunchAgent token-mismatch loops after token rotation. Fixes #70752. Thanks @hyspacex.

items.title: 更新: ignore bundled 插件 `.openclaw-install-stage` directories 期间 global install verification 和 packaged dist pruning so leftover runtime-dep staging files do not turn successful updates 进入 `unexpected packaged dist file` failures. 修复 #71752. Thanks @waynegault.
items.rawTitle: Update: ignore bundled plugin `.openclaw-install-stage` directories during global install verification and packaged dist pruning so leftover runtime-dep staging files do not turn successful updates into `unexpected packaged dist file` failures. Fixes #71752. Thanks @waynegault.

items.title: CLI/更新: fail package updates 当 post-更新 插件 sync fails 和 refresh legacy npm 插件 install records 之前 trusting unchanged artifacts, preventing successful updates 从 restarting 使用 stale 或 failed 插件 state. Thanks @vincentkoc 和 @shakkernerd.
items.rawTitle: CLI/update: fail package updates when post-update plugin sync fails and refresh legacy npm plugin install records before trusting unchanged artifacts, preventing successful updates from restarting with stale or failed plugin state. Thanks @vincentkoc and @shakkernerd.

items.title: Release/更新: reject pre-populated bundled 插件 `.openclaw-install-stage` directories, including mixed-case 路径 variants, 之前 package inventory generation so release tarballs cannot ship poisoned runtime-dependency staging debris. 修复 #71752. Thanks @hclsys.
items.rawTitle: Release/update: reject pre-populated bundled plugin `.openclaw-install-stage` directories, including mixed-case path variants, before package inventory generation so release tarballs cannot ship poisoned runtime-dependency staging debris. Fixes #71752. Thanks @hclsys.

items.title: CLI/模型: keep Provider Index preview rows out 的 `模型 list --all --provider <id>` 当 the owning provider 插件 is disabled, preserving 配置 authority 为了 cold catalog fallbacks. Thanks @shakkernerd.
items.rawTitle: CLI/models: keep Provider Index preview rows out of `models list --all --provider <id>` when the owning provider plugin is disabled, preserving config authority for cold catalog fallbacks. Thanks @shakkernerd.

items.rawTitle: Plugins/CLI: preserve manifest name, description, format, and source metadata in cold `openclaw plugins list` output without importing plugin runtime. Thanks @shakkernerd.

items.title: 网关/services: refuse process 和 service mutations 从 an older OpenClaw binary 当 the 配置 was last written 通过 a newer version, preventing split-brain installs 从 stopping 或 rewriting newer 网关 services. 修复 #57079.

Especially affects Docker on macOS, where mDNS probing reliably hits the watchdog. Thanks @troyhitch.

items.title: Providers/Z.AI: map OpenClaw thinking controls to Z.AI's `thinking` payload 和 添加 opt-在 preserved thinking replay via `params.preserveThinking`, so GLM 5.x can keep prior `reasoning_content` 当 requested. 修复 #58680. Thanks @xuanmingguo.
items.rawTitle: Providers/Z.AI: map OpenClaw thinking controls to Z.AI's `thinking` payload and add opt-in preserved thinking replay via `params.preserveThinking`, so GLM 5.x can keep prior `reasoning_content` when requested. Fixes #58680. Thanks @xuanmingguo.

items.title: Tasks: normalize task lifecycle timestamps at create, 更新, 和 restore time, 和 report retained lost tasks as audit warnings until their cleanup window expires. (#71871) Thanks @likewen-tech.
items.rawTitle: Tasks: normalize task lifecycle timestamps at create, update, and restore time, and report retained lost tasks as audit warnings until their cleanup window expires. (#71871) Thanks @likewen-tech.

items.title: Google video generation: download direct MLDev Veo `video.uri` results 而不是 passing them through the Files API 路径, fixing 404s 之后 successful generation/polling. 修复 #71200. Thanks @panhaishan.
items.rawTitle: Google video generation: download direct MLDev Veo `video.uri` results instead of passing them through the Files API path, fixing 404s after successful generation/polling. Fixes #71200. Thanks @panhaishan.

items.title: Google video generation: fall back to the REST `predictLongRunning` Veo endpoint 为了 text-only SDK 404s while keeping reference image/video generation 在 the SDK 路径. 修复 #62309 和 #63008. (#62343) Thanks @leoleedev.
items.rawTitle: Google video generation: fall back to the REST `predictLongRunning` Veo endpoint for text-only SDK 404s while keeping reference image/video generation on the SDK path. Fixes #62309 and #63008. (#62343) Thanks @leoleedev.

items.title: CLI/Volta: respawn raw `openclaw` CLI runs through the named `node` shim 当 the current Node executable resolves to `volta-shim`, avoiding direct shim execution failures 在 non-interactive shells. 修复 #68672. Thanks @sanchezm86.
items.rawTitle: CLI/Volta: respawn raw `openclaw` CLI runs through the named `node` shim when the current Node executable resolves to `volta-shim`, avoiding direct shim execution failures in non-interactive shells. Fixes #68672. Thanks @sanchezm86.

items.title: Providers/OpenCode Go: 添加 DeepSeek V4 Pro 和 DeepSeek V4 Flash to the Go catalog while the bundled Pi registry catches up. 修复 #71587.
items.rawTitle: Providers/OpenCode Go: add DeepSeek V4 Pro and DeepSeek V4 Flash to the Go catalog while the bundled Pi registry catches up. Fixes #71587.

items.title: Providers/Venice: fill the required DeepSeek V4 `reasoning_content` placeholder 为了 `venice/deepseek-v4-pro` 和 `venice/deepseek-v4-flash` replay turns 不适用 sending native DeepSeek `thinking` controls that Venice rejects. 修复 #71628.
items.rawTitle: Providers/Venice: fill the required DeepSeek V4 `reasoning_content` placeholder for `venice/deepseek-v4-pro` and `venice/deepseek-v4-flash` replay turns without sending native DeepSeek `thinking` controls that Venice rejects. Fixes #71628.

items.title: Cron: tolerate malformed legacy job rows 在 startup, main-session system-event payloads, 和 human-readable `cron list` output so missing `state`, `payload.text`, 或 display fields no longer 崩溃 the scheduler 或 CLI. 修复 #66016, #65916, #64137, #57872, #59968, #63813, #52804, 和 #43163. (#71509) Thanks @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Cron: tolerate malformed legacy job rows in startup, main-session system-event payloads, and human-readable `cron list` output so missing `state`, `payload.text`, or display fields no longer crash the scheduler or CLI. Fixes #66016, #65916, #64137, #57872, #59968, #63813, #52804, and #43163. (#71509) Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.title: CLI backends: compact OpenClaw transcripts 之后 over-budget CLI turns 和 reseed fresh CLI sessions 从 the compacted transcript 而不是 stale external resume state. 修复 #68329. (#71916) Thanks @obviyus.
items.rawTitle: CLI backends: compact OpenClaw transcripts after over-budget CLI turns and reseed fresh CLI sessions from the compacted transcript instead of stale external resume state. Fixes #68329. (#71916) Thanks @obviyus.

items.title: 内存/Ollama: serialize Ollama 内存 embedding batches 和 添加 an inline batch 超时 override, 使用 longer defaults 为了 local/self-hosted embedding providers.
items.rawTitle: Memory/Ollama: serialize Ollama memory embedding batches and add an inline batch timeout override, with longer defaults for local/self-hosted embedding providers.

changes.title: 语音 replies get a full TTS upgrade: `/tts latest`, chat-scoped auto-TTS controls, personas, per-Agent/per-account overrides, 和 new Azure Speech, Xiaomi, Local CLI, Inworld, Volcengine, 和 ElevenLabs v3 provider coverage. Thanks @leonchui, @zoujiejun, @solar2ain, @cshape, @xuruiray, @itsuzef, 和 @barronlroth.

Thanks @leonchui, @zoujiejun, @solar2ain, @cshape, @xuruiray, @itsuzef, and @barronlroth.

changes.title: TTS/WhatsApp: 添加 `/tts latest` read-aloud 支持 使用 duplicate suppression 和 `/tts chat 在|off|default` session-scoped auto-TTS overrides, completing the 在-demand 语音-note UX 为了 current-chat replies. 修复 #66032.

changes.title: TTS/channels: 解决 channel 和 account TTS overrides generically, enabling 飞书 和 QQBot accounts to deep-merge `channels.<channel>.accounts.<id>.tts` over global 和 per-Agent TTS 配置. Thanks @sahilsatralkar.

changes.title: 插件/CLI: prefer native require 为了 compiled bundled 插件 JavaScript 之前 jiti so read-only 配置, status, device, 和 node commands 避免 unnecessary transform overhead 在 slow hosts. 修复 #62842. Thanks @Effet.

changes.rawTitle: Plugins/compat: inventory doctor-side deprecation migrations separately from runtime plugin compatibility so release sweeps preserve needed repairs while enforcing dated removal windows. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.rawTitle: Discord: keep late clicks on already-resolved exec approval buttons quiet when elevated mode auto-resolved the request, while still surfacing real approval submission failures. Fixes #66906. Thanks @rlerikse.

changes.rawTitle: Agents/subagents: deliver completed yielded-subagent results back to no-thread requester routes via direct fallback when the dormant parent announce turn produces no visible reply, and add QA-lab coverage for the regression. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.rawTitle: Gateway/Tailscale: let Tailscale-authenticated Control UI operator sessions with browser device identity skip the device-pairing round trip while still rejecting device-less and node-role connections. Refs #71986. Thanks @jokedul.

changes.rawTitle: CLI/update: retry failed npm global updates with `--omit=optional` and ignore the superseded first failure when the fallback succeeds. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: 插件/uninstall: migrate 和 reset `插件.slots.contextEngine` alongside 内存 slots 当 插件 ids 更改 或 selected 插件 are removed. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/uninstall: migrate and reset `plugins.slots.contextEngine` alongside memory slots when plugin ids change or selected plugins are removed. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.rawTitle: Agents/Discord: keep raw `Agent failed before reply` runner failures out of Discord group/channel chats and show detailed runner errors in direct chats only when `/verbose` is enabled. Thanks @codex.

changes.title: 界面/Windows: quote resolved pnpm `.cmd` launcher paths 之前 spawning 界面 install/build/test commands so Node installs under `C:\Program Files` no longer fail as `C:\Program`. 修复 #45275. Thanks @Kobevictor, @stoppieboy, 和 @iubns.
changes.rawTitle: UI/Windows: quote resolved pnpm `.cmd` launcher paths before spawning UI install/build/test commands so Node installs under `C:\Program Files` no longer fail as `C:\Program`. Fixes #45275. Thanks @Kobevictor, @stoppieboy, and @iubns.

changes.title: Codex/Agent: translate `--thinking minimal` to `low` 为了 modern Codex 模型 (gpt-5.5, gpt-5.4, gpt-5.4-mini, gpt-5.2) at request build time so the first turn is accepted 而不是 paying a wasted call + 重试-使用-low fallback. Older Codex 模型 still receive `minimal` directly. 修复 #71946. Thanks @hclsys.
changes.rawTitle: Codex/agent: translate `--thinking minimal` to `low` for modern Codex models (gpt-5.5, gpt-5.4, gpt-5.4-mini, gpt-5.2) at request build time so the first turn is accepted instead of paying a wasted call + retry-with-low fallback. Older Codex models still receive `minimal` directly. Fixes #71946. Thanks @hclsys.

changes.title: 插件/uninstall: 移除 tracked 插件 files 从 their recorded managed extensions root even 当 the current state directory points somewhere else, so `openclaw 插件 uninstall --force` does not leave the 插件 discoverable. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/uninstall: remove tracked plugin files from their recorded managed extensions root even when the current state directory points somewhere else, so `openclaw plugins uninstall --force` does not leave the plugin discoverable. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: Agent/runtime: 添加 `agentRuntime.id` as the canonical 配置 密钥, migrate legacy runtime-policy configs 使用 `openclaw 诊断工具 --修复`, route canonical Anthropic 模型 through `claude-CLI` 不适用 passing CLI backend aliases to embedded harness selection, 和 load CLI backend owner 插件 之前 channel startup. 修复 #71957. Thanks @WolvenRA.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/runtime: add `agentRuntime.id` as the canonical config key, migrate legacy runtime-policy configs with `openclaw doctor --fix`, route canonical Anthropic models through `claude-cli` without passing CLI backend aliases to embedded harness selection, and load CLI backend owner plugins before channel startup. Fixes #71957. Thanks @WolvenRA.

changes.title: CLI/更新: guard Windows scheduled-task stops 通过 state 和 超时 so auto-更新 restart cannot hang indefinitely 在 `schtasks /End` 之前 stale-listener cleanup. 修复 #69970. Thanks @yangswld 和 @sherlock-huang.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/update: guard Windows scheduled-task stops by state and timeout so auto-update restart cannot hang indefinitely on `schtasks /End` before stale-listener cleanup. Fixes #69970. Thanks @yangswld and @sherlock-huang.

changes.title: Windows install/Lobster: execute `pnpm.exe` directly 当 `npm_execpath` points at the native pnpm binary, 添加 an installed-package fallback 为了 the Lobster embedded runtime, 和 include the Lobster runner regression test 在 Windows CI. 修复 #69456. Thanks @igormf.
changes.rawTitle: Windows install/Lobster: execute `pnpm.exe` directly when `npm_execpath` points at the native pnpm binary, add an installed-package fallback for the Lobster embedded runtime, and include the Lobster runner regression test in Windows CI. Fixes #69456. Thanks @igormf.

changes.title: 网关/install: refresh loaded 网关 service installs 当 the current service embeds stale 网关 认证 而不是 returning already-installed, avoiding LaunchAgent 令牌-mismatch loops 之后 令牌 rotation. 修复 #70752. Thanks @hyspacex.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/install: refresh loaded gateway service installs when the current service embeds stale gateway auth instead of returning already-installed, avoiding LaunchAgent token-mismatch loops after token rotation. Fixes #70752. Thanks @hyspacex.

changes.title: 更新: ignore bundled 插件 `.openclaw-install-stage` directories 期间 global install verification 和 packaged dist pruning so leftover runtime-dep staging files do not turn successful updates 进入 `unexpected packaged dist file` failures. 修复 #71752. Thanks @waynegault.
changes.rawTitle: Update: ignore bundled plugin `.openclaw-install-stage` directories during global install verification and packaged dist pruning so leftover runtime-dep staging files do not turn successful updates into `unexpected packaged dist file` failures. Fixes #71752. Thanks @waynegault.

changes.title: CLI/更新: fail package updates 当 post-更新 插件 sync fails 和 refresh legacy npm 插件 install records 之前 trusting unchanged artifacts, preventing successful updates 从 restarting 使用 stale 或 failed 插件 state. Thanks @vincentkoc 和 @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/update: fail package updates when post-update plugin sync fails and refresh legacy npm plugin install records before trusting unchanged artifacts, preventing successful updates from restarting with stale or failed plugin state. Thanks @vincentkoc and @shakkernerd.

changes.title: Release/更新: reject pre-populated bundled 插件 `.openclaw-install-stage` directories, including mixed-case 路径 variants, 之前 package inventory generation so release tarballs cannot ship poisoned runtime-dependency staging debris. 修复 #71752. Thanks @hclsys.
changes.rawTitle: Release/update: reject pre-populated bundled plugin `.openclaw-install-stage` directories, including mixed-case path variants, before package inventory generation so release tarballs cannot ship poisoned runtime-dependency staging debris. Fixes #71752. Thanks @hclsys.

changes.title: Node runtime: keep node-host 重试 timers alive across 网关 restarts 和 exit 在 terminal credential pauses so supervised nodes do not become silent zombies. 修复 #69800. Thanks @meroli28.
changes.rawTitle: Node runtime: keep node-host retry timers alive across Gateway restarts and exit on terminal credential pauses so supervised nodes do not become silent zombies. Fixes #69800. Thanks @meroli28.

changes.title: 网关/插件: 停止 persisted WhatsApp 认证 state 从 activating bundled channel runtime-dependency repair 期间 startup 当 `channels.WhatsApp` is absent, avoiding npm/git stalls 在 packaged Linux installs. 修复 #71994. Thanks @xiao398008.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/plugins: stop persisted WhatsApp auth state from activating bundled channel runtime-dependency repair during startup when `channels.whatsapp` is absent, avoiding npm/git stalls on packaged Linux installs. Fixes #71994. Thanks @xiao398008.

changes.title: 网关/device tokens: enforce caller-scope containment inside 令牌 rotation 和 revocation so pairing-only sessions cannot mutate higher-scope operator tokens. 修复 #71990. Thanks @coygeek.

changes.title: Media understanding/audio: inject a deterministic transcript placeholder 为了 too-small 语音 notes so Agent do not hallucinate transcription 或 provider failures. 修复 #48944. Thanks @eulicesl.
changes.rawTitle: Media understanding/audio: inject a deterministic transcript placeholder for too-small voice notes so agents do not hallucinate transcription or provider failures. Fixes #48944. Thanks @eulicesl.

changes.title: Providers/vLLM: send Nemotron 3 chat-template kwargs 当 thinking is off 和 honor configured `params.chat_template_kwargs` 为了 OpenAI-compatible completions, so vLLM/Nemotron replies stay visible 而不是 becoming thinking-only. 修复 #71891. Thanks @jmystaki-create 和 @dennis-lynch.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/vLLM: send Nemotron 3 chat-template kwargs when thinking is off and honor configured `params.chat_template_kwargs` for OpenAI-compatible completions, so vLLM/Nemotron replies stay visible instead of becoming thinking-only. Fixes #71891. Thanks @jmystaki-create and @dennis-lynch.

changes.title: Channels/replies: strip copied inbound metadata blocks 从 user-facing assistant replies 和 模型 replay history, so Discord/vLLM sessions do not leak `Conversation info` / `UNTRUSTED ... message body` envelopes 之后 a 模型 echoes them. 修复 #71847. Thanks @jmystaki-create.
changes.rawTitle: Channels/replies: strip copied inbound metadata blocks from user-facing assistant replies and model replay history, so Discord/vLLM sessions do not leak `Conversation info` / `UNTRUSTED ... message body` envelopes after a model echoes them. Fixes #71847. Thanks @jmystaki-create.

changes.title: Subagents/内存: keep inter-session completion wakes out 的 内存 和 dreaming session exports, 和 strip internal runtime-context blocks 从 realtime Control 界面 chat events.
changes.rawTitle: Subagents/memory: keep inter-session completion wakes out of memory and dreaming session exports, and strip internal runtime-context blocks from realtime Control UI chat events.

changes.title: Agent/Claude: treat zero-令牌 empty `停止` turns as failed provider output, 重试 once, repair replay, 和 允许 configured 模型 fallback 而不是 preserving them as successful silent replies. 修复 #71880. Thanks @MagnaAI.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/Claude: treat zero-token empty `stop` turns as failed provider output, retry once, repair replay, and allow configured model fallback instead of preserving them as successful silent replies. Fixes #71880. Thanks @MagnaAI.

changes.title: Tasks: normalize task lifecycle timestamps at create, 更新, 和 restore time, 和 report retained lost tasks as audit warnings until their cleanup window expires. (#71871) Thanks @likewen-tech.
changes.rawTitle: Tasks: normalize task lifecycle timestamps at create, update, and restore time, and report retained lost tasks as audit warnings until their cleanup window expires. (#71871) Thanks @likewen-tech.

changes.title: Diagnostics/OTEL: treat normal early 模型 stream cleanup as a completed 模型 call 而不是 exporting a misleading `StreamAbandoned` 错误 span. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Diagnostics/OTEL: treat normal early model stream cleanup as a completed model call instead of exporting a misleading `StreamAbandoned` error span. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 网关/pairing: 停止 corrupt 或 unreadable device/node pairing stores 从 being treated as empty state, preserving `paired.json` 为了 repair 而不是 overwriting approved pairings. 修复 #71873. Thanks @iret77.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/pairing: stop corrupt or unreadable device/node pairing stores from being treated as empty state, preserving `paired.json` for repair instead of overwriting approved pairings. Fixes #71873. Thanks @iret77.

changes.title: ACP: keep `/acp` management commands, plus local `/status` 和 `/unfocus`, 在 the 网关 路径 inside ACP-bound threads so they are not consumed as ACP prompt text. 修复 #66298. Thanks @kindomLee.
changes.rawTitle: ACP: keep `/acp` management commands, plus local `/status` and `/unfocus`, on the Gateway path inside ACP-bound threads so they are not consumed as ACP prompt text. Fixes #66298. Thanks @kindomLee.

changes.title: ACPX: 停止 probing ACP Agent 期间 normal 网关 startup; the embedded backend 现在 registers 不适用 spawning Codex/ACP child processes unless `OPENCLAW_ACPX_RUNTIME_STARTUP_PROBE=1` is explicitly set.
changes.rawTitle: ACPX: stop probing ACP agents during normal Gateway startup; the embedded backend now registers without spawning Codex/ACP child processes unless `OPENCLAW_ACPX_RUNTIME_STARTUP_PROBE=1` is explicitly set.

changes.title: CLI/image edit: accept `--size`, `--aspect-ratio`, 和 `--resolution` 在 `openclaw infer image edit` 和 report all supported edit flags 从 `capability inspect image.edit`. Thanks @Pinghuachiu.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/image edit: accept `--size`, `--aspect-ratio`, and `--resolution` on `openclaw infer image edit` and report all supported edit flags from `capability inspect image.edit`. Thanks @Pinghuachiu.

changes.title: ACP: wait 为了 the configured runtime backend to become healthy 之前 startup identity reconciliation, avoiding transient acpx warnings 期间 网关 boot. 修复 #40566.
changes.rawTitle: ACP: wait for the configured runtime backend to become healthy before startup identity reconciliation, avoiding transient acpx warnings during Gateway boot. Fixes #40566.

changes.title: Channels/ACP bindings: time out configured binding readiness checks 而不是 letting Discord preflight hang forever 当 an ACP target never settles. 修复 #68776.
changes.rawTitle: Channels/ACP bindings: time out configured binding readiness checks instead of letting Discord preflight hang forever when an ACP target never settles. Fixes #68776.

changes.title: Control 界面: hide the chat loading skeleton 期间 background history reloads 当 existing messages 或 active stream content are already visible, avoiding reload flashes 在 high-latency local gateways. 修复 #71844. Thanks @WolvenRA.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI: hide the chat loading skeleton during background history reloads when existing messages or active stream content are already visible, avoiding reload flashes on high-latency local gateways. Fixes #71844. Thanks @WolvenRA.

changes.title: Control 界面: keep locally optimistic chat messages visible 当 a history reload temporarily returns empty, avoiding lost first-turn messages 在 high-latency gateways. 修复 #71878. Thanks @WolvenRA.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI: keep locally optimistic chat messages visible when a history reload temporarily returns empty, avoiding lost first-turn messages on high-latency gateways. Fixes #71878. Thanks @WolvenRA.

changes.title: Control 界面: keep chat history limits 基于 visible messages 之后 filtering heartbeat 和 control-only transcript rows, so recent hidden entries no longer make older visible replies disappear. Thanks @WolvenRA.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI: keep chat history limits based on visible messages after filtering heartbeat and control-only transcript rows, so recent hidden entries no longer make older visible replies disappear. Thanks @WolvenRA.

changes.title: Agent/images: scrub old `[media attached: ...]`, `[Image: source: ...]`, 和 `media://inbound/...` markers 从 pruned 模型 replay context so stale media refs are not rehydrated as fresh prompt images. 修复 #71868. Thanks @jmeadlock.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/images: scrub old `[media attached: ...]`, `[Image: source: ...]`, and `media://inbound/...` markers from pruned model replay context so stale media refs are not rehydrated as fresh prompt images. Fixes #71868. Thanks @jmeadlock.

changes.title: Docker/Bonjour: 禁用 Bonjour/mDNS advertising 通过 default 为了 bundled Compose gateways 在 bridge networking, while keeping host/macvlan opt-在 使用 `OPENCLAW_DISABLE_BONJOUR=0`. 修复 #71879. Thanks @gbballpack.
changes.rawTitle: Docker/Bonjour: disable Bonjour/mDNS advertising by default for bundled Compose gateways on bridge networking, while keeping host/macvlan opt-in with `OPENCLAW_DISABLE_BONJOUR=0`. Fixes #71879. Thanks @gbballpack.

changes.title: CLI/status: label the OpenClaw Serve/Funnel 设置 as `Tailscale exposure` 和 show daemon state separately 当 available, so `网关.tailscale.mode: "off"` no longer reads like the Tailscale daemon is stopped. 修复 #71790. Thanks @pesvobodak.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/status: label the OpenClaw Serve/Funnel setting as `Tailscale exposure` and show daemon state separately when available, so `gateway.tailscale.mode: "off"` no longer reads like the Tailscale daemon is stopped. Fixes #71790. Thanks @pesvobodak.

changes.title: 插件/Bonjour: 停止 ciao mDNS watchdog failures 从 looping forever 当 the advertiser stays stuck 在 `probing` 或 `announcing`; Bonjour 现在 disables itself 为了 the current 网关 process 之后 repeated failed restarts while the 网关 keeps running. 修复 #69011. Thanks @siddharthaagarwalofficial-ux, @FiredMosquito831, 和 @spikefcz.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/Bonjour: stop ciao mDNS watchdog failures from looping forever when the advertiser stays stuck in `probing` or `announcing`; Bonjour now disables itself for the current Gateway process after repeated failed restarts while the Gateway keeps running. Fixes #69011. Thanks @siddharthaagarwalofficial-ux, @FiredMosquito831, and @spikefcz.

changes.title: 网关/Fly.io: seed Control 界面 allowed origins 从 the actual runtime bind 和 port so CLI-driven non-loopback starts do not 崩溃 之前 配置 exists. 修复 #71823.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/Fly.io: seed Control UI allowed origins from the actual runtime bind and port so CLI-driven non-loopback starts do not crash before config exists. Fixes #71823.

changes.title: macOS/remote SSH: keep discovered 网关 hosts 在 `网关.remote.sshTarget` while pinning SSH transport URLs to the local loopback tunnel, so 浏览器 automation does not regress 进入 blocked non-loopback `ws://` endpoints. 修复 #67336.
changes.rawTitle: macOS/remote SSH: keep discovered gateway hosts in `gateway.remote.sshTarget` while pinning SSH transport URLs to the local loopback tunnel, so browser automation does not regress into blocked non-loopback `ws://` endpoints. Fixes #67336.

changes.title: 网关/代理: bootstrap env 代理 dispatching 从 direct 网关 startup so provider 和 插件 network requests honor `HTTPS_PROXY`/`HTTP_PROXY` 之前 the first embedded Agent attempt runs. (#71833) Thanks @mjamiv.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/proxy: bootstrap env proxy dispatching from direct Gateway startup so provider and plugin network requests honor `HTTPS_PROXY`/`HTTP_PROXY` before the first embedded agent attempt runs. (#71833) Thanks @mjamiv.

changes.title: 插件/runtime deps: verify clean npm installs actually place requested bundled runtime packages 在 the managed install root, reporting exact missing specs 而不是 a false successful repair. (#71883) Thanks @Solvely-Colin.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/runtime deps: verify clean npm installs actually place requested bundled runtime packages in the managed install root, reporting exact missing specs instead of a false successful repair. (#71883) Thanks @Solvely-Colin.

changes.title: 插件/discovery: ignore stale `插件.load.paths` aliases that point back at packaged bundled 插件 directories 和 have 诊断工具 移除 them, keeping bundled 插件 在 the runtime-deps staging 路径. Thanks @Codex.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/discovery: ignore stale `plugins.load.paths` aliases that point back at packaged bundled plugin directories and have doctor remove them, keeping bundled plugins on the runtime-deps staging path. Thanks @codex.

changes.title: 模型/LM Studio: 保留 `@iq*` quant suffixes 在 模型 refs 和 provider matching so `/模型 lmstudio/...@iq3_xxs` keeps the exact LM Studio variant. 修复 #71474. (#71486) Thanks @Bartok9, @XinwuC, 和 @Sanjays2402.
changes.rawTitle: Models/LM Studio: preserve `@iq*` quant suffixes in model refs and provider matching so `/model lmstudio/...@iq3_xxs` keeps the exact LM Studio variant. Fixes #71474. (#71486) Thanks @Bartok9, @XinwuC, and @Sanjays2402.

changes.title: Matrix/cron: 保留 the live Matrix delivery target 当 creating implicit announce reminder jobs so mixed-case room IDs are not reconstructed 从 lowercased session keys. 修复 #71798.
changes.rawTitle: Matrix/cron: preserve the live Matrix delivery target when creating implicit announce reminder jobs so mixed-case room IDs are not reconstructed from lowercased session keys. Fixes #71798.

changes.title: 飞书: accept Schema 2.0 card action callbacks that report `context.open_chat_id` 而不是 legacy `context.chat_id`, so button callbacks no longer drop as malformed. 修复 #71670. Thanks @eddy1068.
changes.rawTitle: Feishu: accept Schema 2.0 card action callbacks that report `context.open_chat_id` instead of legacy `context.chat_id`, so button callbacks no longer drop as malformed. Fixes #71670. Thanks @eddy1068.

changes.title: 飞书: keep synthetic card-action 和 bot-menu ids out 的 platform reply targets, using the real card callback message id 当 飞书 provides one 和 plain-sending otherwise. 修复 #71673. Thanks @eddy1068.
changes.rawTitle: Feishu: keep synthetic card-action and bot-menu ids out of platform reply targets, using the real card callback message id when Feishu provides one and plain-sending otherwise. Fixes #71673. Thanks @eddy1068.

changes.title: 插件/QQ Bot: prefer an installed QQ Bot 插件 that declares it replaces the bundled `qqbot` channel, preventing duplicate `qqbot_channel_api` 和 `qqbot_remind` 工具 registration noise. 修复 #63102.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/QQ Bot: prefer an installed QQ Bot plugin that declares it replaces the bundled `qqbot` channel, preventing duplicate `qqbot_channel_api` and `qqbot_remind` tool registration noise. Fixes #63102.

changes.title: 浏览器 automation: keep stable tab ids 和 labels attached 当 Chromium replaces the raw target 之后 form submissions 或 other action-triggered navigations, 和 return the replacement `targetId` 从 `/act` 当 the match is provable. 修复 #46137.
changes.rawTitle: Browser automation: keep stable tab ids and labels attached when Chromium replaces the raw target after form submissions or other action-triggered navigations, and return the replacement `targetId` from `/act` when the match is provable. Fixes #46137.

changes.title: QQ Bot: make `qqbot_remind` schedule, list, 和 移除 网关 cron jobs directly 为了 owner-authorized senders 而不是 returning `cronParams` 和 relying 在 a follow-up generic `cron` 工具 call. 修复 #70865. (#70937) Thanks @GaosCode.
changes.rawTitle: QQ Bot: make `qqbot_remind` schedule, list, and remove Gateway cron jobs directly for owner-authorized senders instead of returning `cronParams` and relying on a follow-up generic `cron` tool call. Fixes #70865. (#70937) Thanks @GaosCode.

changes.title: Agent/ACP: hide `sessions_spawn` ACP runtime options unless an ACP backend is loaded, 和 make `/acp 诊断工具` call out `插件.允许` blocking bundled `acpx`. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/ACP: hide `sessions_spawn` ACP runtime options unless an ACP backend is loaded, and make `/acp doctor` call out `plugins.allow` blocking bundled `acpx`. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.rawTitle: Agents/Codex: keep ACP prompt/skill routing hidden unless an ACP runtime backend is available, and warn in doctor when enabled Codex plugin configs still route `openai-codex/*` models through PI. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Media delivery: 避免 sending generated image attachments twice 当 the assistant reply already includes explicit `MEDIA:` lines 为了 the same turn, 和 reject unsafe remote `MEDIA:` URLs 之前 delivery. Thanks @pashpashpash.
changes.rawTitle: Media delivery: avoid sending generated image attachments twice when the assistant reply already includes explicit `MEDIA:` lines for the same turn, and reject unsafe remote `MEDIA:` URLs before delivery. Thanks @pashpashpash.

changes.title: Codex harness: ignore retryable app-server 错误 notifications 之后 Codex recovers, 和 保留 the real nested 错误 message 为了 terminal app-server failures 而不是 replacing it 使用 a generic failure. Thanks @pashpashpash.
changes.rawTitle: Codex harness: ignore retryable app-server error notifications after Codex recovers, and preserve the real nested error message for terminal app-server failures instead of replacing it with a generic failure. Thanks @pashpashpash.

changes.title: Agent/Codex: prepare native Codex sub-Agent session metadata 不适用 a nested 网关 session patch 和 添加 a focused Docker smoke 为了 the app-server sub-Agent 路径. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/Codex: prepare native Codex sub-agent session metadata without a nested Gateway session patch and add a focused Docker smoke for the app-server sub-agent path. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Agent/subagents: keep queued subagent announces session-only 当 the requester has no external channel target, avoiding ambiguous multi-channel delivery failures. 修复 #59201. Thanks @larrylhollan.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/subagents: keep queued subagent announces session-only when the requester has no external channel target, avoiding ambiguous multi-channel delivery failures. Fixes #59201. Thanks @larrylhollan.

changes.title: Image understanding: 保留 configured provider-prefixed vision 模型 metadata 当 callers request the 模型 不适用 the provider prefix, so custom image 模型 keep their `input: ["text", "image"]` capability. 修复 #33185. Thanks @Kobe9312 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Image understanding: preserve configured provider-prefixed vision model metadata when callers request the model without the provider prefix, so custom image models keep their `input: ["text", "image"]` capability. Fixes #33185. Thanks @Kobe9312 and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/install: restore the previous 插件 index records if a concurrent 配置 write conflict interrupts install, 更新, 或 uninstall metadata commits. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/install: restore the previous plugin index records if a concurrent config write conflict interrupts install, update, or uninstall metadata commits. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: 插件/install: reject native 插件 archives that do not include a valid `openclaw.插件.json`, preventing manifestless archives 从 writing install records that later show missing-manifest diagnostics. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/install: reject native plugin archives that do not include a valid `openclaw.plugin.json`, preventing manifestless archives from writing install records that later show missing-manifest diagnostics. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: 插件/uninstall: 移除 tracked managed 插件 install directories even 当 the persisted install 路径 differs 从 the default id-derived target, while still refusing deletes outside the managed extensions root. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/uninstall: remove tracked managed plugin install directories even when the persisted install path differs from the default id-derived target, while still refusing deletes outside the managed extensions root. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: 插件/更新: restore previous 插件 index records if core 更新 或 channel setup hits a concurrent 配置 write conflict 之后 插件 metadata changes. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/update: restore previous plugin index records if core update or channel setup hits a concurrent config write conflict after plugin metadata changes. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: 插件/onboarding: defer channel/provider 插件 install records until the owning 配置 write commits, keeping setup failures 从 advancing the 插件 index ahead 的 `openclaw.json`. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/onboarding: defer channel/provider plugin install records until the owning config write commits, keeping setup failures from advancing the plugin index ahead of `openclaw.json`. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: 插件/配置: route configure 和 Agent setup writes 使用 pending 插件 install records through the 插件 index commit helper so provider onboarding metadata is not stripped 通过 plain 配置 writes. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/config: route configure and agent setup writes with pending plugin install records through the plugin index commit helper so provider onboarding metadata is not stripped by plain config writes. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: 插件/channels: merge pending channel 插件 install records 使用 the existing 插件 index 之前 配置 writes, preserving unrelated tracked installs 期间 channel setup, 解决, 移除, 和 capability repair flows. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/channels: merge pending channel plugin install records with the existing plugin index before config writes, preserving unrelated tracked installs during channel setup, resolve, remove, and capability repair flows. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: 插件/配置: defer shipped `插件.installs` index migration 期间 配置 writes until the guarded 配置 commit window 和 roll it back if the 配置 write fails 之前 commit. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/config: defer shipped `plugins.installs` index migration during config writes until the guarded config commit window and roll it back if the config write fails before commit. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: Sessions: keep embedded runtime context out 的 the visible user prompt 通过 sending it as a hidden next-turn custom message, 和 teach 诊断工具 to repair affected 2026.4.24 transcripts 使用 duplicated prompt-rewrite branches. 修复 #71761.
changes.rawTitle: Sessions: keep embedded runtime context out of the visible user prompt by sending it as a hidden next-turn custom message, and teach doctor to repair affected 2026.4.24 transcripts with duplicated prompt-rewrite branches. Fixes #71761.

changes.title: 网关/subagents: keep direct-loopback backend RPCs authenticated 使用 the shared 网关 令牌/password off stale CLI paired-device scope baselines, so internal calls no longer hit `scope-upgrade` pairing prompts while remote, 浏览器, node, device-令牌, 和 explicit-device paths still require normal pairing approval. 修复 #63548.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/subagents: keep direct-loopback backend RPCs authenticated with the shared gateway token/password off stale CLI paired-device scope baselines, so internal calls no longer hit `scope-upgrade` pairing prompts while remote, browser, node, device-token, and explicit-device paths still require normal pairing approval. Fixes #63548.

changes.title: Providers/Azure OpenAI: give deployment-scoped image generation requests a longer 600s default 超时 so slow `gpt-image-2` generations can complete 不适用 a per-call `timeoutMs`. 修复 #71705. Thanks @voytas75.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/Azure OpenAI: give deployment-scoped image generation requests a longer 600s default timeout so slow `gpt-image-2` generations can complete without a per-call `timeoutMs`. Fixes #71705. Thanks @voytas75.

changes.title: 网关/插件: link source-checkout bundled runtime dependency caches 而不是 recursively copying `node_modules` 在 the 网关 main thread, preventing local status, node, 和 skill probes 从 timing out 期间 startup cache restores.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/plugins: link source-checkout bundled runtime dependency caches instead of recursively copying `node_modules` on the gateway main thread, preventing local status, node, and skill probes from timing out during startup cache restores.

changes.title: Skills/remote nodes: only expose remote macOS skill bins 为了 connected nodes, clear stale bin matches 当 node probes fail, 和 include probe 命令, 超时, bin count, 和 connection state 在 超时 logs.
changes.rawTitle: Skills/remote nodes: only expose remote macOS skill bins for connected nodes, clear stale bin matches when node probes fail, and include probe command, timeout, bin count, and connection state in timeout logs.

changes.title: Skills/remote nodes: recognize `system.which` object-map responses 当 probing connected macOS nodes, so Linux gateways can expose macOS-only skills such as Apple Notes 当 the required binaries are installed remotely. 修复 #71877. Thanks @miguelarios.
changes.rawTitle: Skills/remote nodes: recognize `system.which` object-map responses when probing connected macOS nodes, so Linux gateways can expose macOS-only skills such as Apple Notes when the required binaries are installed remotely. Fixes #71877. Thanks @miguelarios.

changes.title: CLI/网关: keep diagnostic probes 从 creating first-time read-only device pairings, while still reusing cached device tokens 为了 detailed read probes. 修复 #71766. Thanks @SunboZ.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/gateway: keep diagnostic probes from creating first-time read-only device pairings, while still reusing cached device tokens for detailed read probes. Fixes #71766. Thanks @SunboZ.

changes.rawTitle: CLI/plugins: keep `message` startup, `channels logs`, `agents delete`, and `agents set-identity` off broad plugin preloading; message delivery still loads plugins when the action actually runs.

changes.title: Image understanding: 解决 configured image 模型 such as local LM Studio vision entries 之前 reporting `Unknown 模型` 当 the discovery registry has not registered that provider. 修复 #66486. Thanks @zhanggpcsu.

changes.title: QQ Bot: ignore self-echoed bot messages using the outbound ref-index marker, preventing mirrored replies 从 re-entering the Agent loop while still allowing users to quote bot replies. 修复 #71912. Thanks @wangyc6003.
changes.rawTitle: QQ Bot: ignore self-echoed bot messages using the outbound ref-index marker, preventing mirrored replies from re-entering the agent loop while still allowing users to quote bot replies. Fixes #71912. Thanks @wangyc6003.

changes.title: Sessions: separate reset freshness 从 session-store `updatedAt`, so heartbeat, cron, exec, 和 网关 bookkeeping no longer 防止 configured daily/idle resets 从 rolling long-running channel sessions. 修复 #68315, #63732, #63820, 和 #69083. Thanks @maxatv, @longhairedsi, @bradfreels, 和 @akessel56.
changes.rawTitle: Sessions: separate reset freshness from session-store `updatedAt`, so heartbeat, cron, exec, and gateway bookkeeping no longer prevent configured daily/idle resets from rolling long-running channel sessions. changes.title: Sessions: clear queued system-event notices 期间 `/new`, `/reset`, 网关 `sessions.reset`, 和 daily/idle rollover so stale background updates cannot leak 进入 the first prompt 的 the fresh session. 修复 #66864. Thanks @opeyio, @Magicray1217, 和 @cedillarack.
changes.rawTitle: Sessions: clear queued system-event notices during `/new`, `/reset`, gateway `sessions.reset`, and daily/idle rollover so stale background updates cannot leak into the first prompt of the fresh session. Fixes #66864. Thanks @opeyio, @Magicray1217, and @cedillarack.

changes.title: CLI/Agent: keep `Agent bind`, `Agent unbind`, 和 `Agent bindings` 在 setup-safe channel metadata paths so they do not preload bundled 插件 runtimes 或 stage runtime dependencies. 修复 #71743.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/agents: keep `agents bind`, `agents unbind`, and `agents bindings` on setup-safe channel metadata paths so they do not preload bundled plugin runtimes or stage runtime dependencies. Fixes #71743.

changes.rawTitle: Windows/native: keep CLI startup and bundled provider plugin loading off Windows ESM raw-path failure paths, fixing native onboarding/install smoke on Node 24.

changes.title: 插件/Bonjour: 停止 the 网关 从 崩溃-looping 在 `CIAO PROBING CANCELLED` 当 the mDNS watchdog cancels a stuck probe. Restores the rejection-handler wiring dropped 期间 the bonjour 插件 migration 和 shares unhandled-rejection state across module instances so 插件-staged copies 的 `openclaw/插件-sdk/runtime` register 进入 the same handler set the host consults. Especially affects Docker 在 macOS, where mDNS probing reliably hits the watchdog. Thanks @troyhitch.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/Bonjour: stop the gateway from crash-looping on `CIAO PROBING CANCELLED` when the mDNS watchdog cancels a stuck probe. Restores the rejection-handler wiring dropped during the bonjour plugin migration and shares unhandled-rejection state across module instances so plugin-staged copies of `openclaw/plugin-sdk/runtime` register into the same handler set the host consults. Especially affects Docker on macOS, where mDNS probing reliably hits the watchdog. Thanks @troyhitch.

changes.title: Agent/OpenAI-compatible: default 代理/local completions 工具 requests to `tool_choice: "auto"` 当 tools are present, so providers enter native 工具-calling mode 而不是 replying 使用 plain-text 工具 directives. (#71472) Thanks @Speed-maker.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/OpenAI-compatible: default proxy/local completions tool requests to `tool_choice: "auto"` when tools are present, so providers enter native tool-calling mode instead of replying with plain-text tool directives. (#71472) Thanks @Speed-maker.

changes.title: OpenAI image generation: use `gpt-5.5` 为了 the Codex OAuth认证 responses transport 而不是 the retired `gpt-5.4` 模型, fixing 500s 从 ChatGPT Codex image generation. 修复 #71513. Thanks @baolongl.
changes.rawTitle: OpenAI image generation: use `gpt-5.5` for the Codex OAuth responses transport instead of the retired `gpt-5.4` model, fixing 500s from ChatGPT Codex image generation. Fixes #71513. Thanks @baolongl.

changes.title: OpenAI image generation: route transparent-background default-模型 requests to `gpt-image-1.5`, document the expected `image_generate` call shape, 和 keep Azure/custom OpenAI-compatible deployment names untouched.
changes.rawTitle: OpenAI image generation: route transparent-background default-model requests to `gpt-image-1.5`, document the expected `image_generate` call shape, and keep Azure/custom OpenAI-compatible deployment names untouched.

changes.title: Google video generation: download direct MLDev Veo `video.uri` results 而不是 passing them through the Files API 路径, fixing 404s 之后 successful generation/polling. 修复 #71200. Thanks @panhaishan.

changes.title: Google video generation: fall back to the REST `predictLongRunning` Veo endpoint 为了 text-only SDK 404s while keeping reference image/video generation 在 the SDK 路径. 修复 #62309 和 #63008. (#62343) Thanks @leoleedev.
changes.rawTitle: Google video generation: fall back to the REST `predictLongRunning` Veo endpoint for text-only SDK 404s while keeping reference image/video generation on the SDK path. Fixes #62309 and #63008. (#62343) Thanks @leoleedev.

changes.title: MiniMax music generation: switch the bundled default 模型 从 the unsupported `music-2.5+` id to the current `music-2.6` API 模型. 修复 #64870 和 addresses the music default 从 #62315. Thanks @noahclanman 和 @edwardzheng1.

changes.title: Cron: record jobs interrupted 通过 a 网关 restart as failed at their original `runningAtMs`, skip unsafe startup replay, 和 禁用 interrupted one-shot jobs so they show a visible failure 而不是 静默地 disappearing 或 duplicating work. 修复 #59056, #61343, #63657, 和 #59301. Thanks @ponchoooPenguin, @daemic24, @myradon, 和 @hikiwibot.
changes.rawTitle: Cron: record jobs interrupted by a gateway restart as failed at their original `runningAtMs`, skip unsafe startup replay, and disable interrupted one-shot jobs so they show a visible failure instead of silently disappearing or duplicating work. Fixes #59056, #61343, #63657, and #59301. Thanks @ponchoooPenguin, @daemic24, @myradon, and @hikiwibot.

changes.title: Cron 工具: recover flat top-level schedule shorthand such as `cron`, `tz`, 和 `staggerMs` 之前 网关 validation, so 模型-generated cron 添加/更新 calls 保留 cron jitter settings. Thanks @tyxben.
changes.rawTitle: Cron tool: recover flat top-level schedule shorthand such as `cron`, `tz`, and `staggerMs` before gateway validation, so model-generated cron add/update calls preserve cron jitter settings. Thanks @tyxben.

changes.title: Cron: hydrate flat legacy job rows 使用 top-level `cron`, `tz`, `session`, 和 `message` fields 进入 canonical schedule, target, 和 payload objects 之前 startup recomputes run times. 修复 #43351.
changes.rawTitle: Cron: hydrate flat legacy job rows with top-level `cron`, `tz`, `session`, and `message` fields into canonical schedule, target, and payload objects before startup recomputes run times. Fixes #43351.

changes.title: Agent/replies: let pending group chat history trigger bare mentioned turns 不适用 treating metadata-only inbound context as user input. 修复 #71489. (#71520) Thanks @SymbolStar.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/replies: let pending group chat history trigger bare mentioned turns without treating metadata-only inbound context as user input. Fixes #71489. (#71520) Thanks @SymbolStar.

changes.title: Discord: restore direct-message 语音-note preflight transcription 和 classify URL-only Ogg/Opus 语音 attachments as audio while skipping partial attachments 不适用 usable URLs. 修复 #61314 和 #64803.
changes.rawTitle: Discord: restore direct-message voice-note preflight transcription and classify URL-only Ogg/Opus voice attachments as audio while skipping partial attachments without usable URLs. Fixes #61314 and #64803.

changes.title: Cron: tolerate malformed legacy job rows 在 startup, main-session system-event payloads, 和 human-readable `cron list` output so missing `state`, `payload.text`, 或 display fields no longer 崩溃 the scheduler 或 CLI. 修复 #66016, #65916, #64137, #57872, #59968, #63813, #52804, 和 #43163. (#71509) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.rawTitle: Feishu: keep streaming cards to one live card per turn, flush throttled card edits after meaningful text boundaries, and skip exact block/partial repeats so tool-heavy replies do not duplicate card output. Thanks @allan0509.

Thanks @sesame437, @Vicky-v7, @maoku-family, @Pengxiao-Wang, 和 @Maple778.

changes.title: Telegram: recover incomplete partial-stream previews 通过 falling back to a final send 当 an ambiguous final edit failure would otherwise retain a strict prefix 的 the answer. 修复 #71525. (#71554) Thanks @sahilsatralkar.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram: recover incomplete partial-stream previews by falling back to a final send when an ambiguous final edit failure would otherwise retain a strict prefix of the answer. Fixes #71525. (#71554) Thanks @sahilsatralkar.

changes.title: Control 界面/chat: collapse assistant 令牌/模型 context details behind an explicit Context disclosure 和 show full dates 在 message footers, making historical transcript timing clear 不适用 noisy default metadata. (#71337) Thanks @BunsDev.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/chat: collapse assistant token/model context details behind an explicit Context disclosure and show full dates in message footers, making historical transcript timing clear without noisy default metadata. (#71337) Thanks @BunsDev.

changes.title: OpenAI/Codex OAuth认证: explain `unsupported_country_region_territory` 令牌-exchange failures 使用 a 代理/region hint 而不是 surfacing a generic OAuth认证 错误. 修复 #51175. (#71501) Thanks @vincentkoc 和 @wulala-xjj.

changes.title: 浏览器/Linux: fall back to headless mode 为了 local managed profiles 在 hosts 不适用 a display server, while preserving explicit per-profile headed overrides 和 reporting the headless source. (#60953) Thanks @rrpsantos.
changes.rawTitle: Browser/Linux: fall back to headless mode for local managed profiles on hosts without a display server, while preserving explicit per-profile headed overrides and reporting the headless source. (#60953) Thanks @rrpsantos.

changes.title: Telegram: 移除 the startup persisted-offset `getUpdates` preflight so polling restarts do not self-conflict 之前 the runner starts. 修复 #69304. (#69779) Thanks @chinar-amrutkar.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram: remove the startup persisted-offset `getUpdates` preflight so polling restarts do not self-conflict before the runner starts. Fixes #69304. (#69779) Thanks @chinar-amrutkar.

changes.title: Telegram: keep the polling stall watchdog active even 当 grammY reports the runner as not running while its task is still pending, so a rebuilt transport cannot leave `getUpdates` silent until a manual 网关 restart. 修复 #69064. Thanks @LDLoeb.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram: keep the polling stall watchdog active even when grammY reports the runner as not running while its task is still pending, so a rebuilt transport cannot leave `getUpdates` silent until a manual gateway restart. Fixes #69064. Thanks @LDLoeb.

changes.rawTitle: Subagents: fall back to direct completion delivery when the parent announce turn finishes without a visible payload, so child results still reach channel-backed requester sessions.

changes.title: Subagents: tell parent Agent to use `sessions_yield` while waiting 为了 child completion events, preventing GPT-5 fast runs 从 ending 静默地 之后 spawning workers.
changes.rawTitle: Subagents: tell parent agents to use `sessions_yield` while waiting for child completion events, preventing GPT-5 fast runs from ending silently after spawning workers.

changes.rawTitle: Browser/Playwright: ignore benign already-handled route races during guarded navigation so browser-page tasks no longer fail when Playwright tears down a route mid-flight. (#68708) Thanks @Steady-ai.

changes.rawTitle: Browser/downloads: seed managed Chrome profiles with OpenClaw download prefs and capture unmanaged click-triggered downloads under the guarded downloads directory, while explicit download waiters still own their target file. (#64558) Thanks @Pearcekieser.

changes.rawTitle: Browser/client: stop telling agents to permanently avoid the browser after transient timeout or cancellation failures; keep the no-retry hint for persistent unavailable/rate-limit cases. (#46505) Thanks @jriff.

changes.rawTitle: Sessions/browser: close tracked browser tabs when idle, daily, `/new`, or `/reset` session rollover archives the previous transcript, preventing tabs from leaking past the old session. Thanks @jakozloski.

changes.rawTitle: Sessions/forking: fall back to transcript-estimated parent token counts when cached totals are stale or missing, so oversized thread forks start fresh instead of cloning the full parent transcript. Thanks @jalehman.

changes.title: GitHub Copilot: never rewrite connection-bound reasoning item IDs regardless 的 whether `encrypted_content` is present, fixing a 400 "Encrypted content item_id did not match" 错误 使用 `gpt-5.3-Codex` 和 future Codex 模型 that fall through to the forward-compat catch-all 使用 `reasoning: false`. Also recognize Codex-named 模型 as reasoning-capable so they inherit the correct capability flags. Refs #68735. Thanks @InvalidPandaa.
changes.rawTitle: GitHub Copilot: never rewrite connection-bound reasoning item IDs regardless of whether `encrypted_content` is present, fixing a 400 "Encrypted content item_id did not match" error with `gpt-5.3-codex` and future Codex models that fall through to the forward-compat catch-all with `reasoning: false`. Also recognize Codex-named models as reasoning-capable so they inherit the correct capability flags. Refs #68735. Thanks @InvalidPandaa.

items.title: macOS/Node: keep native remote app nodes 从 advertising `浏览器.代理`, start 浏览器-capable CLI node services through the restored `openclaw node start` 命令, 和 show an actionable 浏览器-control 错误 当 the local control service is missing. 修复 #66637.

items.title: macOS/remote SSH: keep discovered 网关 hosts 在 `网关.remote.sshTarget` while pinning SSH transport URLs to the local loopback tunnel, so 浏览器 automation does not regress 进入 blocked non-loopback `ws://` endpoints. 修复 #67336.
items.rawTitle: macOS/remote SSH: keep discovered gateway hosts in `gateway.remote.sshTarget` while pinning SSH transport URLs to the local loopback tunnel, so browser automation does not regress into blocked non-loopback `ws://` endpoints. Fixes #67336.

items.title: 浏览器 automation: keep stable tab ids 和 labels attached 当 Chromium replaces the raw target 之后 form submissions 或 other action-triggered navigations, 和 return the replacement `targetId` 从 `/act` 当 the match is provable. 修复 #46137.
items.rawTitle: Browser automation: keep stable tab ids and labels attached when Chromium replaces the raw target after form submissions or other action-triggered navigations, and return the replacement `targetId` from `/act` when the match is provable. Fixes #46137.

items.title: 网关/subagents: keep direct-loopback backend RPCs authenticated 使用 the shared 网关 令牌/password off stale CLI paired-device scope baselines, so internal calls no longer hit `scope-upgrade` pairing prompts while remote, 浏览器, node, device-令牌, 和 explicit-device paths still require normal pairing approval. 修复 #63548.

Fixes #63548.

items.title: 插件/Bonjour: 停止 the 网关 从 崩溃-looping 在 `CIAO PROBING CANCELLED` 当 the mDNS watchdog cancels a stuck probe. Restores the rejection-handler wiring dropped 期间 the bonjour 插件 migration 和 shares unhandled-rejection state across module instances so 插件-staged copies 的 `openclaw/插件-sdk/runtime` register 进入 the same handler set the host consults. items.rawTitle: Plugins/Bonjour: stop the gateway from crash-looping on `CIAO PROBING CANCELLED` when the mDNS watchdog cancels a stuck probe. Especially affects Docker on macOS, where mDNS probing reliably hits the watchdog. Thanks @troyhitch.

items.title: Providers/OpenCode Go: 添加 DeepSeek V4 Pro 和 DeepSeek V4 Flash to the Go catalog while the bundled Pi registry catches up. 修复 #71587.
items.rawTitle: Providers/OpenCode Go: add DeepSeek V4 Pro and DeepSeek V4 Flash to the Go catalog while the bundled Pi registry catches up. Fixes #71587.

items.title: Providers/Venice: fill the required DeepSeek V4 `reasoning_content` placeholder 为了 `venice/deepseek-v4-pro` 和 `venice/deepseek-v4-flash` replay turns 不适用 sending native DeepSeek `thinking` controls that Venice rejects. 修复 #71628.

items.title: Cron: tolerate malformed legacy job rows 在 startup, main-session system-event payloads, 和 human-readable `cron list` output so missing `state`, `payload.text`, 或 display fields no longer 崩溃 the scheduler 或 CLI. 修复 #66016, #65916, #64137, #57872, #59968, #63813, #52804, 和 #43163. (#71509) Thanks @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Cron: tolerate malformed legacy job rows in startup, main-session system-event payloads, and human-readable `cron list` output so missing `state`, `payload.text`, or display fields no longer crash the scheduler or CLI. Fixes #66016, #65916, #64137, #57872, #59968, #63813, #52804, and #43163. (#71509) Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.title: CLI backends: compact OpenClaw transcripts 之后 over-budget CLI turns 和 reseed fresh CLI sessions 从 the compacted transcript 而不是 stale external resume state. 修复 #68329. (#71916) Thanks @obviyus.
items.rawTitle: CLI backends: compact OpenClaw transcripts after over-budget CLI turns and reseed fresh CLI sessions from the compacted transcript instead of stale external resume state. Fixes #68329. (#71916) Thanks @obviyus.

items.title: 内存/Ollama: serialize Ollama 内存 embedding batches 和 添加 an inline batch 超时 override, 使用 longer defaults 为了 local/self-hosted embedding providers.
items.rawTitle: Memory/Ollama: serialize Ollama memory embedding batches and add an inline batch timeout override, with longer defaults for local/self-hosted embedding providers.

changes.title: 语音 replies get a full TTS upgrade: `/tts latest`, chat-scoped auto-TTS controls, personas, per-Agent/per-account overrides, 和 new Azure Speech, Xiaomi, Local CLI, Inworld, Volcengine, 和 ElevenLabs v3 provider coverage. Thanks @leonchui, @zoujiejun, @solar2ain, @cshape, @xuruiray, @itsuzef, 和 @barronlroth.
changes.rawTitle: Voice replies get a full TTS upgrade: `/tts latest`, chat-scoped auto-TTS controls, personas, per-agent/per-account overrides, and new Azure Speech, Xiaomi, Local CLI, Inworld, Volcengine, and ElevenLabs v3 provider coverage. Thanks @leonchui, @zoujiejun, @solar2ain, @cshape, @xuruiray, @itsuzef, and @barronlroth.

changes.title: 插件 startup 和 install paths move to the cold persisted registry, cutting broad manifest scans while making 插件 更新, repair, provider discovery, 和 install metadata more deterministic. Thanks @vincentkoc 和 @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Plugin startup and install paths move to the cold persisted registry, cutting broad manifest scans while making plugin update, repair, provider discovery, and install metadata more deterministic. Thanks @vincentkoc and @shakkernerd.

changes.title: OpenTelemetry coverage expands across 模型 calls, 令牌 usage, 工具 loops, harness runs, exec processes, outbound delivery, context assembly, 和 内存 pressure 使用 bounded low-cardinality attributes. Thanks @vincentkoc, @jlapenna, @Lidang-Jiang, 和 @oc-factus.

changes.title: 浏览器 automation gets safer tab URLs, iframe-aware role snapshots, CDP readiness tuning, headless one-shot launch, 和 deeper 浏览器 诊断工具 probes 为了 slow hosts. Thanks @beat843796 和 @BenediktSchackenberg.

changes.title: Control 界面 和 setup flows 添加 PWA/Web Push 支持, Crestodian first-run repair, TUI setup, context mode selection, 和 a shorter startup greeting. Thanks @eduardocruz, @SebTardif, 和 @kevinlin-OpenAI.

changes.title: Install/更新 hardening covers Windows, macOS, Linux, Docker, bundled 插件 runtime deps, Node service restarts, LaunchAgent 令牌 rotation, 和 mixed-version 网关 verification. Thanks @Kobevictor, @igormf, @abhinas90, @jsompis, @Solvely-Colin, 和 @gucasbrg.

changes.title: TTS/WhatsApp: 添加 `/tts latest` read-aloud 支持 使用 duplicate suppression 和 `/tts chat 在|off|default` session-scoped auto-TTS overrides, completing the 在-demand 语音-note UX 为了 current-chat replies. 修复 #66032.

changes.title: TTS/channels: 解决 channel 和 account TTS overrides generically, enabling 飞书 和 QQBot accounts to deep-merge `channels.<channel>.accounts.<id>.tts` over global 和 per-Agent TTS 配置. Thanks @sahilsatralkar.

changes.title: TTS/Agent: 允许 `Agent.list[].tts` to override global `messages.tts` 为了 per-Agent voices, 和 make `/tts audio`, `/tts status`, 和 the `tts` Agent 工具 honor the active 语音/provider override while keeping shared provider credentials 和 preferences 在 the existing TTS 配置 surface.

changes.title: Codex/Agent: translate `--thinking minimal` to `low` 为了 modern Codex 模型 (gpt-5.5, gpt-5.4, gpt-5.4-mini, gpt-5.2) at request build time so the first turn is accepted 而不是 paying a wasted call + 重试-使用-low fallback. Older Codex 模型 still receive `minimal` directly. 修复 #71946. Thanks @hclsys.
changes.rawTitle: Codex/agent: translate `--thinking minimal` to `low` for modern Codex models (gpt-5.5, gpt-5.4, gpt-5.4-mini, gpt-5.2) at request build time so the first turn is accepted instead of paying a wasted call + retry-with-low fallback. Older Codex models still receive `minimal` directly. Fixes #71946. Thanks @hclsys.

changes.title: 插件/uninstall: 移除 tracked 插件 files 从 their recorded managed extensions root even 当 the current state directory points somewhere else, so `openclaw 插件 uninstall --force` does not leave the 插件 discoverable. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/uninstall: remove tracked plugin files from their recorded managed extensions root even when the current state directory points somewhere else, so `openclaw plugins uninstall --force` does not leave the plugin discoverable. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: Agent/runtime: 添加 `agentRuntime.id` as the canonical 配置 密钥, migrate legacy runtime-policy configs 使用 `openclaw 诊断工具 --修复`, route canonical Anthropic 模型 through `claude-CLI` 不适用 passing CLI backend aliases to embedded harness selection, 和 load CLI backend owner 插件 之前 channel startup. 修复 #71957. Thanks @WolvenRA.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/runtime: add `agentRuntime.id` as the canonical config key, migrate legacy runtime-policy configs with `openclaw doctor --fix`, route canonical Anthropic models through `claude-cli` without passing CLI backend aliases to embedded harness selection, and load CLI backend owner plugins before channel startup. Fixes #71957. Thanks @WolvenRA.

changes.title: CLI/更新: guard Windows scheduled-task stops 通过 state 和 超时 so auto-更新 restart cannot hang indefinitely 在 `schtasks /End` 之前 stale-listener cleanup. 修复 #69970. Thanks @yangswld 和 @sherlock-huang.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/update: guard Windows scheduled-task stops by state and timeout so auto-update restart cannot hang indefinitely on `schtasks /End` before stale-listener cleanup. Fixes #69970. Thanks @yangswld and @sherlock-huang.

changes.title: Windows install/Lobster: execute `pnpm.exe` directly 当 `npm_execpath` points at the native pnpm binary, 添加 an installed-package fallback 为了 the Lobster embedded runtime, 和 include the Lobster runner regression test 在 Windows CI. 修复 #69456. Thanks @igormf.
changes.rawTitle: Windows install/Lobster: execute `pnpm.exe` directly when `npm_execpath` points at the native pnpm binary, add an installed-package fallback for the Lobster embedded runtime, and include the Lobster runner regression test in Windows CI. Fixes #69456. Thanks @igormf.

changes.title: 网关/install: refresh loaded 网关 service installs 当 the current service embeds stale 网关 认证 而不是 returning already-installed, avoiding LaunchAgent 令牌-mismatch loops 之后 令牌 rotation. 修复 #70752. Thanks @hyspacex.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/install: refresh loaded gateway service installs when the current service embeds stale gateway auth instead of returning already-installed, avoiding LaunchAgent token-mismatch loops after token rotation. Fixes #70752. Thanks @hyspacex.

changes.title: 更新: ignore bundled 插件 `.openclaw-install-stage` directories 期间 global install verification 和 packaged dist pruning so leftover runtime-dep staging files do not turn successful updates 进入 `unexpected packaged dist file` failures. 修复 #71752. Thanks @waynegault.
changes.rawTitle: Update: ignore bundled plugin `.openclaw-install-stage` directories during global install verification and packaged dist pruning so leftover runtime-dep staging files do not turn successful updates into `unexpected packaged dist file` failures. Fixes #71752. Thanks @waynegault.

changes.title: CLI/更新: fail package updates 当 post-更新 插件 sync fails 和 refresh legacy npm 插件 install records 之前 trusting unchanged artifacts, preventing successful updates 从 restarting 使用 stale 或 failed 插件 state. Thanks @vincentkoc 和 @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/update: fail package updates when post-update plugin sync fails and refresh legacy npm plugin install records before trusting unchanged artifacts, preventing successful updates from restarting with stale or failed plugin state. Thanks @vincentkoc and @shakkernerd.

changes.title: Release/更新: reject pre-populated bundled 插件 `.openclaw-install-stage` directories, including mixed-case 路径 variants, 之前 package inventory generation so release tarballs cannot ship poisoned runtime-dependency staging debris. 修复 #71752. Thanks @hclsys.
changes.rawTitle: Release/update: reject pre-populated bundled plugin `.openclaw-install-stage` directories, including mixed-case path variants, before package inventory generation so release tarballs cannot ship poisoned runtime-dependency staging debris. Fixes #71752. Thanks @hclsys.

changes.rawTitle: Installer: load nvm before Node.js detection so `curl | bash` installs respect nvm-managed Node instead of stale system Node. Fixes #49556. Thanks @heavenlxj.

changes.title: Installer: warn 当 multiple npm global roots contain OpenClaw installs, showing active Node/npm/openclaw plus each install 路径 和 version so stale version-manager installs are visible. 修复 #40839. Thanks @zhixianio.

changes.title: Cron/tasks: recover completed cron task ledger records 从 durable run logs 和 job state 之前 marking them `lost`, reducing false `backing session missing` audit errors 为了 isolated cron runs 和 keeping offline CLI audit 从 treating its empty local cron active-job set as authoritative. 修复 #71963.

Fixes #71963.

changes.rawTitle: Logging: redact configured secret patterns at console and file-log sink exits so credentials that reach the logger are masked before terminal display or JSONL persistence. Fixes #67953. Thanks @Ziy1-Tan.

changes.title: 网关/services: refuse process 和 service mutations 从 an older OpenClaw binary 当 the 配置 was last written 通过 a newer version, preventing split-brain installs 从 stopping 或 rewriting newer 网关 services. 修复 #57079.

changes.rawTitle: Gateway: reserve `/healthz` and `/readyz` ahead of plugin, canvas, and Control UI HTTP stages so liveness/readiness probes still answer when a later route handler stalls. Fixes #69674. Thanks @Xike-Creek.

changes.rawTitle: Logging: load `logging.file` and redaction settings directly from the active OpenClaw config path in bundled runtimes, so packaged gateways stop falling back to `/tmp/openclaw`. Fixes #59370, #67168, and #61295. Thanks @KeaneYan, @Pan9hu, and @zsjlovelike.

changes.title: Logging: rotate file logs at `logging.maxFileBytes`, keep bounded numbered archives, 和 make long-lived rolling loggers follow the current-day file 而不是 suppressing diagnostics 或 writing stale dated files. 修复 #58583 和 #62381. Thanks @jpeghead 和 @zhaoleink.

changes.title: Agent/groups: treat clean empty assistant stops as silent `NO_REPLY` only 为了 always-在 groups where silent replies are allowed, while keeping direct 和 mention-gated sessions 在 the incomplete-turn 重试 路径. Thanks @MagnaAI.

changes.title: 网关/更新: fail package updates 当 the restarted managed 网关 reports the wrong version, including fallback restarts 和 JSON mode, avoiding false-success mixed-version restarts 之后 macOS LaunchAgent updates. 修复 #71835. Thanks @abhinas90 和 @jsompis.

changes.title: 网关/更新: warn 之前 package updates 和 bundled 插件 runtime-dependency repairs 当 the target volume appears low 在 disk space, 不适用 blocking installs 在 best-effort filesystem checks. 修复 #71835. Thanks @abhinas90 和 @jsompis.

changes.rawTitle: Plugins/runtime deps: surface activated plugin load failures in health and fail package-update restart verification or doctor repair when bundled runtime deps still cannot load, avoiding false-success repairs. (#71883) Thanks @Solvely-Colin.
