changes.title: CLI/Volta: respawn raw `openclaw` CLI runs through the named `node` shim 当 the current Node executable resolves to `volta-shim`, avoiding direct shim execution failures 在 non-interactive shells. 修复 #68672. Thanks @sanchezm86.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/Volta: respawn raw `openclaw` CLI runs through the named `node` shim when the current Node executable resolves to `volta-shim`, avoiding direct shim execution failures in non-interactive shells. Fixes #68672. Thanks @sanchezm86.

changes.title: Installer: warn 当 multiple npm global roots contain OpenClaw installs, showing active Node/npm/openclaw plus each install 路径 和 version so stale version-manager installs are visible. 修复 #40839. Thanks @zhixianio.
changes.rawTitle: Installer: warn when multiple npm global roots contain OpenClaw installs, showing active Node/npm/openclaw plus each install path and version so stale version-manager installs are visible. Fixes #40839. Thanks @zhixianio.

changes.title: Cron/tasks: recover completed cron task ledger records 从 durable run logs 和 job state 之前 marking them `lost`, reducing false `backing session missing` audit errors 为了 isolated cron runs 和 keeping offline CLI audit 从 treating its empty local cron active-job set as authoritative. 修复 #71963.
changes.rawTitle: Cron/tasks: recover completed cron task ledger records from durable run logs and job state before marking them `lost`, reducing false `backing session missing` audit errors for isolated cron runs and keeping offline CLI audit from treating its empty local cron active-job set as authoritative. Fixes #71963.

changes.title: Docker: copy patched dependency files 进入 runtime images so downstream `pnpm install` layers keep working. 修复 #69224. Thanks @gucasbrg.
changes.rawTitle: Docker: copy patched dependency files into runtime images so downstream `pnpm install` layers keep working. Fixes #69224. Thanks @gucasbrg.

changes.title: Package: include patched dependency files 在 the published npm package so downstream installs can 解决 `patchedDependencies`. (#69224) Thanks @gucasbrg 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Package: include patched dependency files in the published npm package so downstream installs can resolve `patchedDependencies`. (#69224) Thanks @gucasbrg and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/channels: treat malformed bundled channel 插件 loaders that return `undefined` as unavailable 而不是 crashing 配置 和 help paths. 修复 #69044. Thanks @frankhli843 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/channels: treat malformed bundled channel plugin loaders that return `undefined` as unavailable instead of crashing config and help paths. Fixes #69044. Thanks @frankhli843 and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Scripts/watch: show corrupted dependency package-配置 recovery guidance 当 `网关:watch` fails 期间 watcher startup, 不适用 double-logging unrelated import failures. (#58780) Thanks @roytong9 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Scripts/watch: show corrupted dependency package-config recovery guidance when `gateway:watch` fails during watcher startup, without double-logging unrelated import failures. (#58780) Thanks @roytong9 and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Signal: read Signal-CLI RPC, health checks, 和 SSE events through Node's HTTP client so Node 24/25 fetch regressions do not break Signal sends 或 inbound events. 修复 #51716 和 #53040. Thanks @Barukimang, @minupla, 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Signal: read signal-cli RPC, health checks, and SSE events through Node's HTTP client so Node 24/25 fetch regressions do not break Signal sends or inbound events. Fixes #51716 and #53040. Thanks @Barukimang, @minupla, and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Skills/Docker: run npm-backed skill dependency installs 使用 an OpenClaw-managed user prefix so non-root Docker images do not write to `/usr/local`. 修复 #59601. Thanks @chanjarster 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Skills/Docker: run npm-backed skill dependency installs with an OpenClaw-managed user prefix so non-root Docker images do not write to `/usr/local`. Fixes #59601. Thanks @chanjarster and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Agent/runtime: submit heartbeat, cron, 和 exec wakeups as transient runtime context 而不是 visible user prompts, keeping synthetic system work out 的 chat transcripts. 修复 #66496 和 #66814. Thanks @jeades 和 @mandomaker.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/runtime: submit heartbeat, cron, and exec wakeups as transient runtime context instead of visible user prompts, keeping synthetic system work out of chat transcripts. Fixes #66496 and #66814. Thanks @jeades and @mandomaker.

changes.title: Telegram: include native quote excerpts automatically 为了 threaded replies 和 reply tags 当 the original Telegram text is available, 不适用 adding another 配置 knob. 修复 #6975. Thanks @rex05ai.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram: include native quote excerpts automatically for threaded replies and reply tags when the original Telegram text is available, without adding another config knob. Fixes #6975. Thanks @rex05ai.

changes.title: Node/Linux: make `openclaw node install` 启用 和 restart the `openclaw-node` systemd unit 而不是 the 网关 unit 在 node-only VMs. 修复 #68287. Thanks @dlebee-Agent.
changes.rawTitle: Node/Linux: make `openclaw node install` enable and restart the `openclaw-node` systemd unit instead of the gateway unit on node-only VMs. Fixes #68287. Thanks @dlebee-agent.

changes.title: 浏览器/CDP: 重试 transient raw-CDP WebSocket handshake failures 之前 any 浏览器 命令 is sent, 和 reconnect stale persistent Playwright CDP sessions 为了 safe tab-list reads 不适用 replaying mutating 浏览器 actions. 修复 #67728.
changes.rawTitle: Browser/CDP: retry transient raw-CDP WebSocket handshake failures before any browser command is sent, and reconnect stale persistent Playwright CDP sessions for safe tab-list reads without replaying mutating browser actions. Fixes #67728.

changes.title: 网关/Linux: 重试 `systemctl --user 启用` 之后 a second daemon reload 当 the freshly written 网关 unit is not visible yet 在 migrated systemd installs. 修复 #65184. Thanks @liushuaiiu.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/Linux: retry `systemctl --user enable` after a second daemon reload when the freshly written gateway unit is not visible yet on migrated systemd installs. Fixes #65184. Thanks @liushuaiiu.

changes.title: Telegram: 保留 exact selected quote text 当 sending native quote replies, 和 重试 使用 legacy replies if Telegram rejects quote parameters. (#71952) Thanks @rubencu.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram: preserve exact selected quote text when sending native quote replies, and retry with legacy replies if Telegram rejects quote parameters. (#71952) Thanks @rubencu.

changes.title: 插件/CLI: 保留 manifest name, description, format, 和 source metadata 在 cold `openclaw 插件 list` output 不适用 importing 插件 runtime. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/CLI: preserve manifest name, description, format, and source metadata in cold `openclaw plugins list` output without importing plugin runtime. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: 安全/audit: read channel exposure 和 插件 allowlist ownership 从 read-only 插件 index metadata so cold audits do not depend 在 loaded channel runtime. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Security/audit: read channel exposure and plugin allowlist ownership from read-only plugin index metadata so cold audits do not depend on loaded channel runtime. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: 插件/chat: keep `/插件 list`, `/插件 启用`, 和 `/插件 禁用` 在 the persisted 插件 index 路径 so chat 插件 management does not load diagnostic/runtime 插件 registries 之前 execution. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/chat: keep `/plugins list`, `/plugins enable`, and `/plugins disable` on the persisted plugin index path so chat plugin management does not load diagnostic/runtime plugin registries before execution. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: 插件/诊断工具: read workspace 插件 status 和 legacy web-search ownership through installed-index manifest metadata 而不是 broad manifest registry scans. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/doctor: read workspace plugin status and legacy web-search ownership through installed-index manifest metadata instead of broad manifest registry scans. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: CLI/Agent: read channel provider status 从 read-only 插件 index metadata 为了 text `Agent list` output 而不是 the loaded channel registry. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/agents: read channel provider status from read-only plugin index metadata for text `agents list` output instead of the loaded channel registry. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: Logging: redact configured secret patterns at console 和 file-log sink exits so credentials that reach the logger are masked 之前 terminal display 或 JSONL persistence. 修复 #67953. Thanks @Ziy1-Tan.
changes.rawTitle: Logging: redact configured secret patterns at console and file-log sink exits so credentials that reach the logger are masked before terminal display or JSONL persistence. Fixes #67953. Thanks @Ziy1-Tan.

changes.title: 网关/services: refuse process 和 service mutations 从 an older OpenClaw binary 当 the 配置 was last written 通过 a newer version, preventing split-brain installs 从 stopping 或 rewriting newer 网关 services. 修复 #57079.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/services: refuse process and service mutations from an older OpenClaw binary when the config was last written by a newer version, preventing split-brain installs from stopping or rewriting newer gateway services. Fixes #57079.

changes.title: 网关: reserve `/healthz` 和 `/readyz` ahead 的 插件, canvas, 和 Control 界面 HTTP stages so liveness/readiness probes still answer 当 a later route handler stalls. 修复 #69674. Thanks @Xike-Creek.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway: reserve `/healthz` and `/readyz` ahead of plugin, canvas, and Control UI HTTP stages so liveness/readiness probes still answer when a later route handler stalls. Fixes #69674. Thanks @Xike-Creek.

changes.title: Logging: load `logging.file` 和 redaction settings directly 从 the active OpenClaw 配置 路径 在 bundled runtimes, so packaged gateways 停止 falling back to `/tmp/openclaw`. 修复 #59370, #67168, 和 #61295. Thanks @KeaneYan, @Pan9hu, 和 @zsjlovelike.
changes.rawTitle: Logging: load `logging.file` and redaction settings directly from the active OpenClaw config path in bundled runtimes, so packaged gateways stop falling back to `/tmp/openclaw`. Fixes #59370, #67168, and #61295. Thanks @KeaneYan, @Pan9hu, and @zsjlovelike.

changes.title: Logging: rotate file logs at `logging.maxFileBytes`, keep bounded numbered archives, 和 make long-lived rolling loggers follow the current-day file 而不是 suppressing diagnostics 或 writing stale dated files. 修复 #58583 和 #62381. Thanks @jpeghead 和 @zhaoleink.
changes.rawTitle: Logging: rotate file logs at `logging.maxFileBytes`, keep bounded numbered archives, and make long-lived rolling loggers follow the current-day file instead of suppressing diagnostics or writing stale dated files. Fixes #58583 and #62381. Thanks @jpeghead and @zhaoleink.

changes.title: Agent/groups: treat clean empty assistant stops as silent `NO_REPLY` only 为了 always-在 groups where silent replies are allowed, while keeping direct 和 mention-gated sessions 在 the incomplete-turn 重试 路径. Thanks @MagnaAI.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/groups: treat clean empty assistant stops as silent `NO_REPLY` only for always-on groups where silent replies are allowed, while keeping direct and mention-gated sessions on the incomplete-turn retry path. Thanks @MagnaAI.

changes.title: macOS/Node: keep native remote app nodes 从 advertising `浏览器.代理`, start 浏览器-capable CLI node services through the restored `openclaw node start` 命令, 和 show an actionable 浏览器-control 错误 当 the local control service is missing. 修复 #66637.
changes.rawTitle: macOS/Node: keep native remote app nodes from advertising `browser.proxy`, start browser-capable CLI node services through the restored `openclaw node start` command, and show an actionable browser-control error when the local control service is missing. Fixes #66637.

changes.title: 网关/更新: fail package updates 当 the restarted managed 网关 reports the wrong version, including fallback restarts 和 JSON mode, avoiding false-success mixed-version restarts 之后 macOS LaunchAgent updates. 修复 #71835. Thanks @abhinas90 和 @jsompis.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/update: fail package updates when the restarted managed gateway reports the wrong version, including fallback restarts and JSON mode, avoiding false-success mixed-version restarts after macOS LaunchAgent updates. Fixes #71835. Thanks @abhinas90 and @jsompis.

changes.title: 网关/更新: warn 之前 package updates 和 bundled 插件 runtime-dependency repairs 当 the target volume appears low 在 disk space, 不适用 blocking installs 在 best-effort filesystem checks. 修复 #71835. Thanks @abhinas90 和 @jsompis.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/update: warn before package updates and bundled plugin runtime-dependency repairs when the target volume appears low on disk space, without blocking installs on best-effort filesystem checks. Fixes #71835. Thanks @abhinas90 and @jsompis.

changes.title: 插件/runtime deps: surface activated 插件 load failures 在 health 和 fail package-更新 restart verification 或 诊断工具 repair 当 bundled runtime deps still cannot load, avoiding false-success repairs. (#71883) Thanks @Solvely-Colin.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/runtime deps: surface activated plugin load failures in health and fail package-update restart verification or doctor repair when bundled runtime deps still cannot load, avoiding false-success repairs. (#71883) Thanks @Solvely-Colin.

changes.title: 网关/Linux: include fnm `aliases/default/bin` 在 generated service PATHs 和 let 诊断工具 accept either modern fnm aliases 或 the legacy `current/bin` symlink, avoiding false 路径 repair prompts. 修复 #68169. Thanks @richard-scott.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/Linux: include fnm `aliases/default/bin` in generated service PATHs and let doctor accept either modern fnm aliases or the legacy `current/bin` symlink, avoiding false PATH repair prompts. Fixes #68169. Thanks @richard-scott.

changes.title: Installer/Linux: run apt installs 使用 noninteractive dpkg 和 needrestart settings so fresh Ubuntu 24.04 `curl | bash` installs do not hang while installing Node.js, Git, 或 build tools. 修复 #41146. Thanks @iht76, @alexcarv318, @cs3gallery, @firofame, 和 @cgdusek.
changes.rawTitle: Installer/Linux: run apt installs with noninteractive dpkg and needrestart settings so fresh Ubuntu 24.04 `curl | bash` installs do not hang while installing Node.js, Git, or build tools. Fixes #41146. Thanks @iht76, @alexcarv318, @cs3gallery, @firofame, and @cgdusek.

changes.title: Providers/Bedrock: defer the AWS SDK import until Bedrock discovery actually runs so 插件 registration 和 setup stay lightweight 在 cold start. 修复 #71690. Thanks @jarvis-ai-gregmoser.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/Bedrock: defer the AWS SDK import until Bedrock discovery actually runs so plugin registration and setup stay lightweight on cold start. Fixes #71690. Thanks @jarvis-ai-gregmoser.

changes.title: Installer/macOS: 停止 immediately 当 Homebrew `node@24` installation fails 和 避免 printing 路径 advice 为了 missing Homebrew Node installs. 修复 #70411. Thanks @1fanwang.
changes.rawTitle: Installer/macOS: stop immediately when Homebrew `node@24` installation fails and avoid printing PATH advice for missing Homebrew Node installs. Fixes #70411. Thanks @1fanwang.

changes.title: WhatsApp: 移除 ack reactions 之后 a visible reply 当 `messages.removeAckAfterReply` is enabled, matching other reaction-capable channels. 修复 #26183. Thanks @MrUnforsaken.
changes.rawTitle: WhatsApp: remove ack reactions after a visible reply when `messages.removeAckAfterReply` is enabled, matching other reaction-capable channels. Fixes #26183. Thanks @MrUnforsaken.

changes.rawTitle: Providers/Z.AI: map OpenClaw thinking controls to Z.AI's `thinking` payload and add opt-in preserved thinking replay via `params.preserveThinking`, so GLM 5.x can keep prior `reasoning_content` when requested. Fixes #58680. Thanks @xuanmingguo.

changes.title: Channels/status: keep read-only channel lists 在 manifest 和 package metadata 通过 default, loading setup runtime only 为了 explicit fallback callers. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Channels/status: keep read-only channel lists on manifest and package metadata by default, loading setup runtime only for explicit fallback callers. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: 插件: scope setup 和 web-provider metadata manifest reads to explicit 插件 ids 当 callers already know the owning 插件 set. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins: scope setup and web-provider metadata manifest reads to explicit plugin ids when callers already know the owning plugin set. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.rawTitle: Plugins/onboarding: defer onboarding install-record index writes until the guarded config commit so setup failures cannot leave the plugin index ahead of `openclaw.json`. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: 插件/registry: 解决 web provider ownership 从 the installed 插件 index 而不是 broad manifest scans 在 secret, 工具, 和 pricing paths. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/registry: resolve web provider ownership from the installed plugin index instead of broad manifest scans on secret, tool, and pricing paths. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.rawTitle: Config/providers: accept `video` and `audio` in configured model `input` values and preserve them in provider catalog entries. Fixes #20721. Thanks @alvinttang.

changes.title: 模型/认证: honor the parent `--Agent` flag 为了 认证 write commands (`添加`, `login`, `setup-令牌`, `paste-令牌`, 和 the GitHub Copilot shortcut) so OAuth认证/API-密钥/令牌 results are written to the requested Agent store 而不是 the default Agent. 修复 #71864. (#71933) Thanks @balric-seo.
changes.rawTitle: Models/auth: honor the parent `--agent` flag for auth write commands (`add`, `login`, `setup-token`, `paste-token`, and the GitHub Copilot shortcut) so OAuth/API-key/token results are written to the requested agent store instead of the default agent. Fixes #71864. (#71933) Thanks @balric-seo.

changes.title: TTS: strip 模型-emitted TTS directives 从 streamed block text 之前 channel delivery, including directives split across adjacent blocks, while preserving the accumulated raw reply 为了 final-mode synthesis. 修复 #38937.
changes.rawTitle: TTS: strip model-emitted TTS directives from streamed block text before channel delivery, including directives split across adjacent blocks, while preserving the accumulated raw reply for final-mode synthesis. Fixes #38937.

changes.title: TTS: keep explicit `provider=...` directive keys scoped to that provider 和 warn 在 unsupported keys 而不是 letting another speech provider consume overlapping keys. 修复 #60131.
changes.rawTitle: TTS: keep explicit `provider=...` directive keys scoped to that provider and warn on unsupported keys instead of letting another speech provider consume overlapping keys. Fixes #60131.

changes.rawTitle: TTS/Feishu: normalize final-mode streamed TTS-only audio before delivery so generated voice-note files use the same safe media path and native voice routing as normal final replies. Fixes #71920.

changes.rawTitle: Feishu: transcribe inbound voice-note audio with the shared media audio path before agent dispatch and keep raw Feishu `file_key` payloads out of message text. Fixes #67120 and #61876.

changes.rawTitle: Tasks: terminalize async Gateway agent task records from the Gateway run result while preserving aborted, failed, and cancelled outcomes instead of leaving completed runs stuck as active or lost. (#71905) Thanks @likewen-tech.

changes.rawTitle: WhatsApp: let authorized group voice-note transcripts satisfy mention gating before reply dispatch, while keeping unmentioned transcripts in pending group history. Fixes #44908.

changes.rawTitle: Media understanding: carry channel voice-note preflight state into attachment selection so WhatsApp, Feishu, Telegram, and Discord do not transcribe the same inbound audio twice. Fixes #70580.

changes.rawTitle: TTS/BlueBubbles: deliver compatible auto-TTS audio as iMessage voice memo bubbles instead of plain MP3/CAF file attachments. Fixes #16848.

changes.rawTitle: TTS: resolve voice-note and voice-memo routing from channel plugin capabilities instead of speech-core-owned channel id lists.

changes.rawTitle: ACP: send subagent and async-task completion wakes to external ACP harnesses as plain prompts instead of OpenClaw internal runtime-context envelopes, while keeping those envelopes out of ACP transcripts.

changes.rawTitle: TTS/status: show configured TTS model, voice, and sanitized custom endpoint in `/status`, preserve OpenAI-compatible TTS instructions on custom endpoints, and retry empty Microsoft/Edge TTS output once. changes.title: Agent/网关: steer Agent-driven 配置 edits 和 restarts through the owner-only `网关` 工具, document `配置.schema.lookup` as the field-doc source, 和 warn against using `网关 停止 && 网关 start` as a restart substitute 在 macOS. 修复 #71929. Thanks @ygc3817922006-sketch.

changes.rawTitle: Media understanding/audio: inject a deterministic transcript placeholder for too-small voice notes so agents do not hallucinate transcription or provider failures. Fixes #48944. Thanks @eulicesl.

changes.rawTitle: Channels/replies: strip copied inbound metadata blocks from user-facing assistant replies and model replay history, so Discord/vLLM sessions do not leak `Conversation info` / `UNTRUSTED ... message body` envelopes after a model echoes them. Fixes #71847. Thanks @jmystaki-create.

changes.rawTitle: Subagents/memory: keep inter-session completion wakes out of memory and dreaming session exports, and strip internal runtime-context blocks from realtime Control UI chat events.

changes.rawTitle: Gateway/pairing: stop corrupt or unreadable device/node pairing stores from being treated as empty state, preserving `paired.json` for repair instead of overwriting approved pairings. Fixes #71873. Thanks @iret77.

changes.rawTitle: ACP: keep `/acp` management commands, plus local `/status` and `/unfocus`, on the Gateway path inside ACP-bound threads so they are not consumed as ACP prompt text. Fixes #66298. Thanks @kindomLee.

changes.title: ACPX: 停止 probing ACP Agent 期间 normal 网关 startup; the embedded backend 现在 registers 不适用 spawning Codex/ACP child processes unless `OPENCLAW_ACPX_RUNTIME_STARTUP_PROBE=1` is explicitly set.
changes.rawTitle: ACPX: stop probing ACP agents during normal Gateway startup; the embedded backend now registers without spawning Codex/ACP child processes unless `OPENCLAW_ACPX_RUNTIME_STARTUP_PROBE=1` is explicitly set.

changes.title: CLI/image edit: accept `--size`, `--aspect-ratio`, 和 `--resolution` 在 `openclaw infer image edit` 和 report all supported edit flags 从 `capability inspect image.edit`. Thanks @Pinghuachiu.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/image edit: accept `--size`, `--aspect-ratio`, and `--resolution` on `openclaw infer image edit` and report all supported edit flags from `capability inspect image.edit`. Thanks @Pinghuachiu.

changes.title: ACP: wait 为了 the configured runtime backend to become healthy 之前 startup identity reconciliation, avoiding transient acpx warnings 期间 网关 boot. 修复 #40566.
changes.rawTitle: ACP: wait for the configured runtime backend to become healthy before startup identity reconciliation, avoiding transient acpx warnings during Gateway boot. Fixes #40566.

changes.title: Channels/ACP bindings: time out configured binding readiness checks 而不是 letting Discord preflight hang forever 当 an ACP target never settles. 修复 #68776.
changes.rawTitle: Channels/ACP bindings: time out configured binding readiness checks instead of letting Discord preflight hang forever when an ACP target never settles. Fixes #68776.

changes.title: Control 界面: hide the chat loading skeleton 期间 background history reloads 当 existing messages 或 active stream content are already visible, avoiding reload flashes 在 high-latency local gateways. 修复 #71844. Thanks @WolvenRA.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI: hide the chat loading skeleton during background history reloads when existing messages or active stream content are already visible, avoiding reload flashes on high-latency local gateways. Fixes #71844. Thanks @WolvenRA.

changes.title: Control 界面: keep locally optimistic chat messages visible 当 a history reload temporarily returns empty, avoiding lost first-turn messages 在 high-latency gateways. 修复 #71878. Thanks @WolvenRA.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI: keep locally optimistic chat messages visible when a history reload temporarily returns empty, avoiding lost first-turn messages on high-latency gateways. Fixes #71878. Thanks @WolvenRA.

changes.title: Control 界面: keep chat history limits 基于 visible messages 之后 filtering heartbeat 和 control-only transcript rows, so recent hidden entries no longer make older visible replies disappear. Thanks @WolvenRA.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI: keep chat history limits based on visible messages after filtering heartbeat and control-only transcript rows, so recent hidden entries no longer make older visible replies disappear. Thanks @WolvenRA.

changes.title: Agent/images: scrub old `[media attached: ...]`, `[Image: source: ...]`, 和 `media://inbound/...` markers 从 pruned 模型 replay context so stale media refs are not rehydrated as fresh prompt images. 修复 #71868. Thanks @jmeadlock.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/images: scrub old `[media attached: ...]`, `[Image: source: ...]`, and `media://inbound/...` markers from pruned model replay context so stale media refs are not rehydrated as fresh prompt images. Fixes #71868. Thanks @jmeadlock.

changes.title: Docker/Bonjour: 禁用 Bonjour/mDNS advertising 通过 default 为了 bundled Compose gateways 在 bridge networking, while keeping host/macvlan opt-在 使用 `OPENCLAW_DISABLE_BONJOUR=0`. 修复 #71879. Thanks @gbballpack.
changes.rawTitle: Docker/Bonjour: disable Bonjour/mDNS advertising by default for bundled Compose gateways on bridge networking, while keeping host/macvlan opt-in with `OPENCLAW_DISABLE_BONJOUR=0`. Fixes #71879. Thanks @gbballpack.

changes.title: CLI/status: label the OpenClaw Serve/Funnel 设置 as `Tailscale exposure` 和 show daemon state separately 当 available, so `网关.tailscale.mode: "off"` no longer reads like the Tailscale daemon is stopped. 修复 #71790. Thanks @pesvobodak.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/status: label the OpenClaw Serve/Funnel setting as `Tailscale exposure` and show daemon state separately when available, so `gateway.tailscale.mode: "off"` no longer reads like the Tailscale daemon is stopped. Fixes #71790. Thanks @pesvobodak.

changes.title: 插件/Bonjour: 停止 ciao mDNS watchdog failures 从 looping forever 当 the advertiser stays stuck 在 `probing` 或 `announcing`; Bonjour 现在 disables itself 为了 the current 网关 process 之后 repeated failed restarts while the 网关 keeps running. 修复 #69011. Thanks @siddharthaagarwalofficial-ux, @FiredMosquito831, 和 @spikefcz.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/Bonjour: stop ciao mDNS watchdog failures from looping forever when the advertiser stays stuck in `probing` or `announcing`; Bonjour now disables itself for the current Gateway process after repeated failed restarts while the Gateway keeps running. Fixes #69011. Thanks @siddharthaagarwalofficial-ux, @FiredMosquito831, and @spikefcz.

changes.title: 网关/Fly.io: seed Control 界面 allowed origins 从 the actual runtime bind 和 port so CLI-driven non-loopback starts do not 崩溃 之前 配置 exists. 修复 #71823.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/Fly.io: seed Control UI allowed origins from the actual runtime bind and port so CLI-driven non-loopback starts do not crash before config exists. Fixes #71823.

changes.title: macOS/remote SSH: keep discovered 网关 hosts 在 `网关.remote.sshTarget` while pinning SSH transport URLs to the local loopback tunnel, so 浏览器 automation does not regress 进入 blocked non-loopback `ws://` endpoints. 修复 #67336.
changes.rawTitle: macOS/remote SSH: keep discovered gateway hosts in `gateway.remote.sshTarget` while pinning SSH transport URLs to the local loopback tunnel, so browser automation does not regress into blocked non-loopback `ws://` endpoints. Fixes #67336.

changes.title: 网关/代理: bootstrap env 代理 dispatching 从 direct 网关 startup so provider 和 插件 network requests honor `HTTPS_PROXY`/`HTTP_PROXY` 之前 the first embedded Agent attempt runs. (#71833) Thanks @mjamiv.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/proxy: bootstrap env proxy dispatching from direct Gateway startup so provider and plugin network requests honor `HTTPS_PROXY`/`HTTP_PROXY` before the first embedded agent attempt runs. (#71833) Thanks @mjamiv.

changes.title: 插件/runtime deps: verify clean npm installs actually place requested bundled runtime packages 在 the managed install root, reporting exact missing specs 而不是 a false successful repair. (#71883) Thanks @Solvely-Colin.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/runtime deps: verify clean npm installs actually place requested bundled runtime packages in the managed install root, reporting exact missing specs instead of a false successful repair. (#71883) Thanks @Solvely-Colin.

changes.title: 插件/discovery: ignore stale `插件.load.paths` aliases that point back at packaged bundled 插件 directories 和 have 诊断工具 移除 them, keeping bundled 插件 在 the runtime-deps staging 路径. Thanks @Codex.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/discovery: ignore stale `plugins.load.paths` aliases that point back at packaged bundled plugin directories and have doctor remove them, keeping bundled plugins on the runtime-deps staging path. Thanks @codex.

changes.title: 模型/LM Studio: 保留 `@iq*` quant suffixes 在 模型 refs 和 provider matching so `/模型 lmstudio/...@iq3_xxs` keeps the exact LM Studio variant. 修复 #71474. (#71486) Thanks @Bartok9, @XinwuC, 和 @Sanjays2402.
changes.rawTitle: Models/LM Studio: preserve `@iq*` quant suffixes in model refs and provider matching so `/model lmstudio/...@iq3_xxs` keeps the exact LM Studio variant. Fixes #71474. (#71486) Thanks @Bartok9, @XinwuC, and @Sanjays2402.

changes.title: Matrix/cron: 保留 the live Matrix delivery target 当 creating implicit announce reminder jobs so mixed-case room IDs are not reconstructed 从 lowercased session keys. 修复 #71798.
changes.rawTitle: Matrix/cron: preserve the live Matrix delivery target when creating implicit announce reminder jobs so mixed-case room IDs are not reconstructed from lowercased session keys. Fixes #71798.

changes.title: 飞书: accept Schema 2.0 card action callbacks that report `context.open_chat_id` 而不是 legacy `context.chat_id`, so button callbacks no longer drop as malformed. 修复 #71670. Thanks @eddy1068.
changes.rawTitle: Feishu: accept Schema 2.0 card action callbacks that report `context.open_chat_id` instead of legacy `context.chat_id`, so button callbacks no longer drop as malformed. Fixes #71670. Thanks @eddy1068.

changes.title: 飞书: keep synthetic card-action 和 bot-menu ids out 的 platform reply targets, using the real card callback message id 当 飞书 provides one 和 plain-sending otherwise. 修复 #71673. Thanks @eddy1068.
changes.rawTitle: Feishu: keep synthetic card-action and bot-menu ids out of platform reply targets, using the real card callback message id when Feishu provides one and plain-sending otherwise. Fixes #71673. Thanks @eddy1068.

changes.title: 插件/QQ Bot: prefer an installed QQ Bot 插件 that declares it replaces the bundled `qqbot` channel, preventing duplicate `qqbot_channel_api` 和 `qqbot_remind` 工具 registration noise. 修复 #63102.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/QQ Bot: prefer an installed QQ Bot plugin that declares it replaces the bundled `qqbot` channel, preventing duplicate `qqbot_channel_api` and `qqbot_remind` tool registration noise. Fixes #63102.

changes.title: 浏览器 automation: keep stable tab ids 和 labels attached 当 Chromium replaces the raw target 之后 form submissions 或 other action-triggered navigations, 和 return the replacement `targetId` 从 `/act` 当 the match is provable. 修复 #46137.
changes.rawTitle: Browser automation: keep stable tab ids and labels attached when Chromium replaces the raw target after form submissions or other action-triggered navigations, and return the replacement `targetId` from `/act` when the match is provable. Fixes #46137.

changes.title: QQ Bot: make `qqbot_remind` schedule, list, 和 移除 网关 cron jobs directly 为了 owner-authorized senders 而不是 returning `cronParams` 和 relying 在 a follow-up generic `cron` 工具 call. 修复 #70865. (#70937) Thanks @GaosCode.
changes.rawTitle: QQ Bot: make `qqbot_remind` schedule, list, and remove Gateway cron jobs directly for owner-authorized senders instead of returning `cronParams` and relying on a follow-up generic `cron` tool call. Fixes #70865. (#70937) Thanks @GaosCode.

changes.title: Agent/ACP: hide `sessions_spawn` ACP runtime options unless an ACP backend is loaded, 和 make `/acp 诊断工具` call out `插件.允许` blocking bundled `acpx`. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/ACP: hide `sessions_spawn` ACP runtime options unless an ACP backend is loaded, and make `/acp doctor` call out `plugins.allow` blocking bundled `acpx`. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Agent/Codex: keep ACP prompt/skill routing hidden unless an ACP runtime backend is available, 和 warn 在 诊断工具 当 enabled Codex 插件 configs still route `OpenAI-Codex/*` 模型 through PI. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/Codex: keep ACP prompt/skill routing hidden unless an ACP runtime backend is available, and warn in doctor when enabled Codex plugin configs still route `openai-codex/*` models through PI. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.rawTitle: Media delivery: avoid sending generated image attachments twice when the assistant reply already includes explicit `MEDIA:` lines for the same turn, and reject unsafe remote `MEDIA:` URLs before delivery. Thanks @pashpashpash.

changes.title: Codex harness: ignore retryable app-server 错误 notifications 之后 Codex recovers, 和 保留 the real nested 错误 message 为了 terminal app-server failures 而不是 replacing it 使用 a generic failure. Thanks @pashpashpash.
changes.rawTitle: Codex harness: ignore retryable app-server error notifications after Codex recovers, and preserve the real nested error message for terminal app-server failures instead of replacing it with a generic failure. Thanks @pashpashpash.

changes.title: Agent/Codex: prepare native Codex sub-Agent session metadata 不适用 a nested 网关 session patch 和 添加 a focused Docker smoke 为了 the app-server sub-Agent 路径. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/Codex: prepare native Codex sub-agent session metadata without a nested Gateway session patch and add a focused Docker smoke for the app-server sub-agent path. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Agent/subagents: keep queued subagent announces session-only 当 the requester has no external channel target, avoiding ambiguous multi-channel delivery failures. 修复 #59201. Thanks @larrylhollan.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/subagents: keep queued subagent announces session-only when the requester has no external channel target, avoiding ambiguous multi-channel delivery failures. Fixes #59201. Thanks @larrylhollan.

changes.title: Image understanding: 保留 configured provider-prefixed vision 模型 metadata 当 callers request the 模型 不适用 the provider prefix, so custom image 模型 keep their `input: ["text", "image"]` capability. 修复 #33185. Thanks @Kobe9312 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Image understanding: preserve configured provider-prefixed vision model metadata when callers request the model without the provider prefix, so custom image models keep their `input: ["text", "image"]` capability. Fixes #33185. Thanks @Kobe9312 and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/install: restore the previous 插件 index records if a concurrent 配置 write conflict interrupts install, 更新, 或 uninstall metadata commits. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/install: restore the previous plugin index records if a concurrent config write conflict interrupts install, update, or uninstall metadata commits. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: 插件/install: reject native 插件 archives that do not include a valid `openclaw.插件.json`, preventing manifestless archives 从 writing install records that later show missing-manifest diagnostics. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/install: reject native plugin archives that do not include a valid `openclaw.plugin.json`, preventing manifestless archives from writing install records that later show missing-manifest diagnostics. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: 插件/uninstall: 移除 tracked managed 插件 install directories even 当 the persisted install 路径 differs 从 the default id-derived target, while still refusing deletes outside the managed extensions root. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/uninstall: remove tracked managed plugin install directories even when the persisted install path differs from the default id-derived target, while still refusing deletes outside the managed extensions root. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: 插件/更新: restore previous 插件 index records if core 更新 或 channel setup hits a concurrent 配置 write conflict 之后 插件 metadata changes. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/update: restore previous plugin index records if core update or channel setup hits a concurrent config write conflict after plugin metadata changes. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: 插件/onboarding: defer channel/provider 插件 install records until the owning 配置 write commits, keeping setup failures 从 advancing the 插件 index ahead 的 `openclaw.json`. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/onboarding: defer channel/provider plugin install records until the owning config write commits, keeping setup failures from advancing the plugin index ahead of `openclaw.json`. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: 插件/配置: route configure 和 Agent setup writes 使用 pending 插件 install records through the 插件 index commit helper so provider onboarding metadata is not stripped 通过 plain 配置 writes. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/config: route configure and agent setup writes with pending plugin install records through the plugin index commit helper so provider onboarding metadata is not stripped by plain config writes. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: 插件/channels: merge pending channel 插件 install records 使用 the existing 插件 index 之前 配置 writes, preserving unrelated tracked installs 期间 channel setup, 解决, 移除, 和 capability repair flows. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/channels: merge pending channel plugin install records with the existing plugin index before config writes, preserving unrelated tracked installs during channel setup, resolve, remove, and capability repair flows. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: 插件/配置: defer shipped `插件.installs` index migration 期间 配置 writes until the guarded 配置 commit window 和 roll it back if the 配置 write fails 之前 commit. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/config: defer shipped `plugins.installs` index migration during config writes until the guarded config commit window and roll it back if the config write fails before commit. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: Sessions: keep embedded runtime context out 的 the visible user prompt 通过 sending it as a hidden next-turn custom message, 和 teach 诊断工具 to repair affected 2026.4.24 transcripts 使用 duplicated prompt-rewrite branches. 修复 #71761.
changes.rawTitle: Sessions: keep embedded runtime context out of the visible user prompt by sending it as a hidden next-turn custom message, and teach doctor to repair affected 2026.4.24 transcripts with duplicated prompt-rewrite branches. Fixes #71761.

changes.title: 网关/subagents: keep direct-loopback backend RPCs authenticated 使用 the shared 网关 令牌/password off stale CLI paired-device scope baselines, so internal calls no longer hit `scope-upgrade` pairing prompts while remote, 浏览器, node, device-令牌, 和 explicit-device paths still require normal pairing approval. 修复 #63548.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/subagents: keep direct-loopback backend RPCs authenticated with the shared gateway token/password off stale CLI paired-device scope baselines, so internal calls no longer hit `scope-upgrade` pairing prompts while remote, browser, node, device-token, and explicit-device paths still require normal pairing approval. Fixes #63548.

changes.title: Providers/Azure OpenAI: give deployment-scoped image generation requests a longer 600s default 超时 so slow `gpt-image-2` generations can complete 不适用 a per-call `timeoutMs`. 修复 #71705. Thanks @voytas75.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/Azure OpenAI: give deployment-scoped image generation requests a longer 600s default timeout so slow `gpt-image-2` generations can complete without a per-call `timeoutMs`. Fixes #71705. Thanks @voytas75.

changes.title: 网关/插件: link source-checkout bundled runtime dependency caches 而不是 recursively copying `node_modules` 在 the 网关 main thread, preventing local status, node, 和 skill probes 从 timing out 期间 startup cache restores.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/plugins: link source-checkout bundled runtime dependency caches instead of recursively copying `node_modules` on the gateway main thread, preventing local status, node, and skill probes from timing out during startup cache restores.

changes.title: Skills/remote nodes: only expose remote macOS skill bins 为了 connected nodes, clear stale bin matches 当 node probes fail, 和 include probe 命令, 超时, bin count, 和 connection state 在 超时 logs.
changes.rawTitle: Skills/remote nodes: only expose remote macOS skill bins for connected nodes, clear stale bin matches when node probes fail, and include probe command, timeout, bin count, and connection state in timeout logs.

changes.title: Skills/remote nodes: recognize `system.which` object-map responses 当 probing connected macOS nodes, so Linux gateways can expose macOS-only skills such as Apple Notes 当 the required binaries are installed remotely. 修复 #71877. Thanks @miguelarios.
changes.rawTitle: Skills/remote nodes: recognize `system.which` object-map responses when probing connected macOS nodes, so Linux gateways can expose macOS-only skills such as Apple Notes when the required binaries are installed remotely. Fixes #71877. Thanks @miguelarios.

changes.title: CLI/网关: keep diagnostic probes 从 creating first-time read-only device pairings, while still reusing cached device tokens 为了 detailed read probes. 修复 #71766. Thanks @SunboZ.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/gateway: keep diagnostic probes from creating first-time read-only device pairings, while still reusing cached device tokens for detailed read probes. Fixes #71766. Thanks @SunboZ.

changes.rawTitle: CLI/plugins: keep `message` startup, `channels logs`, `agents delete`, and `agents set-identity` off broad plugin preloading; message delivery still loads plugins when the action actually runs.

changes.title: Image understanding: 解决 configured image 模型 such as local LM Studio vision entries 之前 reporting `Unknown 模型` 当 the discovery registry has not registered that provider. 修复 #66486. Thanks @zhanggpcsu.
changes.rawTitle: Image understanding: resolve configured image models such as local LM Studio vision entries before reporting `Unknown model` when the discovery registry has not registered that provider. Fixes #66486. Thanks @zhanggpcsu.

changes.title: QQ Bot: ignore self-echoed bot messages using the outbound ref-index marker, preventing mirrored replies 从 re-entering the Agent loop while still allowing users to quote bot replies. 修复 #71912. Thanks @wangyc6003.
changes.rawTitle: QQ Bot: ignore self-echoed bot messages using the outbound ref-index marker, preventing mirrored replies from re-entering the agent loop while still allowing users to quote bot replies. Fixes #71912. Thanks @wangyc6003.

changes.title: Sessions: separate reset freshness 从 session-store `updatedAt`, so heartbeat, cron, exec, 和 网关 bookkeeping no longer 防止 configured daily/idle resets 从 rolling long-running channel sessions. 修复 #68315, #63732, #63820, 和 #69083. Thanks @maxatv, @longhairedsi, @bradfreels, 和 @akessel56.
changes.rawTitle: Sessions: separate reset freshness from session-store `updatedAt`, so heartbeat, cron, exec, and gateway bookkeeping no longer prevent configured daily/idle resets from rolling long-running channel sessions. Fixes #68315, #63732, #63820, and #69083. Thanks @maxatv, @longhairedsi, @bradfreels, and @akessel56.

changes.title: Sessions: clear queued system-event notices 期间 `/new`, `/reset`, 网关 `sessions.reset`, 和 daily/idle rollover so stale background updates cannot leak 进入 the first prompt 的 the fresh session. 修复 #66864. Thanks @opeyio, @Magicray1217, 和 @cedillarack.
changes.rawTitle: Sessions: clear queued system-event notices during `/new`, `/reset`, gateway `sessions.reset`, and daily/idle rollover so stale background updates cannot leak into the first prompt of the fresh session. Fixes #66864. Thanks @opeyio, @Magicray1217, and @cedillarack.

changes.title: CLI/Agent: keep `Agent bind`, `Agent unbind`, 和 `Agent bindings` 在 setup-safe channel metadata paths so they do not preload bundled 插件 runtimes 或 stage runtime dependencies. 修复 #71743.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/agents: keep `agents bind`, `agents unbind`, and `agents bindings` on setup-safe channel metadata paths so they do not preload bundled plugin runtimes or stage runtime dependencies. Fixes #71743.

changes.rawTitle: Plugins/registry: preserve explicit disabled plugin records during registry migration without persisting every unused bundled plugin discovered on disk. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.rawTitle: Windows/native: keep CLI startup and bundled provider plugin loading off Windows ESM raw-path failure paths, fixing native onboarding/install smoke on Node 24.

changes.rawTitle: Plugins/install: force plugin dependency installs to stay project-local even when inherited npm config requests global installs, so successful installs still materialize the plugin's staged `node_modules`.

changes.title: iOS/macOS Talk Mode: 允许 `talk.speechLocale` to set the speech recognition locale 为了 non-English 语音 conversations. 修复 #44688.

changes.title: 插件/providers: honor explicit 插件 candidate lists 而不是 reading a persisted registry snapshot 从 local state, keeping candidate-scoped provider discovery hermetic.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/providers: honor explicit plugin candidate lists instead of reading a persisted registry snapshot from local state, keeping candidate-scoped provider discovery hermetic.

changes.title: 插件/诊断工具: keep bundled 插件 runtime-dependency repairs inside the managed OpenClaw stage even 当 user npm prefix/global 配置 points npm at `$HOME/node_modules`. 修复 #71730.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/doctor: keep bundled plugin runtime-dependency repairs inside the managed OpenClaw stage even when user npm prefix/global config points npm at `$HOME/node_modules`. Fixes #71730.

changes.title: ACP/sessions_spawn: reject normal OpenClaw 配置 Agent ids 当 callers explicitly request `runtime="acp"`, while allowing Agent configured 使用 `runtime.type="acp"` to 解决 to their ACP harness id. 修复 #63914.
changes.rawTitle: ACP/sessions_spawn: reject normal OpenClaw config agent ids when callers explicitly request `runtime="acp"`, while allowing agents configured with `runtime.type="acp"` to resolve to their ACP harness id. Fixes #63914.

changes.title: ACP/sessions_spawn: apply `runTimeoutSeconds` to ACP child turns 和 dispatch those turns 在 the background subagent lane, so quota-stalled ACP harnesses do not occupy the main Agent lane indefinitely. 修复 #68823.
changes.rawTitle: ACP/sessions_spawn: apply `runTimeoutSeconds` to ACP child turns and dispatch those turns on the background subagent lane, so quota-stalled ACP harnesses do not occupy the main agent lane indefinitely. Fixes #68823.

changes.title: ACP/oneshot: reconcile runtime session identity 之前 closing completed oneshot ACP runs, so finished `sessions.json` entries do not stay stuck 使用 `acp.identity.state="pending"`.
changes.rawTitle: ACP/oneshot: reconcile runtime session identity before closing completed oneshot ACP runs, so finished `sessions.json` entries do not stay stuck with `acp.identity.state="pending"`.

changes.title: ACPX: bundle `acpx@0.6.1` so unsupported generic 模型 overrides fail clearly 而不是 静默地 falling back to the target adapter default.
changes.rawTitle: ACPX: bundle `acpx@0.6.1` so unsupported generic model overrides fail clearly instead of silently falling back to the target adapter default.

changes.title: ACP/模型: document that non-Codex ACP 模型 overrides require adapter 支持 为了 ACP `模型` plus `session/set_model`, so unsupported harnesses fail clearly 而不是 静默地 falling back to their defaults.
changes.rawTitle: ACP/models: document that non-Codex ACP model overrides require adapter support for ACP `models` plus `session/set_model`, so unsupported harnesses fail clearly instead of silently falling back to their defaults.

changes.title: 插件/语音 Call: treat missing provider credentials as setup-incomplete 期间 网关 startup 和 log the missing keys as a warning 而不是 a runtime startup 错误, while keeping explicit 命令/工具 errors 当 used.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/Voice Call: treat missing provider credentials as setup-incomplete during Gateway startup and log the missing keys as a warning instead of a runtime startup error, while keeping explicit command/tool errors when used.

changes.title: Android/Talk Mode: 防止 duplicate TTS playback 当 fast 或 repeated final chat events arrive while Talk Mode is waiting 为了 its own response. 修复 #46546.
changes.rawTitle: Android/Talk Mode: prevent duplicate TTS playback when fast or repeated final chat events arrive while Talk Mode is waiting for its own response. Fixes #46546.

changes.title: Tooling/check:changed: pass parent heavy-check lock markers to lint lanes so `pnpm check:changed` no longer waits 在 its own `lint:extensions` child.
changes.rawTitle: Tooling/check:changed: pass parent heavy-check lock markers to lint lanes so `pnpm check:changed` no longer waits on its own `lint:extensions` child.

changes.title: CLI/completion: dedupe provider 认证 flags 之前 registering `openclaw onboard` options, so completion-cache refresh 期间 更新 no longer fails 当 stale core fallback flags overlap 插件 manifest flags. 修复 #71667.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/completion: dedupe provider auth flags before registering `openclaw onboard` options, so completion-cache refresh during update no longer fails when stale core fallback flags overlap plugin manifest flags. Fixes #71667.

changes.title: Diagnostics/trace: report live context usage 从 the current prompt snapshot 而不是 provider turn totals, avoiding false near-full context spikes 在 cached 或 工具-heavy runs.
changes.rawTitle: Diagnostics/trace: report live context usage from the current prompt snapshot instead of provider turn totals, avoiding false near-full context spikes on cached or tool-heavy runs.

changes.rawTitle: Providers/Google: honor `models.providers.google.request.allowPrivateNetwork` for Gemini TTS and telephony TTS, matching Google image generation and media understanding. (#71723) Thanks @ro-hansolo.

changes.title: Providers/MiniMax: register `MiniMax-portal` 为了 music 和 video generation, preserving OAuth认证 认证 和 regional MiniMax base URLs across the shared `music_generate` 和 `video_generate` tools. (#63241) Thanks @tars90percent.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/MiniMax: register `minimax-portal` for music and video generation, preserving OAuth auth and regional MiniMax base URLs across the shared `music_generate` and `video_generate` tools. (#63241) Thanks @tars90percent.

changes.title: Providers/onboarding: keep Runway 和 Alibaba 模型 Studio out 的 the text-inference setup picker 通过 scoping their video-generation 认证 choices to the media setup flow. (#65856) Thanks @Jah-yee.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/onboarding: keep Runway and Alibaba Model Studio out of the text-inference setup picker by scoping their video-generation auth choices to the media setup flow. (#65856) Thanks @Jah-yee.

changes.title: 插件/Bonjour: 停止 the 网关 从 崩溃-looping 在 `CIAO PROBING CANCELLED` 当 the mDNS watchdog cancels a stuck probe. Restores the rejection-handler wiring dropped 期间 the bonjour 插件 migration 和 shares unhandled-rejection state across module instances so 插件-staged copies 的 `openclaw/插件-sdk/runtime` register 进入 the same handler set the host consults. Especially affects Docker 在 macOS, where mDNS probing reliably hits the watchdog. Thanks @troyhitch.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/Bonjour: stop the gateway from crash-looping on `CIAO PROBING CANCELLED` when the mDNS watchdog cancels a stuck probe. Restores the rejection-handler wiring dropped during the bonjour plugin migration and shares unhandled-rejection state across module instances so plugin-staged copies of `openclaw/plugin-sdk/runtime` register into the same handler set the host consults. Especially affects Docker on macOS, where mDNS probing reliably hits the watchdog. Thanks @troyhitch.

changes.title: Google Meet: report pinned Chrome nodes as offline 或 missing capabilities 在 setup/join diagnostics, keep inaccessible nodes out 的 auto-selection, 和 preflight local BlackHole/SoX requirements 之前 Agent try local Chrome.
changes.rawTitle: Google Meet: report pinned Chrome nodes as offline or missing capabilities in setup/join diagnostics, keep inaccessible nodes out of auto-selection, and preflight local BlackHole/SoX requirements before agents try local Chrome.

changes.rawTitle: Providers/MiniMax: route `image-01` requests to the dedicated image generation endpoint while preserving CN endpoint selection. Fixes #61149. Thanks @mushuiyu886.

changes.title: 插件/startup: 移除 ownerless bundled runtime-dependency install locks 之后 a short grace window 和 include lock owner details 当 startup times out waiting 为了 a 插件 runtime-deps lock.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/startup: remove ownerless bundled runtime-dependency install locks after a short grace window and include lock owner details when startup times out waiting for a plugin runtime-deps lock.

changes.rawTitle: Plugins/install: anchor bundled runtime-dependency npm installs with an OpenClaw-owned package manifest so Linux updates cannot accidentally write to a parent `$HOME/node_modules` tree. Fixes #71730.

changes.rawTitle: Plugins/install: pass onboarding plugin config into plugin index writes so local plugin installs outside default discovery roots keep their install records. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.rawTitle: Plugins/install: migrate shipped `plugins.installs` config records into the plugin index while stripping them from runtime config and future writes. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: 插件/install: durably 移除 shipped `插件.installs` 从 `openclaw.json` 之后 its records are copied 进入 the 插件 index, while rolling back the index write if 配置 cleanup fails. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.rawTitle: Plugins/install: keep migrated plugin install records in the plugin index even when the plugin manifest is missing or invalid, so update, uninstall, inspect, and audit can still recover broken installs. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.rawTitle: Plugins/security: keep plugin audit JSON check ids stable while reporting plugin index install-record findings with updated wording. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.rawTitle: Agents/Anthropic/Bedrock: strip thinking blocks with missing, empty, or blank replay signatures before provider conversion, falling back to non-empty omitted-reasoning text when needed so corrupted signed-thinking history no longer poisons subsequent turns. changes.rawTitle: Agents/Anthropic/Bedrock: preserve stripped thinking-only assistant replay turns with non-empty omitted-reasoning text so provider adapters keep strict user/assistant turn shape. Thanks @wujiaming88.

changes.title: Media/插件: bound MIME sniffing 和 ZIP archive preflight 之前 handing untrusted files to `file-type` 或 `jszip`, reducing parser CPU 和 内存 exposure 为了 attachments 和 ClawHub 插件 archives. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Cron: record jobs interrupted 通过 a 网关 restart as failed at their original `runningAtMs`, skip unsafe startup replay, 和 禁用 interrupted one-shot jobs so they show a visible failure 而不是 静默地 disappearing 或 duplicating work. 修复 #59056, #61343, #63657, 和 #59301. changes.title: Cron 工具: recover flat top-level schedule shorthand such as `cron`, `tz`, 和 `staggerMs` 之前 网关 validation, so 模型-generated cron 添加/更新 calls 保留 cron jitter settings. Thanks @tyxben.
changes.rawTitle: Cron tool: recover flat top-level schedule shorthand such as `cron`, `tz`, and `staggerMs` before gateway validation, so model-generated cron add/update calls preserve cron jitter settings. Thanks @tyxben.

changes.title: Cron: hydrate flat legacy job rows 使用 top-level `cron`, `tz`, `session`, 和 `message` fields 进入 canonical schedule, target, 和 payload objects 之前 startup recomputes run times. 修复 #43351.
changes.rawTitle: Cron: hydrate flat legacy job rows with top-level `cron`, `tz`, `session`, and `message` fields into canonical schedule, target, and payload objects before startup recomputes run times. Fixes #43351.

changes.title: Agent/replies: let pending group chat history trigger bare mentioned turns 不适用 treating metadata-only inbound context as user input. 修复 #71489. (#71520) Thanks @SymbolStar.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/replies: let pending group chat history trigger bare mentioned turns without treating metadata-only inbound context as user input. Fixes #71489. (#71520) Thanks @SymbolStar.

changes.title: Google media generation: strip a configured trailing `/v1beta` 从 Google music/video provider base URLs 之前 calling the Google GenAI SDK, preventing doubled `/v1beta/v1beta` paths. 修复 #63240. (#63258) Thanks @Hybirdss.
changes.rawTitle: Google media generation: strip a configured trailing `/v1beta` from Google music/video provider base URLs before calling the Google GenAI SDK, preventing doubled `/v1beta/v1beta` paths. Fixes #63240. (#63258) Thanks @Hybirdss.

changes.title: Discord: restore direct-message 语音-note preflight transcription 和 classify URL-only Ogg/Opus 语音 attachments as audio while skipping partial attachments 不适用 usable URLs. 修复 #61314 和 #64803.
changes.rawTitle: Discord: restore direct-message voice-note preflight transcription and classify URL-only Ogg/Opus voice attachments as audio while skipping partial attachments without usable URLs. Fixes #61314 and #64803.

changes.title: 插件/build: copy bundled 插件 skill trees 进入 `dist-runtime`, broaden Windows symlink-copy fallbacks, 和 fingerprint runtime dependencies 从 `lstat` so symlink-like directory entries cannot 崩溃 staging.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/build: copy bundled plugin skill trees into `dist-runtime`, broaden Windows symlink-copy fallbacks, and fingerprint runtime dependencies from `lstat` so symlink-like directory entries cannot crash staging.

changes.title: Google Chat: 保留 reply text 当 a typing indicator message is deleted 或 can no longer be 已更新, so media captions 和 first text chunks are resent 而不是 静默地 disappearing. (#71498) Thanks @colin-lgtm.
changes.rawTitle: Google Chat: preserve reply text when a typing indicator message is deleted or can no longer be updated, so media captions and first text chunks are resent instead of silently disappearing. (#71498) Thanks @colin-lgtm.

changes.title: Cron: tolerate malformed legacy job rows 在 startup, main-session system-event payloads, 和 human-readable `cron list` output so missing `state`, `payload.text`, 或 display fields no longer 崩溃 the scheduler 或 CLI. 修复 #66016, #65916, #64137, #57872, #59968, #63813, #52804, 和 #43163. (#71509) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Cron: tolerate malformed legacy job rows in startup, main-session system-event payloads, and human-readable `cron list` output so missing `state`, `payload.text`, or display fields no longer crash the scheduler or CLI. Fixes #66016, #65916, #64137, #57872, #59968, #63813, #52804, and #43163. (#71509) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: CLI/模型: make `openclaw 模型 scan` fall back to public OpenRouter free-模型 metadata 当 no `OPENROUTER_API_KEY` is configured, 避免 配置 secret resolution 为了 explicit `--no-probe` scans, 和 apply the scan 超时 to the OpenRouter catalog request.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/models: make `openclaw models scan` fall back to public OpenRouter free-model metadata when no `OPENROUTER_API_KEY` is configured, avoid config secret resolution for explicit `--no-probe` scans, and apply the scan timeout to the OpenRouter catalog request.

changes.title: 飞书: keep streaming cards to one live card per turn, flush throttled card edits 之后 meaningful text boundaries, 和 skip exact block/partial repeats so 工具-heavy replies do not duplicate card output. Thanks @allan0509.
changes.rawTitle: Feishu: keep streaming cards to one live card per turn, flush throttled card edits after meaningful text boundaries, and skip exact block/partial repeats so tool-heavy replies do not duplicate card output. Thanks @allan0509.

changes.title: 飞书: finish the streaming-card duplicate closeout 通过 stripping leaked reasoning tags, preserving cross-block partial snapshots, enabling topic-thread streaming cards, omitting the generic `main` card header, surfacing transient 工具/compaction status, 和 cleaning streaming state 之后 close failures. Thanks @sesame437, @Vicky-v7, @maoku-family, @Pengxiao-Wang, 和 @Maple778.
changes.rawTitle: Feishu: finish the streaming-card duplicate closeout by stripping leaked reasoning tags, preserving cross-block partial snapshots, enabling topic-thread streaming cards, omitting the generic `main` card header, surfacing transient tool/compaction status, and cleaning streaming state after close failures. Thanks @sesame437, @Vicky-v7, @maoku-family, @Pengxiao-Wang, and @Maple778.

changes.title: Telegram: recover incomplete partial-stream previews 通过 falling back to a final send 当 an ambiguous final edit failure would otherwise retain a strict prefix 的 the answer. 修复 #71525. (#71554) Thanks @sahilsatralkar.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram: recover incomplete partial-stream previews by falling back to a final send when an ambiguous final edit failure would otherwise retain a strict prefix of the answer. Fixes #71525. (#71554) Thanks @sahilsatralkar.

changes.title: Control 界面/chat: collapse assistant 令牌/模型 context details behind an explicit Context disclosure 和 show full dates 在 message footers, making historical transcript timing clear 不适用 noisy default metadata. (#71337) Thanks @BunsDev.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/chat: collapse assistant token/model context details behind an explicit Context disclosure and show full dates in message footers, making historical transcript timing clear without noisy default metadata. (#71337) Thanks @BunsDev.

changes.title: OpenAI/Codex OAuth认证: explain `unsupported_country_region_territory` 令牌-exchange failures 使用 a 代理/region hint 而不是 surfacing a generic OAuth认证 错误. 修复 #51175. (#71501) Thanks @vincentkoc 和 @wulala-xjj.
changes.rawTitle: OpenAI/Codex OAuth: explain `unsupported_country_region_territory` token-exchange failures with a proxy/region hint instead of surfacing a generic OAuth error. Fixes #51175. (#71501) Thanks @vincentkoc and @wulala-xjj.

changes.title: 浏览器/Linux: fall back to headless mode 为了 local managed profiles 在 hosts 不适用 a display server, while preserving explicit per-profile headed overrides 和 reporting the headless source. (#60953) Thanks @rrpsantos.
changes.rawTitle: Browser/Linux: fall back to headless mode for local managed profiles on hosts without a display server, while preserving explicit per-profile headed overrides and reporting the headless source. (#60953) Thanks @rrpsantos.

changes.title: Telegram: 移除 the startup persisted-offset `getUpdates` preflight so polling restarts do not self-conflict 之前 the runner starts. 修复 #69304. (#69779) Thanks @chinar-amrutkar.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram: remove the startup persisted-offset `getUpdates` preflight so polling restarts do not self-conflict before the runner starts. Fixes #69304. (#69779) Thanks @chinar-amrutkar.

changes.title: Telegram: keep the polling stall watchdog active even 当 grammY reports the runner as not running while its task is still pending, so a rebuilt transport cannot leave `getUpdates` silent until a manual 网关 restart. 修复 #69064. Thanks @LDLoeb.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram: keep the polling stall watchdog active even when grammY reports the runner as not running while its task is still pending, so a rebuilt transport cannot leave `getUpdates` silent until a manual gateway restart. Fixes #69064. Thanks @LDLoeb.

changes.title: Subagents: fall back to direct completion delivery 当 the parent announce turn finishes 不适用 a visible payload, so child results still reach channel-backed requester sessions.
changes.rawTitle: Subagents: fall back to direct completion delivery when the parent announce turn finishes without a visible payload, so child results still reach channel-backed requester sessions.

changes.title: Subagents: tell parent Agent to use `sessions_yield` while waiting 为了 child completion events, preventing GPT-5 fast runs 从 ending 静默地 之后 spawning workers.
changes.rawTitle: Subagents: tell parent agents to use `sessions_yield` while waiting for child completion events, preventing GPT-5 fast runs from ending silently after spawning workers.

changes.title: 浏览器/Playwright: ignore benign already-handled route races 期间 guarded navigation so 浏览器-page tasks no longer fail 当 Playwright tears down a route mid-flight. (#68708) Thanks @Steady-ai.
changes.rawTitle: Browser/Playwright: ignore benign already-handled route races during guarded navigation so browser-page tasks no longer fail when Playwright tears down a route mid-flight. (#68708) Thanks @Steady-ai.

changes.title: 浏览器/CLI: lazy-load 浏览器 命令 groups 和 插件 runtime services so `openclaw 浏览器 --help` can render 不适用 loading the full 浏览器 automation stack. 修复 #65400. (#65460, #66640) Thanks @pandego 和 @Tianworld.
changes.rawTitle: Browser/CLI: lazy-load browser command groups and plugin runtime services so `openclaw browser --help` can render without loading the full browser automation stack. Fixes #65400. (#65460, #66640) Thanks @pandego and @Tianworld.

changes.title: 浏览器/CLI: serve precomputed `openclaw 浏览器 --help` text 从 CLI startup metadata, avoiding the full 插件/配置 startup 路径 为了 the common help invocation.
changes.rawTitle: Browser/CLI: serve precomputed `openclaw browser --help` text from CLI startup metadata, avoiding the full plugin/config startup path for the common help invocation.

changes.title: 浏览器/downloads: seed managed Chrome profiles 使用 OpenClaw download prefs 和 capture unmanaged click-triggered downloads under the guarded downloads directory, while explicit download waiters still own their target file. (#64558) Thanks @Pearcekieser.
changes.rawTitle: Browser/downloads: seed managed Chrome profiles with OpenClaw download prefs and capture unmanaged click-triggered downloads under the guarded downloads directory, while explicit download waiters still own their target file. (#64558) Thanks @Pearcekieser.

changes.title: 浏览器/Chrome: 停止 passing redundant `--禁用-setuid-sandbox` 当 `浏览器.noSandbox` is enabled; `--no-sandbox` remains the effective sandbox opt-out. (#67939) Thanks @sebykrueger.
changes.rawTitle: Browser/Chrome: stop passing redundant `--disable-setuid-sandbox` when `browser.noSandbox` is enabled; `--no-sandbox` remains the effective sandbox opt-out. (#67939) Thanks @sebykrueger.

changes.title: 浏览器/client: 停止 telling Agent to permanently 避免 the 浏览器 之后 transient 超时 或 cancellation failures; keep the no-重试 hint 为了 persistent unavailable/rate-limit cases. (#46505) Thanks @jriff.
changes.rawTitle: Browser/client: stop telling agents to permanently avoid the browser after transient timeout or cancellation failures; keep the no-retry hint for persistent unavailable/rate-limit cases. (#46505) Thanks @jriff.

changes.title: 浏览器/aria snapshots: bind `format=aria` `axN` refs to live DOM nodes through backend DOM ids 当 Playwright is available, so follow-up 浏览器 actions can use those refs 不适用 timing out. (#62434) Thanks @MrKipler.
changes.rawTitle: Browser/aria snapshots: bind `format=aria` `axN` refs to live DOM nodes through backend DOM ids when Playwright is available, so follow-up browser actions can use those refs without timing out. (#62434) Thanks @MrKipler.

changes.title: Telegram: 防止 duplicate 在-process long pollers 为了 the same bot 令牌 和 添加 clearer `getUpdates` conflict diagnostics 为了 external duplicate pollers. 修复 #56230. Thanks @Co-Messi.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram: prevent duplicate in-process long pollers for the same bot token and add clearer `getUpdates` conflict diagnostics for external duplicate pollers. Fixes #56230. Thanks @Co-Messi.

changes.title: 浏览器/Linux: detect Chromium-based installs under `/opt/google`, `/opt/brave.com`, `/usr/lib/chromium`, 和 `/usr/lib/chromium-浏览器` 之前 asking users to set `浏览器.executablePath`. (#48563) Thanks @lupuletic.
changes.rawTitle: Browser/Linux: detect Chromium-based installs under `/opt/google`, `/opt/brave.com`, `/usr/lib/chromium`, and `/usr/lib/chromium-browser` before asking users to set `browser.executablePath`. (#48563) Thanks @lupuletic.

changes.title: Sessions/浏览器: close tracked 浏览器 tabs 当 idle, daily, `/new`, 或 `/reset` session rollover archives the previous transcript, preventing tabs 从 leaking past the old session. Thanks @jakozloski.
changes.rawTitle: Sessions/browser: close tracked browser tabs when idle, daily, `/new`, or `/reset` session rollover archives the previous transcript, preventing tabs from leaking past the old session. Thanks @jakozloski.

changes.title: Sessions/forking: fall back to transcript-estimated parent 令牌 counts 当 cached totals are stale 或 missing, so oversized thread forks start fresh 而不是 cloning the full parent transcript. Thanks @jalehman.
changes.rawTitle: Sessions/forking: fall back to transcript-estimated parent token counts when cached totals are stale or missing, so oversized thread forks start fresh instead of cloning the full parent transcript. Thanks @jalehman.

changes.title: OpenAI/Codex: send Codex Responses system prompts through top-level `instructions` while preserving the existing native Codex payload controls.
changes.rawTitle: OpenAI/Codex: send Codex Responses system prompts through top-level `instructions` while preserving the existing native Codex payload controls.

changes.title: MCP协议/CLI: retire bundled MCP协议 runtimes at the end 的 one-shot `openclaw Agent` 和 `openclaw infer 模型 run` 网关/local executions, so repeated scripted runs do not accumulate stdio MCP协议 child processes. 修复 #71457. Thanks @spartoviMD.
changes.rawTitle: MCP/CLI: retire bundled MCP runtimes at the end of one-shot `openclaw agent` and `openclaw infer model run` gateway/local executions, so repeated scripted runs do not accumulate stdio MCP child processes. Fixes #71457. Thanks @spartoviMD.

changes.title: OpenAI/Codex image generation: canonicalize legacy `OpenAI-Codex.baseUrl` values such as `https://chatgpt.com/backend-API` to the Codex Responses backend 之前 calling `gpt-image-2`, matching the chat transport. 修复 #71460. Thanks @GodsBoy.
changes.rawTitle: OpenAI/Codex image generation: canonicalize legacy `openai-codex.baseUrl` values such as `https://chatgpt.com/backend-api` to the Codex Responses backend before calling `gpt-image-2`, matching the chat transport. Fixes #71460. Thanks @GodsBoy.

changes.title: Control 界面: make `/usage` use the fresh context snapshot 为了 context percentage, 和 include cache-write tokens 在 the Usage overview cache-hit denominator. 修复 #47885. Thanks @imwyvern 和 @Ante042.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI: make `/usage` use the fresh context snapshot for context percentage, and include cache-write tokens in the Usage overview cache-hit denominator. Fixes #47885. Thanks @imwyvern and @Ante042.

changes.title: GitHub Copilot: 保留 encrypted Responses reasoning item IDs 期间 replay so Copilot can validate encrypted reasoning payloads across requests. (#71448) Thanks @a410979729-sys.
changes.rawTitle: GitHub Copilot: preserve encrypted Responses reasoning item IDs during replay so Copilot can validate encrypted reasoning payloads across requests. (#71448) Thanks @a410979729-sys.

changes.title: GitHub Copilot: never rewrite connection-bound reasoning item IDs regardless 的 whether `encrypted_content` is present, fixing a 400 "Encrypted content item_id did not match" 错误 使用 `gpt-5.3-Codex` 和 future Codex 模型 that fall through to the forward-compat catch-all 使用 `reasoning: false`. Also recognize Codex-named 模型 as reasoning-capable so they inherit the correct capability flags. Refs #68735. Thanks @InvalidPandaa.
changes.rawTitle: GitHub Copilot: never rewrite connection-bound reasoning item IDs regardless of whether `encrypted_content` is present, fixing a 400 "Encrypted content item_id did not match" error with `gpt-5.3-codex` and future Codex models that fall through to the forward-compat catch-all with `reasoning: false`. Also recognize Codex-named models as reasoning-capable so they inherit the correct capability flags. Refs #68735. Thanks @InvalidPandaa.

changes.title: Agent/replies: recover final-answer text 当 streamed assistant chunks contain only whitespace, preventing completed turns 从 surfacing as empty-payload errors. 修复 #71454. (#71467) Thanks @Sanjays2402.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/replies: recover final-answer text when streamed assistant chunks contain only whitespace, preventing completed turns from surfacing as empty-payload errors. Fixes #71454. (#71467) Thanks @Sanjays2402.

changes.rawTitle: Feishu/TTS: transcode voice-intent MP3 and other audio replies to Ogg/Opus before sending native Feishu audio bubbles, while keeping ordinary MP3 attachments as files. Fixes #61249 and #37868. Thanks @sg1416-zg and @ycjlb2023-peteryi.

changes.title: WhatsApp/TTS: transcode MP3/WebM audio, including Microsoft Edge TTS output, to Ogg/Opus 之前 sending PTT 语音 notes.
changes.rawTitle: WhatsApp/TTS: transcode MP3/WebM audio, including Microsoft Edge TTS output, to Ogg/Opus before sending PTT voice notes.

changes.rawTitle: QQBot/TTS: honor plain `audioAsVoice` replies by synthesizing TTS to native QQ voice messages, and mark inbound voice-only messages as audio media without exposing raw voice paths to generic media context.

changes.rawTitle: Providers/SenseAudio: add bundled SenseAudio batch audio transcription through `tools.media.audio` with `SENSEAUDIO_API_KEY` auth. (#66943) Thanks @Fl0rencess720.

changes.title: Providers/MiniMax: let TTS use MiniMax portal OAuth认证 和 令牌 Plan credentials 之前 falling back to `MINIMAX_API_KEY`, 和 include current TTS HD 模型 ids. 修复 #55017. Thanks @zx15210404690-hash.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/MiniMax: let TTS use MiniMax portal OAuth and Token Plan credentials before falling back to `MINIMAX_API_KEY`, and include current TTS HD model ids. Fixes #55017. Thanks @zx15210404690-hash.

changes.title: Telegram/Webhook: acknowledge validated Webhook updates 之前 running bot middleware, keeping slow Agent turns 从 tripping Telegram delivery retries while preserving per-chat processing lanes. 修复 #71392. Thanks @joelforsberg46-source.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram/webhook: acknowledge validated webhook updates before running bot middleware, keeping slow agent turns from tripping Telegram delivery retries while preserving per-chat processing lanes. Fixes #71392. Thanks @joelforsberg46-source.

changes.rawTitle: MCP/config reload: hot-apply `mcp.*` changes by disposing cached session MCP runtimes, and dispose bundled MCP runtimes during gateway shutdown so removed `mcp.servers` entries reap child processes promptly. Fixes #60656. Thanks @xieyuanqing.

changes.title: Active 内存: keep silent recall sub-Agent billing/认证 failures out 的 shared 认证-profile cooldown state, so a Claude CLI extra-usage rejection cannot 禁用 normal Claude-backed turns. 修复 #71284. (#71539) Thanks @vishutdhar 和 @obviyus.
changes.rawTitle: Active Memory: keep silent recall sub-agent billing/auth failures out of shared auth-profile cooldown state, so a Claude CLI extra-usage rejection cannot disable normal Claude-backed turns. Fixes #71284. (#71539) Thanks @vishutdhar and @obviyus.

changes.title: 认证/Claude CLI: sync refreshed Claude CLI OAuth认证 credentials 进入 the managed 认证 profile so long-running Claude CLI runs 停止 falling back to stale OpenClaw snapshots. (#70902) Thanks @starvex.
changes.rawTitle: Auth/Claude CLI: sync refreshed Claude CLI OAuth credentials into the managed auth profile so long-running Claude CLI runs stop falling back to stale OpenClaw snapshots. (#70902) Thanks @starvex.

changes.title: Sessions: make `sessions_spawn(mode="session")` errors name usable alternatives 当 the current channel cannot bind subagent threads. 修复 #67400. (#67790) Thanks @stainlu.
changes.rawTitle: Sessions: make `sessions_spawn(mode="session")` errors name usable alternatives when the current channel cannot bind subagent threads. Fixes #67400. (#67790) Thanks @stainlu.

changes.title: Agent/Claude CLI: pass the OpenClaw system prompt through Claude's prompt-file flag so Windows runs 避免 argv length failures 不适用 changing system prompt semantics. 修复 #69158. (#69211) Thanks @skylee-01, @cassioanorte, @Syu0, 和 @Stache73.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/Claude CLI: pass the OpenClaw system prompt through Claude's prompt-file flag so Windows runs avoid argv length failures without changing system prompt semantics. Fixes #69158. (#69211) Thanks @skylee-01, @cassioanorte, @Syu0, and @Stache73.

changes.title: Agent/CLI sessions: bind `google-gemini-CLI` session 认证-epoch to the Google account identity 在 `~/.gemini/oauth_creds.json`, so Gemini-backed Agent resume their conversation 之后 网关 restart 而不是 minting a fresh session, 和 stale bindings are invalidated 当 the authenticated Google account changes. 修复 #70973. (#71076) Thanks @openperf.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/CLI sessions: bind `google-gemini-cli` session auth-epoch to the Google account identity in `~/.gemini/oauth_creds.json`, so Gemini-backed agents resume their conversation after gateway restart instead of minting a fresh session, and stale bindings are invalidated when the authenticated Google account changes. changes.rawTitle: Slack: stop treating user mentions in assistant-authored message edit blocks as sender attribution, preventing edited bot messages from spoofing a mentioned DM user. (#71700) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.rawTitle: Codex: consume unauthorized bound conversation inbound claims before they can fall through to other claim handlers or enqueue Codex turns. (#71702) Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.title: 语音 replies get a full TTS upgrade: `/tts latest`, chat-scoped auto-TTS controls, personas, per-Agent/per-account overrides, 和 new Azure Speech, Xiaomi, Local CLI, Inworld, Volcengine, 和 ElevenLabs v3 provider coverage. items.title: 插件/Bonjour: 停止 the 网关 从 崩溃-looping 在 `CIAO PROBING CANCELLED` 当 the mDNS watchdog cancels a stuck probe. Restores the rejection-handler wiring dropped 期间 the bonjour 插件 migration 和 shares unhandled-rejection state across module instances so 插件-staged copies 的 `openclaw/插件-sdk/runtime` register 进入 the same handler set the host consults. Especially affects Docker 在 macOS, where mDNS probing reliably hits the watchdog. Thanks @troyhitch.
items.rawTitle: Plugins/Bonjour: stop the gateway from crash-looping on `CIAO PROBING CANCELLED` when the mDNS watchdog cancels a stuck probe. Restores the rejection-handler wiring dropped during the bonjour plugin migration and shares unhandled-rejection state across module instances so plugin-staged copies of `openclaw/plugin-sdk/runtime` register into the same handler set the host consults. Especially affects Docker on macOS, where mDNS probing reliably hits the watchdog. Thanks @troyhitch.

changes.title: TTS/WhatsApp: 添加 `/tts latest` read-aloud 支持 使用 duplicate suppression 和 `/tts chat 在|off|default` session-scoped auto-TTS overrides, completing the 在-demand 语音-note UX 为了 current-chat replies. 修复 #66032.

changes.title: TTS/channels: 解决 channel 和 account TTS overrides generically, enabling 飞书 和 QQBot accounts to deep-merge `channels.<channel>.accounts.<id>.tts` over global 和 per-Agent TTS 配置. Thanks @sahilsatralkar.
