items.rawTitle: OpenAI/Codex image generation: canonicalize legacy `openai-codex.baseUrl` values such as `https://chatgpt.com/backend-api` to the Codex Responses backend before calling `gpt-image-2`, matching the chat transport. Fixes #71460.

items.title: Control 界面: make `/usage` use the fresh context snapshot 为了 context percentage, 和 include cache-write tokens 在 the Usage overview cache-hit denominator. 修复 #47885. Thanks @imwyvern 和 @Ante042.
items.rawTitle: Control UI: make `/usage` use the fresh context snapshot for context percentage, and include cache-write tokens in the Usage overview cache-hit denominator. Fixes #47885. Thanks @imwyvern and @Ante042.

items.title: Daemon/service-env: 添加 Nix Home Manager profile bin directories to generated 网关 service PATHs 在 macOS 和 Linux, honoring `NIX_PROFILES` right-to-left precedence 和 falling back to `~/.nix-profile/bin` 当 unset. 修复 #44402. (#59935) Thanks @jerome-benoit.
items.rawTitle: Daemon/service-env: add Nix Home Manager profile bin directories to generated gateway service PATHs on macOS and Linux, honoring `NIX_PROFILES` right-to-left precedence and falling back to `~/.nix-profile/bin` when unset. Fixes #44402. (#59935) Thanks @jerome-benoit.

changes.title: Google Meet joins OpenClaw as a bundled participant 插件, 使用 personal Google 认证, Chrome/Twilio realtime sessions, paired-node Chrome 支持, artifact/attendance exports, 和 recovery tooling 为了 already-open Meet tabs.
changes.rawTitle: Google Meet joins OpenClaw as a bundled participant plugin, with personal Google auth, Chrome/Twilio realtime sessions, paired-node Chrome support, artifact/attendance exports, and recovery tooling for already-open Meet tabs.

changes.title: DeepSeek V4 Flash 和 V4 Pro are 在 the bundled catalog, V4 Flash is the onboarding default, 和 DeepSeek thinking/replay behavior is 已修复 为了 follow-up 工具-call turns.
changes.rawTitle: DeepSeek V4 Flash and V4 Pro are in the bundled catalog, V4 Flash is the onboarding default, and DeepSeek thinking/replay behavior is fixed for follow-up tool-call turns.

changes.title: Talk, 语音 Call, 和 Google Meet can use realtime 语音 loops that consult the full OpenClaw Agent 为了 deeper 工具-backed answers.
changes.rawTitle: Talk, Voice Call, and Google Meet can use realtime voice loops that consult the full OpenClaw agent for deeper tool-backed answers.

changes.title: 浏览器 automation gets coordinate clicks, longer default action budgets, per-profile headless overrides, 和 steadier tab 复用/recovery.
changes.rawTitle: Browser automation gets coordinate clicks, longer default action budgets, per-profile headless overrides, and steadier tab reuse/recovery.

changes.title: 插件 和 模型 infrastructure is lighter at startup: static 模型 catalogs, manifest-backed 模型 rows, lazy provider dependencies, 和 external runtime-dependency repair 为了 packaged installs.
changes.rawTitle: Plugin and model infrastructure is lighter at startup: static model catalogs, manifest-backed model rows, lazy provider dependencies, and external runtime-dependency repair for packaged installs.

changes.title: Packaged installs: 保留 package-root runtime dependencies 当 bundled 插件 runtime mirrors fall back to copying shared chunks, fixing Windows npm updates that could fail to load copied `dist` modules.
changes.rawTitle: Packaged installs: preserve package-root runtime dependencies when bundled plugin runtime mirrors fall back to copying shared chunks, fixing Windows npm updates that could fail to load copied `dist` modules.

changes.title: Heartbeat: clamp oversized scheduler delays through the shared safe timer helper, preventing `every` values over Node's 超时 cap 从 becoming a 1 ms 崩溃 loop. 修复 #71414. (#71478) Thanks @hclsys.
changes.rawTitle: Heartbeat: clamp oversized scheduler delays through the shared safe timer helper, preventing `every` values over Node's timeout cap from becoming a 1 ms crash loop. Fixes #71414. (#71478) Thanks @hclsys.

changes.title: Telegram: 移除 the startup persisted-offset `getUpdates` preflight so polling restarts do not self-conflict 之前 the runner starts. 修复 #69304. (#69779) Thanks @chinar-amrutkar.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram: remove the startup persisted-offset `getUpdates` preflight so polling restarts do not self-conflict before the runner starts. Fixes #69304. (#69779) Thanks @chinar-amrutkar.

changes.title: 浏览器/Playwright: ignore benign already-handled route races 期间 guarded navigation so 浏览器-page tasks no longer fail 当 Playwright tears down a route mid-flight. (#68708) Thanks @Steady-ai.
changes.rawTitle: Browser/Playwright: ignore benign already-handled route races during guarded navigation so browser-page tasks no longer fail when Playwright tears down a route mid-flight. (#68708) Thanks @Steady-ai.

changes.title: 浏览器/aria snapshots: bind `format=aria` `axN` refs to live DOM nodes through backend DOM ids 当 Playwright is available, so follow-up 浏览器 actions can use those refs 不适用 timing out. (#62434) Thanks @MrKipler.
changes.rawTitle: Browser/aria snapshots: bind `format=aria` `axN` refs to live DOM nodes through backend DOM ids when Playwright is available, so follow-up browser actions can use those refs without timing out. (#62434) Thanks @MrKipler.

changes.title: Telegram: 防止 duplicate 在-process long pollers 为了 the same bot 令牌 和 添加 clearer `getUpdates` conflict diagnostics 为了 external duplicate pollers. 修复 #56230.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram: prevent duplicate in-process long pollers for the same bot token and add clearer `getUpdates` conflict diagnostics for external duplicate pollers. Fixes #56230.

changes.title: 浏览器/Linux: detect Chromium-based installs under `/opt/google`, `/opt/brave.com`, `/usr/lib/chromium`, 和 `/usr/lib/chromium-浏览器` 之前 asking users to set `浏览器.executablePath`. (#48563) Thanks @lupuletic.
changes.rawTitle: Browser/Linux: detect Chromium-based installs under `/opt/google`, `/opt/brave.com`, `/usr/lib/chromium`, and `/usr/lib/chromium-browser` before asking users to set `browser.executablePath`. (#48563) Thanks @lupuletic.

changes.title: Sessions/浏览器: close tracked 浏览器 tabs 当 idle, daily, `/new`, 或 `/reset` session rollover archives the previous transcript, preventing tabs 从 leaking past the old session. Thanks @jakozloski.
changes.rawTitle: Sessions/browser: close tracked browser tabs when idle, daily, `/new`, or `/reset` session rollover archives the previous transcript, preventing tabs from leaking past the old session. Thanks @jakozloski.

changes.title: Sessions/forking: fall back to transcript-estimated parent 令牌 counts 当 cached totals are stale 或 missing, so oversized thread forks start fresh 而不是 cloning the full parent transcript. Thanks @jalehman.
changes.rawTitle: Sessions/forking: fall back to transcript-estimated parent token counts when cached totals are stale or missing, so oversized thread forks start fresh instead of cloning the full parent transcript. Thanks @jalehman.

changes.title: OpenAI/Codex: send Codex Responses system prompts through top-level
changes.rawTitle: OpenAI/Codex: send Codex Responses system prompts through top-level

changes.title: MCP协议/CLI: retire bundled MCP协议 runtimes at the end 的 one-shot `openclaw Agent` 和 `openclaw infer 模型 run` 网关/local executions, so repeated scripted runs do not accumulate stdio MCP协议 child processes. 修复 #71457.
changes.rawTitle: MCP/CLI: retire bundled MCP runtimes at the end of one-shot `openclaw agent` and `openclaw infer model run` gateway/local executions, so repeated scripted runs do not accumulate stdio MCP child processes. Fixes #71457.

changes.title: OpenAI/Codex image generation: canonicalize legacy `OpenAI-Codex.baseUrl` values such as `https://chatgpt.com/backend-API` to the Codex Responses backend 之前 calling `gpt-image-2`, matching the chat transport. 修复 #71460.
changes.rawTitle: OpenAI/Codex image generation: canonicalize legacy `openai-codex.baseUrl` values such as `https://chatgpt.com/backend-api` to the Codex Responses backend before calling `gpt-image-2`, matching the chat transport. Fixes #71460.

changes.title: Control 界面: make `/usage` use the fresh context snapshot 为了 context percentage, 和 include cache-write tokens 在 the Usage overview cache-hit denominator. 修复 #47885. Thanks @imwyvern 和 @Ante042.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI: make `/usage` use the fresh context snapshot for context percentage, and include cache-write tokens in the Usage overview cache-hit denominator. Fixes #47885. Thanks @imwyvern and @Ante042.

changes.title: GitHub Copilot: 保留 encrypted Responses reasoning item IDs 期间 replay so Copilot can validate encrypted reasoning payloads across requests. (#71448) Thanks @a410979729-sys.
changes.rawTitle: GitHub Copilot: preserve encrypted Responses reasoning item IDs during replay so Copilot can validate encrypted reasoning payloads across requests. (#71448) Thanks @a410979729-sys.

changes.title: Agent/replies: recover final-answer text 当 streamed assistant chunks contain only whitespace, preventing completed turns 从 surfacing as empty-payload errors. 修复 #71454. (#71467) Thanks @Sanjays2402.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/replies: recover final-answer text when streamed assistant chunks contain only whitespace, preventing completed turns from surfacing as empty-payload errors. Fixes #71454. (#71467) Thanks @Sanjays2402.

changes.title: 飞书/TTS: transcode 语音-intent MP3 和 other audio replies to Ogg/Opus 之前 sending native 飞书 audio bubbles, while keeping ordinary MP3 attachments as files. 修复 #61249 和 #37868.
changes.rawTitle: Feishu/TTS: transcode voice-intent MP3 and other audio replies to Ogg/Opus before sending native Feishu audio bubbles, while keeping ordinary MP3 attachments as files. Fixes #61249 and #37868.

changes.title: Telegram/Webhook: acknowledge validated Webhook updates 之前 running bot middleware, keeping slow Agent turns 从 tripping Telegram delivery retries while preserving per-chat processing lanes. 修复 #71392. Thanks @joelforsberg46-source.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram/webhook: acknowledge validated webhook updates before running bot middleware, keeping slow agent turns from tripping Telegram delivery retries while preserving per-chat processing lanes. Fixes #71392. Thanks @joelforsberg46-source.

changes.title: MCP协议: retire one-shot embedded bundled MCP协议 runtimes at run end, skip bundle-MCP协议 startup 当 a runtime 工具 allowlist cannot reach bundle-MCP协议 tools, 和 添加 `MCP协议.sessionIdleTtlMs` idle eviction 为了 leaked session runtimes. 修复 #71106, #71110, #70389, 和 #70808.
changes.rawTitle: MCP: retire one-shot embedded bundled MCP runtimes at run end, skip bundle-MCP startup when a runtime tool allowlist cannot reach bundle-MCP tools, and add `mcp.sessionIdleTtlMs` idle eviction for leaked session runtimes. Fixes #71106, #71110, #70389, and #70808.

changes.title: MCP协议/配置 reload: hot-apply `MCP协议.*` changes 通过 disposing cached session MCP协议 runtimes, 和 dispose bundled MCP协议 runtimes 期间 网关 shutdown so removed `MCP协议.servers` entries reap child processes promptly. 修复 #60656.
changes.rawTitle: MCP/config reload: hot-apply `mcp.*` changes by disposing cached session MCP runtimes, and dispose bundled MCP runtimes during gateway shutdown so removed `mcp.servers` entries reap child processes promptly. Fixes #60656.

changes.title: 网关/restart continuation: durably hand restart continuations to a session-delivery queue 之前 deleting the restart sentinel, recover queued continuation work 之后 crashy restarts, 和 fall back to a session-only wake 当 no channel route survives reboot. (#70780) Thanks @fuller-stack-dev.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/restart continuation: durably hand restart continuations to a session-delivery queue before deleting the restart sentinel, recover queued continuation work after crashy restarts, and fall back to a session-only wake when no channel route survives reboot. (#70780) Thanks @fuller-stack-dev.

changes.title: Agent/工具-result pruning: harden the 工具-result character estimator 和 context-pruning loops against malformed `{ type: "text" }` blocks created 通过 void 或 undefined 工具 handler results, serializing non-string text payloads 为了 size accounting so they cannot bypass trimming as zero-sized. 修复 #34979. (#51267) Thanks @cgdusek, @alvinttang, 和 @coffeexcoin.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/tool-result pruning: harden the tool-result character estimator and context-pruning loops against malformed `{ type: "text" }` blocks created by void or undefined tool handler results, serializing non-string text payloads for size accounting so they cannot bypass trimming as zero-sized. Fixes #34979. (#51267) Thanks @cgdusek, @alvinttang, and @coffeexcoin.

changes.title: Daemon/service-env: 添加 Nix Home Manager profile bin directories to generated 网关 service PATHs 在 macOS 和 Linux, honoring `NIX_PROFILES` right-to-left precedence 和 falling back to `~/.nix-profile/bin` 当 unset. 修复 #44402. (#59935) Thanks @jerome-benoit.
changes.rawTitle: Daemon/service-env: add Nix Home Manager profile bin directories to generated gateway service PATHs on macOS and Linux, honoring `NIX_PROFILES` right-to-left precedence and falling back to `~/.nix-profile/bin` when unset. Fixes #44402. (#59935) Thanks @jerome-benoit.
